title: Social Media Content Machine (Research+Video editing)
description:
**Organic Content Iterator — AI Health & Wellness Brand**



We run a fast-scaling AI-powered social media brand in the health & wellness space, generating tens of millions of views per month across Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube.



We need ONE person whose entire job is multiplying our viral outliers. You don't create content from scratch. You take what's already working and turn each winner into 3–5 split-test iterations.



This is a trial reels operator role. You live in the iteration loop.



---



**This role is NOT for you if:**

- You want to come up with concepts from scratch

- You only edit videos

- You only write scripts

- You need a brief to start working

- You don't understand why a video went viral



**This role IS for you if** you can look at a viral outlier, instantly see 5 ways to remix it, and ship those iterations yourself — script, edit, and all.



---



**What you own**



**1. Outlier scanning (daily)**

- Monitor our organic accounts across IG, TikTok, FB, YouTube

- Identify viral outliers the 
nt they break out

- Track which avatars (Helga, Marc, Sepp, Kiona, etc.) are hitting and on which platforms



**2. Iteration engine (your main job)**

- Take every viral outlier ? produce 3–5 split-test iterations

- Test new hooks, openings, angles, pacing, CTAs on the proven structure

- Each iteration is a clean trial reel — not a remix that dilutes the original

- Goal: turn 1 winner into 5 reels that all have a real shot at popping



**3. Scripting & psychology**

- Rewrite hooks and scripts for each iteration

- Understand WHY the original worked — the customer psychology behind the hook, the retention mechanic, the payoff

- Match each iteration to the avatar's voice and audience



**4. Editing**

- Edit videos yourself in CapCut / Premiere / similar

- Own pacing, structure, cuts, captions, retention curves

- Ship polished output without needing a separate editor



---



**Required**



- Deep understanding of viral short-form (IG Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

- Editing skills — CapCut, Premiere, or equivalent

- Hands-on with AI video tools: VEO, Sora, Kling, AI avatars, ElevenLabs

- You can break down hooks, retention, payoff structure on any viral video

- You understand content psychology — why people stop scrolling, why they keep watching, why they save and share

- Self-directed — you spot the outlier, plan the iterations, and ship without supervision



---



**Reference 
 on Instagram. That's the bar.



Only apply if you are ready to do a trial task!!

title: Facebook Ads Creative Strategist
description:
*
 Ads Creative Strategist — AI Health & Wellness Brand**



We run paid
 ads at scale for an AI-powered health & wellness brand. We launch large batches of creatives every 3 days, across multiple avatar accounts, in German and English markets.



We need ONE person who owns the
 creative pipeline: iterating our winners AND introducing brand-new ads twice a week, sourced from competitor research.



---



**This role is NOT for you if:**

- You only do organic content

- You don't read ad performance data

- You think a good creative is a pretty creative

- You can't write copy that sells

- You can't research competitors and reverse-engineer what's working



**This role IS for you if you obsess over hooks, copy angles, and CPA — and you can spot why one ad scales to $10K/day while another dies at $50.



---



**What you own**



**1. Iterating our winners**

- Take every winning
 creative we have ? produce 3-5+ iterations

- Test new hooks, new openings, new copy angles, new CTAs

- Keep the proven structure intact while finding the next angle that scales



**2. New ads twice a week (competitor-sourced)**

- Research competitors in Meta Ad Library daily

- Identify their best-performing ads (long-running creatives = working creatives)

- Reverse-engineer hooks, copy angles, mechanisms, CTAs

- Bring those winners into our brand universe — adapted to our avatars, our offer, our voice

- Ship new ads on a twice-weekly cadence to keep our testing pipeline full



**3. Copy (the heart of the role)**

- Write
 ad copy — primary text, headlines, CTAs

- Direct response copywriting: hooks, problem-agitation, social proof, mechanism, offer, urgency

- Match copy angle to audience pain point

- Test angles, not just words — you know the difference



---



**Required**



- Strong direct-response copywriting — you can write a hook that stops scroll and copy that moves people to click

- Hands-on
 ads experience — you've worked inside Ads Manager, you know what scales and what dies and understand basic metrics to improve creatives

- Daily Meta Ad Library use — you already do competitor research as a habit, not a chore

- You can read ad performance data: CTR, CPA, ROAS, hook rate, hold rate

- You can break down any ad into: hook / angle / mechanism / offer / CTA

- Familiarity with AI video tools (VEO, Sora, Kling) and AI avatars enough to recreate our videos

- You understand the difference between organic virality and paid performance — they are NOT the same game



---



**Reference level:** Top scaling DTC health/supplement brands in Meta Ad Library running 100+ active creatives at a time. If you don't already have favorites in this category, this isn't your role.



---



Only apply if you are ready to fullfill a trial task!!

title: Social Media & Content VA
description:
We're looking for a creative, organized VA to manage social media content for a public figure and creative professional across multiple platforms. This is a long-term, remote role at 20 hours per week with room to grow.



What You'll Do

, and X.

- Write captions and hooks in the client's authentic voice. Schedule all content for approval using Go High Level Social Planner.  - Ensure all posts align with brand guidelines for tone, visuals, and messaging. 

- Monitor comments and DMs, and flag items that need a personal response. 

- Track weekly performance and share brief engagement summaries.



Requirements



- Experience managing social media for a personal brand or public figure.

- Familiar with Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn,
, and X best practices.

title: YouTube Setup & Growth Virtual Assistant (AI Niche)
description:

Channel Setup:

- Set up playlists and organize channel structure

title: Part-Time Virtual Assistant – GHL & Lead Follow-Up | Cleaning Company (Michigan, USA)
description:
Part-Time Virtual Assistant – GHL & Lead Follow-Up | Cleaning Company (Michigan, USA)



About BubbleDash LLC

BubbleDash is a growing residential and commercial cleaning company based in Michigan, USA. We serve clients across the Metro Detroit area and are expanding fast. We use GoHighLevel (GHL) as our CRM and have an answering service handling live inbound calls — so you will not be fielding random calls all day. Your focus is clean, defined, and impactful.



What You Will Be Doing

Following up with warm, cold, and lost leads via outbound calls and GHL

Managing and maintaining our GHL pipeline (contacts, tags, statuses, follow-up sequences)

Sending weekly availability check-in texts to our contractor roster through GHL

Scheduling appointments for qualified leads

General admin support as needed

What We Are Looking For

Proven GoHighLevel (GHL) experience — this is a firm requirement

Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal

Experience with outbound calling and appointment setting

Reliable, detail-oriented, and consistent — someone who follows processes without cutting corners

Self-starter who can work independently once trained



Position Details

Part-time: 4 hours per day, Monday through Friday

Working hours: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST (Negotiable)

Starting rate: Based on experience

Payment: Twice monthly



This role has growth potential — as BubbleDash scales, hours, wages and responsibilities will increase for the right person



How to Apply

Apply directly through OnlineJobs.ph. In your application, please include:

Your experience with GoHighLevel specifically (what you have used it for)

A brief description of your outbound calling experience

Your availability to start

Applications without GHL experience noted will not be considered.

title: Remote Property Finance & Collections Coordinator (Part-Time)
description:
Compensation: $350 USD/month (increase after 30–60 days based on performance)

Hours: 2 hours/day, 5–6 days/week

Schedule: Fixed shift aligned with Jamaica time (e.g. 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM Jamaica time)

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)



About the Role

We are hiring a reliable, detail-oriented Remote Finance Coordinator to support a growing property rental, storage, and hospitality business. This role focuses on tracking payments, collections, and ensuring all financial activity is recorded accurately.

Core Responsibility

Ensure that all money coming in and going out is tracked, followed up, and recorded accurately — nothing is missed.

Key Responsibilities

Payment Tracking: Track all incoming payments from bank accounts, PayPal, credit card machine, and occasional cash. Match each payment to the correct customer or invoice.

Collections: Follow up on overdue payments via WhatsApp,
, and occasional phone calls (must be comfortable speaking with customers when required). Maintain records of all communications.

Invoicing & Payment Coordination: Generate invoices, track payment status, and ensure all invoices are followed up until paid.

Restaurant Lease Tracking: Confirm weekly rent payments (due Sundays), issue receipts, and track deposits. Calculate weekly sales position by deducting bank charges and company commission.

Bank & Cash Tracking: Record all transactions and categorize income and expenses. Ensure no transactions are missed.

Bills & Payments: Track utilities, vendors, and platform commissions. Prepare weekly payment lists and confirm completion.

Owner Payments: Track amounts due to property owners and assist with monthly summaries.

Reporting: Maintain Google Sheets tracker daily. Provide weekly updates and monthly summaries.

Tools

Google Sheets, WhatsApp,
, PayPal

Requirements

Strong written English. Clear spoken English for occasional calls. Strong attention to detail. Comfortable with numbers and tracking.

Important Notes

This is a long-term part-time role. Work must be completed during the fixed Jamaica-time shift. This role includes collections and follow-ups. It does not include formal accounting or tax work.

Application Process

To apply, please include: a short introduction, relevant experience, tools used, availability, and internet speed. Start your application with the word "CONTROL". Shortlisted candidates will be required to complete a test task and submit a short voice recording. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Remote VA / Project Coordinator
description:
Mission Control (Remote VA / Project Coordinator – Travel & YouTubeThis is not a typical role



This is a front-row seat to a real-world expedition



The Mission:

I am a veteran IT professional with 36 years of experience, currently preparing for a solo motorcycle and hiking expedition: The Stoic Solo Hiker. This 8-month, 15-island journey across the Philippines documents endurance, culture, and Stoic philosophy. I’m building a system that allows me to stay focused on the road and the story.

The journey begins in Teachers Village, Quezon City, and transitions into continuous travel across the country. This engagement supports the systems, logistics, and production behind that mission.

________________________________________

The Professional Partnership (Collaboration & Growth):

This is not a traditional administrative role. It is a high-level professional collaboration built on mutual respect, trust, and independent thinking.

I am seeking an independent professional who operates with strong judgment, initiative, and accountability. You will not be following a rigid checklist. Instead, you will provide independent support, insights, and solutions that help navigate an evolving and dynamic environment.

This role is best suited for someone who is mapagkakatiwalaan—reliable, composed under pressure, and capable of solving complex problems with both precision and professionalism.

________________________________________

Core Responsibilities:

• Technical Logistics: Provide independent coordination and research for real-world logistics, including ferry routes, mountain access, permits, and route planning. Identify risks and recommend solutions to maintain continuity of travel.

• Production Management: Independently manage the YouTube production workflow, including uploads, metadata optimization, thumbnails, and publishing schedule, ensuring consistent and high-quality output.

• Calm Under Pressure: Maintain professional composure when plans change. Assess situations objectively and provide clear, actionable solutions to keep the project moving forward.

• Lifestyle & Social Scouting: Identify and recommend culturally relevant venues, live music locations, and events that enhance storytelling and on-camera experiences, with a focus on cinematic and authentic local appeal.

• Strategic Alignment Support: Provide independent input to help maintain alignment with project goals and priorities. Offer perspective that simplifies complexity and supports effective decision-making in dynamic situations.

• Conversational Language Coaching: Support conversational practice in Filipino (Tagalog) and basic Bisaya as part of regular communication during the preparation phase.

________________________________________

Qualifications:

• Multilingual: Excellent English and Tagalog required; Bisaya (Cebuano) is an advantage

• Technically Ambitious: Interest in learning tools related to video production and digital workflows

• Proactive Problem Solver: Identifies issues early and proposes solutions independently

• Strong Cultural Awareness: Communicates naturally and effectively across contexts

• Education: Degree (completed or in progress) or equivalent real-world experience

• Lifestyle Alignment: Active, curious, and interested in showcasing the Philippines authentically

________________________________________

The Pay & Engagement Structure (Clarification):

• Retainer Phase (Now – Sept): Estimated ~6 hours per month (training, research, language practice)

• Expedition Phase (Oct – June 2027): Estimated ~5–10+ hours per week depending on project needs

• Engagement Type: This is an independent contract engagement. The contractor retains full control over how services are performed. No employer-employee relationship is intended.

• Service Fee: $6–$7 USD/hour + monthly Connectivity & Communications Stipend

________________________________________

This role is NOT for you if:

1. You require constant direction 

2. You overlook details or ignore instructions 

3. You prefer passive work over problem-solving and ownership 

________________________________________

How to Apply (Screening Test):

Send your application to 

Include a link (Loom, YouTube Unlisted, or Google Drive—no attachments) to a 1–2 minute video covering:

1. The G2 Challenge: Explain the technical and physical difficulty of Mt. Guiting-Guiting 

2. The Logistics: Current Ro/Ro ferry options for a motorcycle from Batangas to Sibuyan Island 

3. The Social Scout: Recommend one high-quality live music venue for the Pinoy Indie (OPM) scene 

4. If applicable: How this engagement aligns with your long-term goals 

Subject Line: Mission Control Application – [Your Name] – [Site you found it on]

Incomplete submissions will not be reviewed.

title: LinkedIn Outreach Assistant — 24-Day Project, ~5 Min/Day
description:
WHAT'S THE WORK?



We're hiring 40+ part-time assistants for a 24-day LinkedIn outreach campaign starting late April 2026. The work is 100% copy-paste: open a candidate's LinkedIn profile, paste a pre-written InMail message, send, mark complete in a tracking sheet.



- ~5 minutes per day

- ~3.5 hours total over 24 days

- 100% scripted — no message writing, no replies, no decisions

- Pre-prepared queue delivered to you daily

- You will NOT respond to candidate replies — you forward them to our internal team

- Skip days are fine. Weekends, family stuff, sick days — your queue rolls forward, just keep up roughly with the daily pace overall





WHAT YOU EARN



$0.35 per message verified. About 75 messages over the campaign = $26.25 total.



Choose how you get paid:



- WEEKLY PAYMENTS via USDT (Solana network), bank transfer, or mobile top-up — paid every Friday

- OR SINGLE PAYMENT at the end of the campaign + $5 completion bonus = $31.25 total



Top performers also get first invitation to Phase 2 and Phase 3 of this campaign over the following 60 days (additional ~$30-50 each, not guaranteed).





WHAT YOU NEED



1. A LINKEDIN PROFILE IN ONE OF THESE FIELDS: recruiting, talent acquisition, HR, executive search, executive/personal assistant, or virtual assistant. Profiles in unrelated fields (graphic design, marketing, sales/SDR, lead generation, software development, healthcare, customer service, etc.) will not be considered — even if your past work history includes some recruiting experience. Your current LinkedIn headline matters most.



2. A LinkedIn account at least 1 year old, with a professional photo and (ideally) 50+ connections.



3. YOU HAVE NOT USED A LINKEDIN SALES NAVIGATOR FREE TRIAL IN THE PAST 12 MONTHS (we'll verify with a 2-minute screenshot check before hiring).



4. ~5 minutes most days for ~24 days.





ABOUT US



We're Obsidian Global, a business group running this campaign for three companies. Our coordinator Piumantha is your main point of contact.



We pay every freelancer who completes the work, on time, in full, via your chosen method. Weekly payments option exists specifically for freelancers who prefer regular payouts.





HOW TO APPLY



Reply with:



1. A SCREENSHOT OF YOUR LINKEDIN PROFILE (showing photo, headline, current role, connection count)



2. Confirmation: "I have NOT used a Sales Navigator trial in the past 12 months"



3. ONE SENTENCE ANSWERING THIS: What is our policy on responding to candidate replies?



Piumantha responds to qualified applicants within 24 hours during weekdays.

title: Social Media Video Editor / Content Director — AI-Forward Dental Brand
description:
We're 5D Smiles + WakeWell Sleep Solutions — a dental implant + sleep medicine practice in Downey, California. We're hiring a remote Social Media Video Editor / Content Director who knows AI tools and can think strategically — not just cut and assemble.



This is the opposite of "edit what we send you and take 3 days per video." We want a self-directing creator who can come up with ideas, find what's working in our niche, ship 5-10 short-form videos per week, and use every AI tool in their toolbelt to do it faster than the next editor.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO:

- Edit short-form vertical (TikTok, Reels, Shorts) for both 5D Smiles (dental implants) and WakeWell Sleep (oral-appliance therapy)

- Come up with the video IDEAS — not just edit what's sent

- Build hook strategies that work for our niche (dental + sleep)

- Use AI for ideation, scripting, captions, b-roll, voice cloning — whatever saves time

- Ship 5-10 finished videos per week, every week

- Track performance and iterate based on what hits



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- A real portfolio (we want to see your best work — link it in your application)

- Proof you've grown an audience yourself OR an account you've run (exact follower count + starting count)

- Daily AI use — Claude Code, ChatGPT, Runway, Pika, Sora, ElevenLabs, Submagic, Opus Clip, Descript

- Speed — we want to know your hours-per-60-second-video, exact

- Hook craft — the first 3 seconds determine if a video lives or dies, and you need to know why

- (Bonus) Graphics design ability — Photoshop, Canva, Figma — for thumbnails + tiles

- (Bonus) Account directorship — can you plan a whole month of content for one brand?



WHAT YOU'LL GET:

- Competitive pay weekly via EasyPay (range based on portfolio + speed + AI fluency, discussed once we see your work)

- Direct mentorship on the AI-creator stack — we use these tools every day at the practice

- Long-term role — we're building a content team, not hiring a one-off freelancer

- Real growth path: editor ? senior editor ? content director (manage other editors)

- Work with a CEO (Dr. Henry Qiu) who is genuinely AI-forward and ships fast — no committee, no slow approvals



HOW TO APPLY:

Apply at 



Our application is short. The most important questions:

- Drop a link to your best work

- Pitch us 5 video ideas if we gave you 30 days running our channels

- Tap any standout signals (own audience 10k+, viral hit 100k+, 50+ videos shipped, healthcare niche)



Plan ~10-15 minutes for the full apply flow. Strong candidates get a reply within 48hr.



— Dr. Henry Qiu, Founder

5D Smiles + WakeWell Sleep Solutions, Downey CA

title: Google Ads Specialist (Lead Generation, Data-Driven)
description:
Job Description

We are a Dutch marketing agency focused on helping local businesses generate more leads. Our clients care about real results such as quote requests, showroom visits and contact inquiries.



We are looking for a Google Ads specialist who is highly data-driven and focused on performance.



Your role is to manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns with a strong focus on lead generation. You will improve cost per lead, increase the number of leads and scale campaigns that perform well.



You work based on data. You analyze campaigns, run experiments and continuously optimize. When you see opportunities, you act on them. If campaigns perform well, you proactively suggest increasing budgets.



You will work with Dutch campaigns. Our team will support you with translations and ad copy, but you are responsible for testing what works.



You also think beyond campaigns. If you see issues or opportunities in landing pages or tracking, you flag them and help improve results.



Key responsibilities

Managing and optimizing Google Ads campaigns

Improving cost per lead and increasing conversions

Scaling campaigns that perform well

Running tests and analyzing performance data

Working with GA4, Google Tag Manager and conversion tracking

Identifying opportunities and proactively improving results



Requirements

At least 2 years of experience with Google Ads

Experience with lead generation campaigns, not only e-commerce

Strong analytical skills and experience with data-driven optimization

Experience with GA4, Google Ads and Google Tag Manager

Understanding of conversion tracking and the value of conversions

Experience with Looker Studio is a plus

Proactive mindset and ability to work independently

Attention to detail and strong ownership

title: B2B Sales Caller — NZ Fintech (Cold Calling Accountants) — Paid Trial Month
description:
ABOUT US



We're Frontier Fintech, a New Zealand-based company. Our product Zipy (zipy.store) generates complete professional websites for small service businesses in 90 seconds using AI. The business owner just types their details, and Zipy builds them a website with a Google Map, contact form, services section, and hero image. They pay $19 USD/month to keep it.



We're hiring a full-time B2B Sales Caller to help us partner with New Zealand accountants. Each accountant who joins our affiliate program earns 32% recurring commission for every small business client they refer to Zipy. Your job is to call NZ accountants and convince them to join the program.



IMPORTANT: HONEST READ ON THIS ROLE



This is a paid trial month. After 30 days we'll evaluate results together. If you've delivered against the targets we agree on in week one (call volume, conversation quality, partners signed up), we extend you to a long-term role with a base salary increase and performance bonus structure on top. If results aren't there, the trial ends and we part ways respectfully.



We're being upfront about this because we don't want to waste your time or ours. We're a small startup and we can only afford this hire if it produces measurable results. If you're not comfortable with a one-month trial structure, this role isn't right for you.



For the right person who delivers, this is a long-term position. We'd love to keep someone for years.



SALARY AND HOURS



$1,000 USD/month (paid weekly via OnlineJobs EasyPay / Payoneer — $250 USD every Friday).



Hours: 8am to 4pm Manila time (PHT), Monday to Friday. This gives afternoon overlap with New Zealand business hours.



100% remote, work from home.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Make 50-80 outbound calls per day to a pre-loaded list of 1,800+ verified NZ accounting firms (we provide the list)

- Follow a proven script we provide and refine with you in week one

- Pitch the Zipy affiliate program: 32% recurring commission for accountants who refer their clients

- Send follow-up
s (templates provided) to interested accountants

- Update a shared spreadsheet daily with call status, outcomes, and notes

- Report weekly on calls made, conversations had, and partners signed up

- Daily standup with the founder (15 minutes) on Slack or



You're NOT closing the sale of Zipy itself. You're recruiting accountants to become affiliate partners. The accountant then refers their own clients. This is a much easier cold call than direct sales because you're offering them recurring income, not asking them to buy something.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (TRIAL MONTH TARGETS)



We'll agree on exact numbers in your first week, but expect targets in this range:



Week 1:
dials. Learn the script. 5-10 real conversations with accountants.

Week 2:
dials. 15-25 conversations. 1-2 partner signups.

Week 3:
dials. 20-30 conversations. 3-5 partner signups (cumulative 5-7).

Week 4:
dials. 20-30 conversations. 4-8 partner signups (cumulative 10-15 by end of month).



If by end of month you've signed up 8+ partners and demonstrated consistent call effort, the role becomes long-term with a base salary increase and partner-signup commission on top.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

- Strong spoken English. Clear, professional, neutral accent. NZ accountants are professional people and the call needs to sound credible.

- 1+ years of B2B cold calling experience (any industry — real estate, SaaS, insurance, finance, agency)

- Comfortable making 50+ calls per day. This is a high-volume role. You need stamina.

- Reliable internet and a quiet home work environment

- Available to start within 2 weeks of being hired



Preferred but not required:

- Experience with affiliate programs, partner channels, or referral marketing

- Familiarity with Google Sheets or similar

- Experience working with Western clients (US, UK, AU, NZ)



You don't need:

- Technical or website-building knowledge (we provide a 90-second walkthrough video)

- Sales certifications or formal training

- Industry experience in fintech or accounting



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- 1,800+ verified NZ accountant contacts with names, firms, and phone numbers

- Proven call script (we'll refine it with you in week one)

-
 templates for follow-ups

- Walkthrough video and partner landing page

- VOIP phone service or call platform (we cover this cost)

- Daily 15-minute standup with the founder for support

- Honest weekly feedback so you always know where you stand



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message including:



1. Brief intro (3-4 sentences about you and your B2B calling experience)



2. A 60-second voice recording of yourself reading this paragraph aloud:



"Hi, I'm calling from Zipy in Auckland. We help accountants like you add a recurring revenue stream by referring small business clients to our AI website builder. Your clients get a professional website built in 90 seconds, and you earn 32% recurring commission for every month they stay subscribed. I'd love to send you a quick walkthrough video and our partner page so you can see how it works. Would that be okay?"



Record on your phone and upload to Google Drive, Dropbox, or send the audio file directly. This is the most important part of the application — we hire on voice quality and clarity. Don't skip it.



3. Tell us about your most successful B2B cold-calling result. Specific numbers if possible (calls made, conversations had, conversions achieved).



4. Confirm you understand and accept the one-month paid trial structure described above.



5. Confirm you can work 8am-4pm PHT, Monday to Friday, starting within 2 weeks.



WHAT HAPPENS NEXT



We'll review applications within 48 hours of receiving them. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a 15-minute Zoom interview. We aim to make a hiring decision within one week of the application deadline.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Lloyd Brown

Co-Founder, Frontier Fintech

title: Tech VA
description:
We are a fast-growing med spa patient acquisition agency based in the US, and we are looking for a sharp, technically savvy VA to join our team part-time with real potential to grow into a full-time role as we scale.



This is not your average VA role. We need someone who genuinely loves figuring things out, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and can jump between platforms and tasks without missing a beat. If you get excited when you encounter a new piece of software and your first instinct is to figure it out rather than ask for help, this role is for you.





What You Will Be Doing



Your primary responsibility will be building out client backends. This includes setting up GoHighLevel (GHL) sub-accounts, configuring HotProspector dialing accounts, and handling calendar integrations across multiple clients. Each client has a different setup, different software, and a different way of doing things, so no two days will look the same.

Beyond that, you will own the technical side of our operations. If something breaks, if a new integration needs to be built, or if a workflow needs to be fixed, that lands on your plate. You will be our go-to person for anything tech-related until we build out a more structured team around you.

Core Responsibilities



-Build and configure GHL sub-accounts for new and existing clients

-Set up and manage HotProspector accounts

-Build, troubleshoot, and maintain calendar integrations across various platforms (Google Calendar, ClubReady, Jane, PatientNow, Square, and others)

-Book inbound leads directly into clinic scheduling software, ensuring accurate appointment entry across each client's specific booking system

-Build and manage automations and workflows using 
 and GHL's native automation tools

-Troubleshoot and maintain Google Sheets and light Google Apps Script when needed

-Handle any technical tasks that arise across the agency day to day



What We Need You to Know



GoHighLevel (GHL) – you must have hands-on experience building inside the platform, not just using it


 or similar automation tools (Zapier, n8n) – you need to understand how automations and multi-step workflows are built and how to troubleshoot them



Google Calendar integrations – experience syncing calendars across different platforms and solving integration issues in real time



Google Sheets – comfortable building, troubleshooting, and organizing data



Clinic booking software – experience entering or managing appointments inside platforms like Jane, PatientNow, Square, or similar systems is a strong plus



What You Will Learn on the Job



HotProspector – we will train you, but you need to be someone who picks up new platforms fast

Our specific client systems and workflows



Who You Are



You are genuinely tech savvy, not just comfortable with computers but someone who actively enjoys solving technical problems

You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to learn faster, troubleshoot smarter, and get things done without waiting to be spoon-fed answers

You are a critical thinker who can hop on a call with a client, encounter a calendar software you have never seen before, and figure out the integration on the spot

You communicate clearly and proactively, especially when something is not working

You take ownership of your tasks and do not need hand-holding to get things done

You are reliable, responsive, and take pride in your work



Why Join Scale 77

This is a ground-floor opportunity with a company that is growing fast. The person who fills this role will have direct exposure to the founders, real responsibility from day one, and a clear path to grow into a full-time, higher-paying position as we expand. We are not looking for someone to fill a seat, we are looking for someone to grow with us.

To Apply

Please include the following in your application:



A brief summary of your GHL experience and what you have built inside the platform

An automation or workflow you have built using 
 or a similar tool and what it did

Any calendar integration experience you have, including what platforms were involved

Any experience booking appointments or entering leads into clinic or healthcare scheduling software

Your availability and time zone



Applications without these details will not be reviewed.

title: Remote Sales and Booking Coordinator
description:
REMOTE SALES & BOOKING COORDINATOR

Prime Shine Detailing — Canada (fully remote, night shift)

Commission-based | Night shift (9pm–1am PHT) | Work from home | Part-time



?????????????????????????????



ABOUT THE ROLE



Prime Shine is a fast-growing mobile auto detailing company based in Ontario, Canada. We run paid ads that generate consistent inbound leads every day — your job is to call those leads quickly, qualify them, and book them into our schedule. No cold calling. Every person you call has already shown interest in our service. You are not starting from zero — we have a live ads campaign generating inbound leads daily.



?????????????????????????????



HOURS



This is a night shift role. Hours are 9:00am–1:00pm Eastern Time (Canada), which is 9:00pm–1:00am Philippine Time. Please only apply if you are comfortable with and available for these hours consistently. Hours may grow as the business expands.



?????????????????????????????



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Call inbound leads as quickly as possible after they submit a form — speed is the most important part of this role

- Follow a proven call script to qualify leads and book them into our calendar

- Prioritize booking jobs geographically — we cluster appointments by area to keep our techs efficient, so you'll always try to book nearby jobs back-to-back

- Update and manage leads inside our CRM (GoHighLevel — full training provided)

- Send follow-up texts to leads who don't answer and attempt callbacks

- Handle any overnight or missed leads first thing at the start of each shift

- Flag anything outside your script — pricing exceptions, complaints, or unusual requests — to the owner immediately

- Book jobs as far out as needed — we do not cap the calendar, so if the next available slot is a month away, book it



?????????????????????????????



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Excellent spoken and written English — confident, warm, and natural on the phone

- Reliable and punctual — leads go cold within the hour, showing up on time matters

- Organized — you'll manage multiple leads at different stages simultaneously

- Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

- Previous sales, appointment setting, or customer service experience is a strong asset

- Stable internet connection and a quiet environment for calls



?????????????????????????????



COMPENSATION



- 20% of job value per booked job (up to $3,000 CAD/month earned)

- $10 CAD flat per booked job above the $3,000 CAD/month threshold

- Average job value: $200–$250 CAD

- Estimated closes: 2–4 jobs per day

- Payment: bi-weekly via Wise



At 3 closes per day across 20 working days, you'd generate roughly $12,000 CAD in bookings and earn approximately $2,400 CAD (~90,000 PHP) that month. Strong performance will push you into the $10 flat rate per close — we'll explain exactly how that threshold works before you start so there are no surprises.



We will be transparent about lead volume before you start.



?????????????????????????????



TO APPLY



Send a short written introduction (5–8 sentences) — who you are, your experience with phone or sales work, and why you're a good fit. Then answer this question in writing:



"A lead submits a form at 11pm your time and doesn't answer when you call. What do you do?

title: Healthcare Digital Marketer - Meta + Klaviyo Specialist (Dental Practice, Australia)
description:
Job Description:



Premium dental practice in Sydney, Australia looking for a digital marketer with verifiable healthcare or dental industry experience.



This is not a role for generalists or e-commerce specialists pivoting to healthcare. We need someone who already understands healthcare advertising restrictions, dental lead funnels, and service-business
 automation.



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (non-negotiable):

- Direct experience running Meta Ads for healthcare, dental, medical, or wellness clinics

- Built service-business
 flows in Klaviyo (post-enquiry, appointment reminders, reactivation)

- Worked with Australian, UK, US, or Canadian healthcare clients

- Familiar with Meta Health & Wellness category restrictions and how to optimise around them



CURRENT SETUP:

- Meta Ads: ~$3,200 AUD/month spend, current CPL $25 AUD

- Google Ads: Scaling, currently ~$650 AUD/month

- Klaviyo: 2,500 active profiles, 2-4 campaigns per month

- Booking platform: Fresha (integration with Klaviyo is an open challenge)



WHAT YOU'D OWN:

- Meta Ads management, optimisation and creative diversification

- Google Ads management

- Klaviyo campaigns and automation flows

- Monthly reporting



TO APPLY, INCLUDE:

- Names of 1-2 healthcare/dental clients you've worked with (or a brief description if NDA)

- Screenshots of one Klaviyo service-business flow you've built (client details can be redacted)

- Best CPL you've achieved for a dental or healthcare lead generation campaign

- Your approach to Meta Health & Wellness category limitations

- One reference contact I can verify your work with



Applications without specific healthcare experience or portfolio evidence will not be considered. Please don't apply if you're hoping to learn the healthcare space on this role.



HIRING PROCESS:

- Application review (1 week)

- Loom video walkthrough of one healthcare campaign you managed (5 minutes)

- Video interview (20-30 min)

- Paid trial task (PHP 3,500 / $65 USD) - audit our current Meta account

Looking forward to hearing from genuine healthcare specialists.

title: AI-Style Video Editor (IG/TikTok)
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for a highly skilled, self-motivated AI video editor with a proven track record of growing and managing social media accounts at scale. This is not an entry-level position. You will be responsible for producing a high volume of polished, platform-optimized content every single day using the latest AI video tools — and you need to already know how to use them. If you are still learning the tools, this role is not for you.



What You'll Be Doing:

You will create and deliver 8 videos per day, 6 days per week, formatted and optimized for TikTok and Instagram. Each video must be platform-native — built for how real audiences watch, scroll, and engage — not repurposed content. You will work with a suite of cutting-edge AI tools including Veo 3, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Higfields, Nano, and Banana Pro, as well as any other AI video generation and editing platforms relevant to the project. You will be expected to stay current with new tools and features as they emerge, incorporate them into your workflow without hand-holding, and consistently push the quality and creativity of the output.



Who We're Looking For:

You have at minimum 6 months of hands-on experience editing and producing AI-generated video content — not just social media content generally, but specifically AI-style video using the tools listed above or their direct equivalents. More importantly, you have results. You have managed or contributed to accounts with hundreds of thousands of followers, or ideally one or more accounts at the 1 million+ follower mark. You know what performs on TikTok and Instagram, you understand algorithmic behavior, and you have the portfolio to prove it.

You are organized, fast, and reliable. Eight videos a day, six days a week is not a stretch goal — it is the baseline. You take feedback well, hit deadlines without reminders, and treat every piece of content as something worth doing right, even on a tight schedule.



Requirements:

Minimum 6 months of direct experience with AI video editing and generation tools

Demonstrated experience managing or producing content for accounts with 100,000+ followers (1M+ strongly preferred)

Full-time availability to produce and deliver 8 videos/day across a 6-day work week for TikTok and Instagram

Proficiency with Veo 3, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Higfields, Nano, and Banana Pro

Strong eye for platform-native design, pacing, and trends

Ability to work independently with minimal direction



How to Apply:

Submit your application with the following:



Links to accounts you have managed or produced content for — please include current follower count and your specific role/contribution:

Video samples showcasing your AI editing work across TikTok and/or Instagram

A brief note on which AI tools you use most and why



Applications without account examples will not be considered. We want to see real results on real accounts.

title: Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a skilled video editor to own the post-production workflow for both long-form and short-form content. Someone who brings technical precision and aesthetic sensibility to content about healing, consciousness, and medicine.



This is a remote, part-time role with consistent weekly work. Volume increases as the channel grows.



WHAT YOU'LL EDIT



- YouTube long-form (10-20 min talking-head + B-roll): color grade, audio cleanup, typography/titles, subtitles, pacing

- Instagram Reels + TikTok (30-90 sec): masking, motion typography, text overlays, B-roll integration, hook-optimized cuts

- YouTube Shorts: vertical reformats from long-form, punchy cuts, subtitle styling



MUST-HAVE SKILLS



- Advanced masking — background replacement, subject isolation, motion tracking

- Typography + kinetic text — on-brand title cards, pull quotes, lower thirds

- Subtitle/caption generation and styling (burned-in, not just SRT)

- Color correction and grading — fixing mixed lighting, skin tone accuracy, cinematic look

- Audio cleanup — noise reduction, leveling, music ducking

- Brand consistency — maintaining the same look/feel across all platforms



Software: Proficiency in Filmora required (our primary editing tool). Familiarity with Riverside.fm strongly preferred — understanding how to work with multi-track Riverside exports is a big plus. Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve experience welcome.



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with wellness, health, or educational content

- Motion graphics (After Effects or Filmora effects)

- Familiarity with teleprompter-style talking-head footage

- Vertical-first content experience (Reels/TikTok)



THE AESTHETIC



Clean. Warm. Credible. Not flashy. Think: calm authority, subtle motion, typography that adds meaning rather than noise. References: Andrew Huberman Lab, Mark Hyman, Sam Harris. Healing content that looks like it was made with intention.

title: Land Entitlement Project Assistant
description:
About Us



We are a South Florida-based land entitlement firm specializing in platting, zoning coordination, and development approvals across Miami-Dade, Broward, and surrounding municipalities.



Our work requires precision, persistence, and strong coordination with local agencies. We are growing and looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to help manage project tracking and ensure consistent follow-ups so nothing falls through the cracks.





Role Overview



This role is focused on tracking deadlines, managing follow-ups, and maintaining organization across multiple active projects.



You will act as a key support role to ensure all projects continue moving forward by proactively monitoring timelines and communicating with agencies.



This is not a passive admin role—we are looking for someone who is organized, proactive, and takes ownership of tasks.





Key Responsibilities



Project Tracking & Organization

* Maintain and update a Master Project Tracker (Excel or Google Sheets)

* Track multiple active projects (plats, waivers, LOAs, etc.)

* Monitor deadlines, submissions, and required follow-ups

* Ensure all project information is accurate and up to date



Follow-Ups & Communication

* Send professional follow-up
s to municipalities, agencies, and consultants

* Track all outgoing and incoming communications

* Schedule and track follow-up intervals (typically every 3–5 business days)

* Escalate delays, missing responses, or issues when needed



 & Administrative Support

* Monitor a shared inbox or assigned
 account

* Draft clear, professional
 responses

* Organize
 threads and maintain communication records

* Assist with scheduling and coordination when required



Reporting & Accountability

* Provide a weekly summary of:

    * Follow-ups sent

    * Responses received

    * Outstanding items

* Flag any risks, delays, or unclear responses promptly





Required Skills & Qualifications

* Strong written English (clear, professional communication)

* Extremely detail-oriented and organized

* Ability to manage multiple tasks and timelines simultaneously

* Experience with Excel or Google Sheets

* Reliable internet connection and consistent availability

* Ability to follow structured processes (SOPs)



Preferred (Not Required)

* Experience working with U.S.-based clients

* Background in real estate, construction, or permitting

* Experience as a project coordinator or executive assistant





Work Schedule

* Monday–Friday

* Must be available for at least 4 hours overlap with Eastern Time (U.S.)





Compensation

* Based on experience

* Opportunity for long-term role and increased responsibility





Growth Opportunity

This role has the potential to grow into a long-term position with increased responsibility, including deeper involvement in project coordination and client communication.





Important Instructions (Application Filter)



To be considered, please:

1. Use the subject line: “Tracking is everything”

2. Answer the following:

3. Provide a short sample
: Write a professional follow-up
 asking for a status update on a pending application. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.





What We’re Really Looking For



Someone who:

* Is proactive, not reactive

* Notices when something is missing or overdue

* Communicates clearly and consistently

title: Affiliate Sales Rep (Remote – Warm Leads Provided)
description:
Job Description

Must have EXPERIENCE with Sales. 

We are looking for experienced, high-performance sales closers to join our remote call center team. This is not cold calling — you will be speaking with warm leads who have already shown interest in our products (abandoned checkouts, past customers, and subscribers).



This role is for someone who knows how to take control of a conversation, build trust quickly, handle objections, and confidently close. Your primary responsibility is simple: convert interest into sales. You will be expected to follow a proven script while also being able to adapt in real-time to each customer and drive the conversation toward a purchase.



You’ll also have the ability to send customers your personal affiliate link or discount code to complete purchases, giving you full control over your earning potential.



We sell high-demand wellness products with strong conversion rates, meaning the opportunity to earn is directly tied to your ability to close. If you’re competitive, money-driven, and know how to turn warm leads into revenue consistently, this is the role for you.



This is a performance-based opportunity with serious earning potential for the right person.



What You’ll Be Doing



Calling warm leads (no cold calling)

Following a simple, proven script

Handling basic objections and closing sales

Sending your affiliate link/discount code via text if needed

Upselling additional products when appropriate

title: Sales & Operations Coordinator| Cleaning Company|$6-8 USD per hr
description:
Job Title: Sales & Operations Coordinator

Location: Remote

Schedule: Full-Time | Wednesday–Sunday | 40 hours/week



About Us:

We are  a fast-growing, family-run residential and commercial cleaning company based in Bellevue, Washington. We pride ourselves on delivering high-quality, dependable service with a personal touch. As we continue to expand, we're looking for a highly organized and adaptable Sales & Operations Coordinator to help support our day-to-day operations and keep things running smoothly behind the scenes. We are a small team but a mighty team and love to have fun and celebrate our wins.



Position Overview:

You will work closely with our Operations Manager to ensure that schedules, systems, and communications are running efficiently. You’ll be the behind-the-scenes support that makes everything work - from rescheduling cleans and entering bookkeeping data to coordinating Google Business posts and managing internal team milestones.



This is a full-time, Wednesday - Sunday role. You’ll take the lead on operations support Saturday and Sundays, and assist the Operations Manager Wednesday through Friday. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, flexible in a fast-changing environment, and able to prioritize daily responsibilities with confidence and clarity.



Key Responsibilities:



Scheduling & Client Support



Help manage and update cleaning schedules



Confirm cleaner availability and job readiness



Assist with rescheduling requests



Manage and update Eric's calendar (cleaning team field supervisor)



Communicate with cleaners and with clients via phone as needed







Team Support & Internal Ops:



Upload and organize before/after cleaning photos



Track team birthdays, anniversaries, and milestones



Coordinate and schedule interviews with new applicants



Handle new hire paperwork and onboarding tracking







Bookkeeping & System Maintenance:



Perform accurate data entry for basic bookkeeping tasks



Ensure all data is current and ready for reporting







Marketing & Review Support:



Coordinate Google Business Profile (GBP) posts



Send post-clean review requests to clients via text/email



Ideal Candidate:



Has 1–3 years of administrative or operations experience (bonus if it’s in a service-based or remote company and bonus if any bookkeeping experience)



Strong written and verbal communication skills



Extremely organized with excellent follow-through



Self-starter who can handle repetitive tasks and still keep an eye on the big picture



Flexible and able to shift gears quickly when priorities change



Comfortable with remote tools (Google Workspace, Slack, BookingKoala, GoHighLevel, etc.)



Compensation & Hours:



Full-time, 40 hours/week (Wednesday through Sunday)



Flexible working hours, though availability during core business hours (9am–5pm PST) is required



Competitive pay based on experience



Room for growth in operations and team leadership



Benefits:

Monthly profit-sharing bonuses after 3 months of full employment



Bonuses for closed sales (structure TBD based on candidate experience)



One week of paid vacation after 6 months



Paid holidays: Christmas Day, Thanksgiving, New Year’s Day + your choice of one national holiday



Extra day of pay on your birthday ????



13th-month bonus issued in December 



Annual performance reviews + raise opportunities



The chance to grow long-term in a supportive, family-run company

title: Static Ad Creator – Meta Ads (DTC / Direct Response)
description:
We run performance-driven DTC brands and we're looking for a Static Ad Creator who lives and breathes direct response.

This is not a design job. Nobody here cares how pretty your portfolio looks. We care about one thing: do your ads make people stop, click, and buy? If the answer is yes — and you can prove it — keep reading.



What You'll Be Doing

You will receive angles, hooks, and references. Your job is to turn them into static ads that convert. You will produce multiple variations per concept, adapt creatives across Feed, Stories, and Reels, and iterate fast based on feedback and data. Speed and output quality both matter here.



Who This Is For

You have real experience creating ads for eCommerce or DTC brands — not mockups, not spec work, actual ads that ran and were tested. You understand why some ads convert and others don't. You can take direction, execute without hand-holding, and you know what CTR and CPA mean without having to Google them.



AI Is Not Optional

We use AI across the entire creative workflow — GPT for hooks and copy, Nano Banana and Higgsfield for image generation, and whatever else helps us move faster and test more. If you're not already using AI tools daily to produce creatives, this role is not for you.



How You Get Paid

Project-based, not a fixed salary.

Base rate: $15 per concept (3 creatives)

+$10 bonus if the ad hits KPI within 7 days

+$50 bonus when it reaches $2,500 in spend



Our best creators consistently earn more in bonuses than base pay. Top performers get more work and higher rates. Hours are flexible with long-term potential for the right person.



How to Apply

Start your message with the word PERFORMANCE — if it's missing, we won't read it.

Then include:

What ads you've created and where they ran

Which brands you've worked with

Why you think your ads perform well

Which AI tools you use regularly

No real examples means no reply.

title: Senior Unity Developer / Mobile Games (2D)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a Senior Unity Developer for a Mobile Game Studio building casual board, word, and free-to-play simulated casino games. In this role, you will design, build, optimize, and maintain high-quality mobile game features across live titles and new prototypes.



You will work closely with product, design, art, and backend teams to deliver polished gameplay experiences, improve performance, support LiveOps initiatives, and help shape the technical direction of our Unity projects.



Key Responsibilities

* Unity Development: Build, maintain, and optimize mobile game features using Unity and C#.

* Gameplay Implementation: Develop core gameplay systems, UI flows, animations, rewards, progression, and game economy-related features.

* LiveOps Support: Implement in-app events, limited-time offers, content updates, and other LiveOps features for existing titles.

* Performance Optimization: Profile and improve game performance, memory usage, load times, and stability across iOS and Android devices.

* Architecture & Code Quality: Write clean, scalable, maintainable code and contribute to technical architecture decisions.

* SDK & Services Integration: Integrate and maintain analytics, ads, attribution, payments, social, and other third-party SDKs.

* Bug Fixing & Maintenance: Diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve gameplay, UI, platform, and production issues.

* Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, designers, artists, QA, and backend engineers to deliver high-quality features on schedule.

* Prototyping: Rapidly prototype new game ideas, features, mechanics, and UI/UX improvements.

* Technical Leadership: Mentor other developers, participate in code reviews, and help improve development processes.



Qualifications

* Professional Unity development experience, ideally in mobile games.

* Strong proficiency in C# and Unity development best practices.

* Experience building and shipping games for iOS and Android.

* Solid understanding of mobile performance optimization, memory management, and debugging.

title: SEO Virtual Assistant — Part-Time Ongoing (Champion Gym)
description:
Champion Gym is a martial arts, fitness, and leadership facility in Grande Prairie, Alberta, Canada. We have a complete SEO strategy and content system already built. We need a reliable part-time SEO VA to execute the ongoing content publishing and monitoring work each month.



This is NOT a strategy role. The strategy is fully documented. We need someone who follows clear instructions, implements content accurately in WordPress, monitors Google Search Console, and reports monthly.



We work with an AI content system that produces all strategy, keyword targeting, page briefs, and article drafts. Your job is implementation and monitoring — not strategy or content creation.



MONTHLY RESPONSIBILITIES:



Content Publishing (8–10 hrs/month)

- Upload 2 blog articles per month using provided drafts — format headings, add internal links, set SEO fields in RankMath

- Build 2–4 new landing pages per month from provided content briefs

- Ensure all published pages have correct title tags, meta descriptions, and focus keywords



Search Console Monitoring (2–3 hrs/month)

- Export monthly Search Results report from Google Search Console

- Identify pages gaining or losing impressions and clicks vs prior month

- Submit simple monthly report using our provided template



Basic Technical Checks (1–2 hrs/month)

- Check Coverage report for indexing errors

- Confirm newly published pages are indexed within 2 weeks

- Request indexing for new pages via URL inspection tool



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

- Complete content briefs and article drafts — no writing required

- Page template and monthly reporting template

- WordPress editor access and Google Search Console access

- Clear written instructions for every task

- 24-hour response time



REQUIRED SKILLS:

- Minimum 1 year SEO VA or WordPress content management experience

- Proficient with RankMath or Yoast SEO

- Can build WordPress pages from a written brief

- Has used Google Search Console — understands impressions, clicks, average position

- Detail-oriented and reliable — follows instructions precisely

- Fluent written English



TO APPLY — please include ALL of the following:

1. Describe your Google Search Console experience — what reports do you check and what do you look for?

2. Describe a time you uploaded or formatted a blog post in WordPress — what SEO settings did you configure?

3. Links to 1–2 websites you have done SEO work on

4. Your available hours per week and preferred schedule

5. Your hourly rate



Qualified applicants will be invited to a short paid test task before a final decision is made.

title: Job Title: Technical Tracking & Data Specialist (100% Remote) [About the Company]
description:
We are a global performance marketing agency driven by a "data-first" philosophy. Managing high-scale budgets across diverse industries, we believe that precision in measurement is the foundation of every winning campaign. We are looking for a technical architect who can transform raw signals into actionable insights, ensuring our media buying teams operate with 100?ta integrity.



[The Role]

As a Tracking & Data Specialist, you will be the backbone of our technical infrastructure. Your mission is to design, implement, and maintain a robust tracking ecosystem for Google Ads, Meta, and other premium platforms. We don’t just need someone to "paste code"—we need a strategist who understands the nuances of the evolving privacy landscape and cookieless future.



[Key Responsibilities]

Architecture & Deployment: Lead the end-to-end setup of Google Tag Manager (GTM) containers for both Web and Mobile environments.



Advanced Analytics: Configure and optimize Google Analytics 4 (GA4), including custom event tracking, enhanced measurement, and cross-domain solutions.



Privacy-First Solutions: Implement Server-Side Tracking to bypass browser restrictions and improve data accuracy.



Platform Integration: Deploy and troubleshoot Conversion API (CAPI) for
 and other major ad networks to ensure seamless data flow.



Data Visualization: Build automated, intuitive performance dashboards using Looker Studio or similar BI tools.



Technical Audits: Conduct regular audits to identify and resolve tracking discrepancies or broken "leaks" in the conversion funnel.



[Candidate Requirements]

Experience: 2+ years of specialized experience in Technical Tracking or Data Analytics within the Performance Marketing industry.



Tech Stack: Expert proficiency in GTM, GA4, SQL, and a solid understanding of JavaScript/HTML.



Modern Tracking: Hands-on experience with Server-Side GTM and first-party data strategies.



Precision: An obsessive attention to detail and a logical approach to troubleshooting complex technical bugs.



Communication: Strong English proficiency (written and verbal) to document technical setups and collaborate with international teams.



Independence: Proven ability to thrive in a remote-first environment with high levels of self-accountability.



[What We Offer]

100% Remote Freedom: Work from anywhere in the world with a flexible yet professional schedule.



Cutting-Edge Projects: Direct involvement in high-budget global campaigns using 2026’s latest ad technologies.



Competitive Compensation: A salary package that reflects your technical expertise and the value you bring to the team.



High-Growth Culture: A transparent, meritocratic environment where technical excellence is recognized and rewarded.



[Our Selection Process]

Initial Screening: Review of your CV and portfolio of previous tracking implementations.



Strategic Assessment: A deep-dive technical evaluation designed to test your problem-solving logic and strategic approach to data.



Technical Interview: A conversation with our lead strategists to discuss advanced solutions and cultural fit.

title: Social Media Video Editor / Content Director — AI-Forward Dental Brand
description:
We're 5D Smiles + WakeWell Sleep Solutions — a dental implant + sleep medicine practice in Downey, California. We're hiring a remote Social Media Video Editor / Content Director who knows AI tools and can think strategically — not just cut and assemble.



This is the opposite of "edit what we send you and take 3 days per video." We want a self-directing creator who can come up with ideas, find what's working in our niche, ship 5-10 short-form videos per week, and use every AI tool in their toolbelt to do it faster than the next editor.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO:

- Edit short-form vertical (TikTok, Reels, Shorts) for both 5D Smiles (dental implants) and WakeWell Sleep (oral-appliance therapy)

- Come up with the video IDEAS — not just edit what's sent

- Build hook strategies that work for our niche (dental + sleep)

- Use AI for ideation, scripting, captions, b-roll, voice cloning — whatever saves time

- Ship 5-10 finished videos per week, every week

- Track performance and iterate based on what hits



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- A real portfolio (we want to see your best work — link it in your application)

- Proof you've grown an audience yourself OR an account you've run (exact follower count + starting count)

- Daily AI use — Claude Code, ChatGPT, Runway, Pika, Sora, ElevenLabs, Submagic, Opus Clip, Descript

- Speed — we want to know your hours-per-60-second-video, exact

- Hook craft — the first 3 seconds determine if a video lives or dies, and you need to know why

- (Bonus) Graphics design ability — Photoshop, Canva, Figma — for thumbnails + tiles

- (Bonus) Account directorship — can you plan a whole month of content for one brand?



WHAT YOU'LL GET:

- Competitive pay weekly via EasyPay (range based on portfolio + speed + AI fluency, discussed once we see your work)

- Direct mentorship on the AI-creator stack — we use these tools every day at the practice

- Long-term role — we're building a content team, not hiring a one-off freelancer

- Real growth path: editor ? senior editor ? content director (manage other editors)

- Work with a CEO (Dr. Henry Qiu) who is genuinely AI-forward and ships fast — no committee, no slow approvals



HOW TO APPLY:

Apply at 



Our application is short. The most important questions:

- Drop a link to your best work

- Pitch us 5 video ideas if we gave you 30 days running our channels

- Tap any standout signals (own audience 10k+, viral hit 100k+, 50+ videos shipped, healthcare niche)



Plan ~10-15 minutes for the full apply flow. Strong candidates get a reply within 48hr.



— Dr. Henry Qiu, Founder

5D Smiles + WakeWell Sleep Solutions, Downey CA

title: Compliance and Shift-Booking Consultant (Australian Healthcare Company)
description:
Compliance and Shift-Booking Consultant. 

100% Remote Role. WFH. Full-Time. 40 hours per week. 

Night Shift- 10pm - 6am AEST. 

Market Leading Salary + Paid Leave + Bonuses. 

Must have full WFH set-up already in place. 



We are an Australian BPO seeking an experienced Compliance and Shift-Booking consultant for our client, an Australian Healthcare Recruitment Agency. The client supports healthcare and aged care facilities and hospitals across Australia. They specialise in supplying healthcare professionals including Registered Nurses, Enrolled Nurses and Personal Care workers. 



About the Role

We are seeking a highly organised and proactive Compliance & Shift Booking Consultant to manage the end-to-end compliance process for our healthcare professionals and serve as the dedicated out-of-hours consultant for shift coordination. 

Noting this is a night-shift role- 10pm - 6am AEST. 



This role is responsible for receiving and processing shift requests from clients, communicating directly with both clients and candidates to book and confirm shifts, and ensuring all active staff maintain full compliance. You will be the primary point of contact for out-of-hours shift needs, keeping operations running smoothly and responsively.



Key Responsibilities Include. 



Shift Booking & Coordination

• Receive and manage incoming shift requests via
 and the mainline phone.

• Act as the dedicated out-of-hours consultant, responding to shift needs outside of standard business hours.

• Contact suitable candidates within the relevant area to offer and confirm shifts.

• Communicate professionally with both clients and candidates throughout the booking process.

• Confirm shift bookings promptly and ensure all parties have accurate placement details.

• Maintain detailed and accurate records of all shift bookings and communications.



Compliance & Onboarding

• Manage the full compliance process for all active and incoming healthcare professionals.

• Ensure all required documentation is collected and verified before candidates commence work.

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of candidate documentation.

• Track expiry dates for registrations, certifications, and compliance items, and proactively follow up to keep staff work-ready.

• Guide candidates through onboarding and compliance requirements in a clear and professional manner.



Client & Candidate Communication

• Provide professional and timely communication to clients regarding shift coverage and confirmations.

• Build strong working relationships with candidates to ensure availability and responsiveness.

• Escalate unresolved issues or urgent matters to the appropriate recruitment consultant.



Roles You Will Book For

This role will primarily coordinate shifts for:

• Registered Nurses (RN)

• Enrolled Nurses (EN)

• Personal Care Workers (PCA / PCW)



Requirements

* Previous experience 2 + years with a healthcare recruitment agency or similar. 

* Previous experience with shift-booking or rostering responsibilities for healthcare workers. 

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

* Confidence with talking to candidates and clients over the phone. 

* Strong attention to detail and organisational ability.

* Ability to manage multiple bookings and tasks simultaneously.

* Strong administrative skills and ability to manage compliance documentation.

* Availability and reliability for out-of-hours shift coordination responsibilities.



Preferred Experience

• Experience in healthcare recruitment, workforce coordination, or rostering for an Australian healthcare company. 

• Experience within healthcare staffing or a similar coordination role.

• Familiarity with compliance requirements for healthcare professionals in Australia.



What Success Looks Like in This Role

• Shifts are booked and confirmed promptly with minimal gaps in coverage.

• Clients and candidates receive professional, timely communication at all times.

• All active staff are fully compliant and documentation is accurate and current.

• Out-of-hours requests are handled efficiently and with minimal escalation.

• Strong relationships built with both clients and the candidate pool.



How To Apply. 



* Please link your most updated CV. 

* Please provide a brief overview of your previous experience most relevant to this role. Highlight Australian experience. 

* Please provide an overview of your WFH set up- including device specifications, internet speed test, primary and secondary internet options and back up power options. 

* Your soonest available start date.

title: Dental AR Specialist — Patient Collection Calls ($4-5/hr) — AI-Assisted Prep, US Practice
description:
We're 5D Smiles — a dental implant practice in Downey, California — hiring a remote Dental AR Specialist to make patient collection calls (the empathetic kind, not the harassing kind).



This is the role for someone who can have a HARD conversation softly. You'll call patients about $500-$5,000+ balances, uncover why they haven't paid, and either set up a payment plan or get the money. The patients are real people in real situations — sometimes hardship, sometimes just busy, sometimes dispute. You need both empathetic firmness AND dental billing literacy.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO:

- Call patients about outstanding balances (30/60/90+ day aged AR)

- De-escalate disputes ("you guys overcharged me!")

- Negotiate payment plans (autopay, down payment, terms)

- Explain charges to patients in plain English (D2740 = "your crown")

- Document every call in Open Dental

- Coordinate with billing VA on insurance disputes

- Use AI to prep before each call — pull chart, EOB, prior notes (we'll teach you the workflow)



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- 2+ years collections, AR, or patient-facing billing experience

- Empathetic firmness — you don't get pushed around but you don't push patients around either

- Dental billing literacy (CDT codes, EOB reading, insurance basics) — strongly preferred but trainable

- Comfortable making outbound calls all day (this is a phone-heavy role)

- Fluent English (Spanish bonus — many of our patients are bilingual)

- Reliable internet, quiet workspace, USB headset

- Available 40hrs/week US Pacific time



WHAT YOU'LL GET:

- $4-5/hr USD weekly via EasyPay

- AI-assisted call prep workflow — we'll teach you how to use ChatGPT/Claude to research a patient's chart in 30 seconds before you dial

- Real growth path: AR Specialist ? Senior AR ? Billing Manager

- Stable long-term role at a growing US practice

- Work with a founder who actually answers your messages



HOW TO APPLY:

Apply at 



The application is a short voice screener with real patient scenarios:

- "I can't afford to pay" — walk through your exact response

- A sobbing patient ("my husband just died") — what do you do

- "You guys overcharged me, I'm not paying" — de-escalate

- Insurance dispute — explain a denial in plain English

- ...and a few more



Plan ~20-30 min. Strong candidates get a reply within 48hr.



— Dr. Henry Qiu, Founder

5D Smiles, Downey CA
