Start Date ASAP – immediate openings



About Us

EGR HOLDINGS LLC is a long-established US manufacturer of premium tire sealant products with a reputation built over decades in commercial, industrial, and fleet markets. We also have a consumer-facing brand targeting ATV/UTV, lawn & garden, and cycling audiences across e-commerce channels.

We operate a lean, fast-moving team across Amazon FBA/FBM, WooCommerce, and B2B commercial sales — and we're growing. We use modern AI-powered tools and expect our team to use them too.



Role Summary

We're looking for an experienced with 3+ years of a proactive, tech-savvy Digital Marketing VA who can take ownership of our day-to-day marketing execution across both brands. You will work directly with the founder and play a key role in growing brand presence, generating leads, and keeping our digital operations running smoothly.

This is not a data-entry role — we want a creative, self-directed marketer who thinks like an owner.



Key Responsibilities

Social Media Management

• Create, schedule, and publish content across Instagram,
, and TikTok

• Develop brand-appropriate copy, captions, and hashtag strategies for each platform and audience

• Engage with comments, DMs, and community interactions on behalf of the brand

• Monitor trends and surface content ideas aligned with ATV/UTV, lawn equipment, fleet, and cycling niches

• Track performance metrics and report on reach, engagement, and follower growth

Digital Design

• Create scroll-stopping graphics, reels, ad creatives, and branded templates using Canva (or similar tools)

• Design product feature posts, promotional banners, seasonal campaigns, and story/reel covers

• Maintain brand consistency across both visual identities

• Support Amazon listing image updates, A+ Content layout concepts, and WooCommerce banners

Lead Generation & Outreach

• Operate 
 for B2B prospecting — build targeted lists (tire shops, fleet operators, waste haulers, municipalities)

• Launch and manage
 sequences in 
 targeting commercial and fleet accounts

• Maintain CRM records, track pipeline activity, and update contact/account data

• Support outreach personalization and follow-up workflows

Influencer Marketing

• Research, identify, and vet micro-influencers in the ATV/UTV, outdoor, and cycling niches

• Manage outreach, gifting coordination, and relationship tracking for influencer partnerships

• Monitor influencer content, track results, and report on campaign ROI

• Maintain an influencer database and communications log

AI Platform Marketing & Operations

• Use Sintra AI and other AI marketing tools to accelerate content production and campaign execution – training the brain in these platforms are crucial to get it right from the start and make the continuing marketing process easier to handle daily

• Prompt-engineer AI tools for on-brand copy, social posts,
 drafts, and product descriptions

• Stay current on AI marketing trends and proactively recommend tools and workflows that improve efficiency

• Assist with building and refining AI-assisted workflows using available platforms

WooCommerce / E-Commerce Support

• Assist with product listing creation, updates, and maintenance on WooCommerce storefronts

• Upload product images, descriptions, pricing, and SEO metadata

• Support order management workflows, customer communications, and basic store troubleshooting

• Coordinate with Amazon Seller Central operations where applicable



Requirements

Must-Haves

• 3+ years of experience in digital marketing, social media management, or related role

• Hands-on experience with lead generation tools like 
 for prospecting and/or
 outreach

• Proficiency in Canva or equivalent graphic design tools

• Demonstrated experience managing business social media accounts (not personal)

• Familiarity with AI marketing tools (Sintra AI, ChatGPT, or similar)

• WooCommerce experience — product uploads, basic admin, order workflows

• Strong written and spoken English — you will write copy that goes live and speak with Agency in monthly meeting and
 communications

• Reliable internet, a dedicated workspace, and a proactive communication style

Nice-to-Haves

• Experience with Amazon Seller Central (FBA/FBM listings, account health)

• Influencer outreach or affiliate marketing experience

• Background in e-commerce, outdoor lifestyle, automotive, or industrial product brands

• Familiarity with Method CRM, Omnisend, or Zapier

• Bilingual in English and Spanish



What We Offer

• Direct access to the founder — no layers of management, fast decisions

• A real marketing role with ownership and creative latitude — not just task execution

• Exposure to both B2C e-commerce and B2B commercial sales environments

• Fully remote, flexible schedule with reasonable overlap hours

• Competitive pay commensurate with skills and experience

• Room to grow as the brands and team grow



How to Apply

To be considered, please send the following::

• Your updated resume or LinkedIn profile

• 2–3 examples of social media accounts or content you have managed

• A brief note (3–5 sentences) describing your experience with 
 or AI marketing tools

• Your desired rate and availability (full-time or part-time)



Applications without examples of past work will not be reviewed.

We move fast — strong candidates will be contacted within 48 hours.

title: Video Editor (Short-Form Content)
description:
We are looking for a creative and fast-paced Short-Form Video Editor to produce engaging content for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role focuses on creating scroll-stopping videos that capture attention within the first few seconds and keep viewers engaged until the end.



Key Responsibilities

Edit short-form videos (60 - 240 seconds) optimized for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts

Create attention-grabbing hooks within the first 1–3 seconds

Add captions, subtitles, emojis, and motion graphics to enhance engagement

Apply trending styles, cuts, sound effects, and pacing techniques

Repurpose long-form content into short, viral-ready clips

Stay updated with social media trends, formats, and viral editing styles

Collaborate with the team to align content with brand voice and strategy

Deliver multiple variations for testing and optimization



Required Skills & Qualifications

Proven experience in short-form video editing (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

Strong understanding of viral content structure and audience retention

Proficiency in tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar

Ability to create fast-paced, engaging edits with strong storytelling

Experience adding on-screen text, captions, and dynamic elements

Strong sense of timing, rhythm, and visual flow

Portfolio showcasing short-form or viral-style content



Preferred Qualifications

Experience working with content creators, brands, or agencies

Familiarity with trending audio, 
s, and editing styles

Basic motion graphics or animation skills

Understanding of content performance metrics (views, watch time, engagement)



What We’re Looking For

A creative editor who understands what makes content go viral

Someone who can think like a viewer and edit for retention

Fast, efficient, and able to produce high volumes of content

Detail-oriented with a strong eye for engagement and pacing

title: Long-Form Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Long-Form Video Editor to produce high-quality content for platforms such as YouTube, courses, podcasts, and branded videos.



This role requires strong storytelling ability, pacing, and structure to keep viewers engaged over longer durations while maintaining a polished and professional finish.



Key Responsibilities

Edit long-form video content (5–60+ minutes) for platforms like YouTube, webinars, podcasts, and courses

Structure content for clarity, engagement, and retention (intro, segments, transitions, outro)

Cut and refine raw footage into a cohesive narrative with strong storytelling flow

Add b-roll, music, sound effects, and visual elements to enhance the viewer experience

Incorporate basic motion graphics, titles, and lower thirds where needed

Ensure clean audio editing, syncing, and overall production quality

Collaborate with content creators and tea
mbers to align with brand and content goals

Manage revisions and deliver final outputs optimized for various platforms





Required Skills & Qualifications

Proven experience in long-form video editing

Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, and audience retention for longer content

Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

Experience with audio editing and sound balancing

Ability to organize and manage large amounts of footage

Strong attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines

Portfolio showcasing long-form content (YouTube, podcasts, courses, etc.)



Preferred Qualifications

Experience editing YouTube content or educational videos

Familiarity with YouTube retention strategies and content structure

Basic knowledge of color correction and color grading

Experience adding motion graphics or animations

Understanding of content optimization (watch time, audience retention)

title: Customer Success Manager
description:
IMPORTANT: Applications that do not follow our instructions below (7 steps) will not be reviewed.



About the role:



You'll manage our Skool community day-to-day — engaging with current members and new members, running onboarding calls, and guiding members to the right resources. Your primary success metric is retention: helping new clients feel supported, stay engaged, and get real results. When direct support is needed, you'll schedule calls with the community owner on their behalf.



Responsibilities:



- Engage with current members and new students daily inside the Skool community

- Conduct onboarding calls for new members and identify their sticking points in conversation and social skills

- Guide members to the right resources and escalate to the owner when needed

- Build and maintain clear SOPs for this role so it can be trained and replicated as the community grows

- Help cultivate a positive, fun, and engaging community environment



Requirements:



- Fluent in English (spoken and written).

- Strong communicator — comfortable managing different types of clients and personalities.

- Able to create clear, replicable SOPs.

- Comfortable working in the self-improvement / dating and social skills space.

- Skool platform experience is a plus, but not required — it's easy to learn.



How to apply:

Note: Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



1.
 your application to 

2. Use subject line: CSM - [Your Name] - [Date] · e.g. CSM - Michelle - April
. Include a brief intro about yourself and why you'd be a great fit.

4. Experience with Skool platform is a bonus so let us know if you have any

5. What is your expected monthly salary?

6. Answer: How would you handle a client who feels overwhelmed by the amount of content and doesn't know where to start ?

7. Optional: Include a video or voice recording introducing yourself — this helps us assess your communication style and client-interaction skills.

title: Amazon Account Manager
description:
** International Brand Launch and Onboarding in US Amazon **



Amazon Account Manager (Remote – Philippines | 2–3 Years Experience Required)



We are looking for a proactive, highly motivated, and hardworking Amazon Account Manager to join our growing team.



This is a remote position. We are seeking someone with strong hands-on experience in Amazon account management and Amazon advertising who is eager to learn, take ownership, and grow with the company. Additional training will be provided to further develop skills and performance.



Compensation:



Starting at ?40,000/month (up to ?80,000/month)

Higher salary available based on experience, performance, and quality of work

Performance-based raises and growth opportunities

Paid monthly



*Initially might be part-time*



Key Responsibilities:



Manage day-to-day operations of Amazon Seller/Vendor accounts

Optimize product listings (SEO, keywords, images, A+ content)

Manage Amazon PPC and advertising campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, etc.)

Monitor account health, performance metrics, and sales trends

Handle inventory planning and coordination

Support promotional strategies and overall account growth



Requirements:



2–3 years of proven Amazon account management experience

Strong experience with Amazon Ads / PPC campaign management

Familiarity with Seller Central (Vendor Central is a plus)

Strong analytical skills and attention to detail

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

Reliable internet connection and strong work ethic

Proactive, problem-solving mindset



We are willing to train and support the right candidate; however, solid Amazon account management and advertising experience is required.

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):

title: Short-Form AI Video Creator — Veo 3, Higgsfield, Nano Banana
description:
I run a
 health and wellness page built around an AI avatar, plus a network of additional
 and Instagram pages. I am looking for an experienced AI video creator who already knows how to use Veo 3 and Higgsfield and can produce high-quality content from day one with minimal direction.

This is not a training role. You must already know how to use the following tools:

Veo 3 — generating high-quality, photorealistic AI video content from written prompts, producing clean vertical short-form video ready to post

Higgsfield / Google Flow (Nano Banana 1, Nano Banana 2, Nano Banana Pro) — generating hyper-realistic AI images and video from written prompts, maintaining consistent character appearance across generations

CapCut — editing short-form vertical videos with text overlays, font styling, music syncing, color grading, and precise pacing. You can look at a reference video and replicate the editing style exactly



What the daily workflow looks like:

You receive a plain text script fro
. You handle everything from there — Nanobanana image generation, Veo 3 video creation, and CapCut editing — and deliver a minimum of 10 finished videos per day ready to post. The process is fast and repeatable once you know the style.



What I need from you:

Proven hands-on experience with Veo 3, Higgsfield, and CapCut — please include examples of your work

Deep familiarity with Nano Banana 1, Nano Banana 2, and Nano Banana Pro and when to use each

Ability to match an existing editing style precisely without being told every detail

High output capacity — 10+ videos per day, 7 days a week

Reliable, fast, and communicative

title: QA Analyst
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented Quality Assurance Analyst to monitor, evaluate, and improve agent performance through the review of recorded calls. This role is critical in ensuring adherence to scripts, strengthening sales effectiveness, and maintaining strict compliance with legal and company policies.



The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of call center operations, sales techniques, and regulatory compliance standards, with the ability to provide actionable feedback that drives measurable performance improvement.



Key Responsibilities

Review and evaluate recorded inbound and outbound calls for:

Script adherence

Sales effectiveness and objection handling

Compliance with legal, regulatory, and company policies

Score calls using internal QA scorecards aligned with KPIs (PPH, Order Size, CPH)

Identify trends, performance gaps, and coaching opportunities

Provide clear, actionable feedback to agents and leadership

Partner with Coaches and Operations Managers to improve agent performance

Ensure consistency and fairness in QA evaluations across all campaigns

Flag compliance violations and escalate when necessary

Assist in developing and refining QA forms, scripts, and training materials

Participate in calibration sessions to maintain scoring accuracy

Track and report QA metrics, including agent performance trends and improvement progress

Qualifications

2+ years of experience in call center QA, coaching, or operations

Strong knowledge of sales call structure and objection handling

Familiarity with compliance standards (TCPA, HIPAA, or similar preferred)

Experience with QA scorecards and performance metrics (PPH, conversion rates, CPH)

Excellent listening, analytical, and attention-to-detail skills

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Ability to deliver constructive feedback in a professional, motivating manner

Proficiency with call center tools (e.g., dialers like Five9, CRM systems, reporting tools)

Preferred Qualifications

Experience in outbound sales environments (telemarketing, healthcare, financial services)

Background in coaching or training agents

Familiarity with remote team environments and performance tracking tools

Key Competencies

Analytical Thinking

Attention to Detail

Coaching & Feedback Delivery

Compliance Awareness

Performance Improvement Focus

What We Offer

Competitive compensation based on experience

Opportunity to work with a high-performing, growth-driven team

Career advancement opportunities in QA, Training, or Operations

Flexible work environment (remote options available)

title: Client Coach (Coaching and Feedback) – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.

- Proactively follow up with clients to keep them on track and help them take action



Important Note: This role requires regular proactive follow-up with clients. If you're not comfortable with this, please consider carefully before applying - it's a core part of the position.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Viral Content & Trend Research Expert | $800/month (Full-Time)
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities

title: Amazon PPC Manager – E-commerce Growth & ROI Specialist
description:
Role Overview: We are seeking a highly analytical, aggressive, and results-driven Amazon PPC Manager to take full ownership of our Amazon advertising strategy and execution. In this role, you will not just be "managing campaigns"—you will be the driving force behind our profitability, revenue scaling, and market share domination.



We are looking for a strategic expert with a proven, verifiable track record of scaling Amazon brands while lowering Total Advertising Cost of Sales (TACoS) and maximizing Return on Ad Spend (ROAS). If you are a problem-solver who thrives on data, scaling budgets profitably, and measurable outcomes, we want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities (What You Will Accomplish):



Drive Scalable Revenue Growth: Architect, launch, and aggressively manage full-funnel Amazon advertising campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display, and Amazon DSP) to maximize daily sales velocity and net profit.

Relentless Optimization: Continuously audit and optimize bids, search terms, and targeting strategies to achieve aggressive target ACoS and TACoS. You will cut wasted spend with precision negative keywords while scaling winning campaigns.

Keyword & Competitor Domination: Execute deep-dive keyword research and competitor analysis to identify profitable gaps, win top-of-search placements, and aggressively defend our brand share against competitors.

Strategic Campaign Architecture: Build and refine advanced campaign structures (e.g., search term isolation, auto-campaign harvesting, and custom budget allocation based on product life cycles and profitability).

Actionable Reporting & Forecasting: Go beyond basic metrics. Deliver weekly performance insights detailing critical KPIs (Spend, Sales, ROAS, ACoS, TACoS, CTR, CVR) accompanied by proactive action plans and growth forecasts.

Inventory Alignment: Collaborate closely with the inventory team to align ad spend with stock levels—aggressively pushing overstock inventory while throttling or pausing campaigns to avoid stockouts on top-sellers.

A/B Testing & Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO): Continuously test ad copy, custom creative assets, video ads, and storefront traffic to improve Click-Through Rates (CTR) and overall Conversion Rates (CVR).





Required Skills & Qualifications:



Experience: Minimum 3–5 years of hands-on experience independently managing high-volume Amazon PPC budgets ($50k - $100k+/month spend).

Proven Track Record: Tangible history of scaling accounts while maintaining or improving profitability targets. (Note: You will be required to share your best case studies).

Technical Mastery: Deep, up-to-date understanding of the Amazon A9 Ranking Algorithm, Amazon Campaign Manager, Brand Analytics, and advanced targeting features.

Strategic Mindset: Proactive problem-solver who does not wait to be told what to do. You stay ahead of Amazon’s frequent platform updates and terms of service changes.





Performance KPIs (How Your Success Will Be Measured):



Overall Revenue Growth at the brand level.

Strict adherence to benchmark TACoS (Total ACoS) and target ROAS.

Increased organic ranking velocity driven by targeted PPC conversions.

Reduction of wasted ad spend (Zero-sale search term mitigation).





Compensation & Perks:



Pay Rate: HIGHLY NEGOTIABLE. We believe in paying top dollar for top talent. Compensation will be tailored to your experience, direct track record, and the results you can deliver. We are open to a strong base salary, performance-based profit-sharing, or commission structures for the right A-player.



Fully remote work environment with flexible working hours.



Opportunity to lead growth for an ambitious and rapidly expanding brand.



How to Apply: Please submit your resume along with a brief cover letter. With your application, you must include your best case studies detailing your past performance (e.g., how you successfully scaled an account, improved ROAS/ACoS, and the specific strategies you implemented to achieve those results).

title: Video Editor
description:
We're looking for kind warriors.

Growth-minded. Quality-obsessed. Team-first.

About Us

Loveless Social is a fashion/ lifestyle influencer. We create short- and long-form video content that performs. We work fast, we have high standards, and we hold each other accountable.



What You'll Do

Edit short-form Reels and TikToks from raw footage to final delivery. That means color grading, audio enhancement, captions, pacing, and storytelling. You'll follow our SOP, hit your deadlines, and communicate clearly when something's off.

Revisions turned around within 24 hours. Color graded using our LUT workflow. Captions styled in Satoshi. No submitting work you haven't fully watched yourself. Output expectations will be set based on video type and discussed during onboarding.

Fill out this form





Applications submitted without a completed form will not be considered.

title: AI Video Editor - Marketing Manager  (Performance Pay + Free AI Training)
description:
BOUT US:

 

We're a European DTC brand scaling fast on Meta and TikTok across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Germany. Our creative output is the engine of our growth, and we need a sharp video editor to plug in and ride the wave with us.

 

================================================================

 

THE OPPORTUNITY:

 

This isn't a typical editing gig. It's a long-term play with real upside.

 

We're hiring someone who'll start as our video editor (10-20 hrs/week) and step into a full-time Marketing Manager seat within 6-12 months. If you've got drive, curiosity, and a real interest in performance marketing — keep reading.

 

THE TRAJECTORY:

 

- Months 1-3: Video Editor (10-20 hrs/week) — execute briefs, sharpen your AI workflow

- Months 3-6: Senior Editor + Creative Strategist — pitch concepts, shape hooks, influence direction

- Months 6-12: Marketing Manager (full-time) — run campaigns, lead the creative pipeline, report on results

 

THE PAY:

 

- Base: $4 USD/hour

- Performance bonuses: When your ads deliver strong ROAS, you earn extra. The better your work, the bigger your check. Simple as that.

- Free AI training during the trial: Day one, you get full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram content (
) — arguably the sharpest AI video training out there. Whether or not we end up long-term, those skills are yours to keep.

 

If you want to be paid for output, not for clocking hours, this works. Strong editors earn well above the base.

 

================================================================

 

THE WORK:

 

- Short-form video ads (15-60s) for Meta and TikTok

- AI-driven ad creative using Higgsfield, Runway, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen

- Multiple hook variations per video — we test relentlessly

- Localization: ads run in English, Dutch, and German. Translations come with the brief — you handle voice-over, subtitles, and clean delivery using AI tools.

- Quick turnarounds and rapid iteration based on live performance data

 

================================================================

 

WHY THIS ROLE STANDS OUT:

 

- Real growth path: editor today, Marketing Manager in under a year

- Performance bonuses tied directly to your output

- Free Franky Shaw training during the trial — yours regardless of outcome

- Briefs come fully prepped with translations

- Quick feedback loops and live data on what works

- Your edits run on real ad spend — you see exactly what they do

 

================================================================

 

YOU'RE A FIT IF:

 

- You already work with AI video tools (Higgsfield, Runway, Sora, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.)

- You've cut short-form content for social

- You can find sharp B-roll, stock, and reference material

- Your English is solid

- You can turn a video around in 24-48 hours

- You're okay with $4/hour base + bonuses (this isn't the role if you need a high upfront rate)

- You want to grow, not just clock in

 

If you're reading this and you're NOT an AI type: Pina Colada (in google forms)

 

================================================================

 

HOW TO APPLY — TASK FIRST, RESUME NEVER:

 

We don't read resumes. We judge work. Complete the task below if you want a shot.

 

STEP 1 — Watch and download our winning founder video:

???? 

 

STEP 2 — The Task: 3 Dutch Hook Variations

 

Build 3 fresh Dutch (Netherlands) hook variations for the opening 3 seconds. Text overlays, B-roll cutaways, AI-generated clips, AI voice-over swaps — use whatever stops the scroll.

 

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING AT:

 

- Creativity — Did you bring something genuinely new, or just rewrite the text?

- Sourcing — Where did the visuals come from? Stock? AI? Custom? Quality is the bar.

- Localization — We run ads in English, Dutch, AND German. Show you can handle translations cleanly with AI tools (ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.). Translations come with every brief — your job is execution.

 

STEP 3 — Submit here:



 

The form is the only way in. Five minutes to fill out once the task is done. You'll upload your 3 hooks and answer quick questions on experience, availability, and goals.

 

================================================================

 

WHAT'S NEXT:

 

If your task lands, you're in for a paid 2-week trial. From day one of the trial:

 

- Full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram training

- Real ad projects on your plate

- Direct feedback and mentorship

- A clear track toward the Marketing Manager seat

 

================================================================

 

DEADLINE: 3 days from today.

 

No task = no reply. If you skipped the task, you didn't read the post.

 

Let's go.

title: Graphic Designer + AI Video Generator + Video Editor
description:
We are an aggressively growing eCommerce and retail brand looking for a talented, creative, and fast-moving Graphic Designer, AI Video Generator, and Video Editor to join our team full-time.



We need someone highly skilled in graphic design, Amazon/eCommerce product visuals, video editing, and AI video generation tools. The ideal candidate must be creative, detail-oriented, responsive, and able to produce high-quality visual content quickly.



This is a real, long-term job opening for someone who wants to grow with a fast-scaling brand.



About the Role

You will be responsible for creating high-converting visual content for Amazon listings, eCommerce platforms, TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, YouTube, TikTok Shop, Meta ads, and Amazon A+ Premium Content.



A major part of this role involves turning static product images into dynamic, engaging video content using motion graphics, AI video tools, camera movement effects, and professional video editing techniques.



You should be comfortable working with tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Canva, Illustrator, and AI video generation platforms such as Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, VEO 3.1, or similar tools.



Key Responsibilities

Design high-quality Amazon product images, including hero images, infographics, lifestyle images, and comparison charts.

Create Amazon A+ Content and Storefront graphics aligned with brand guidelines.

Ensure all Amazon visuals meet image requirements, including dimensions, white background, clarity, and quality standards.

Edit and retouch raw product photos to improve visual appeal.

Create packaging, labels, and other branding materials when needed.

Research competitor listings and design trends to improve listing performance.

Create video ads and product videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, YouTube, TikTok Shop, and Meta campaigns.

Transform static product images into dynamic videos using animation, parallax effects, simulated camera angles, 3D movement, motion graphics, and transitions.

Generate, edit, and refine AI video content using VEO 3.1, Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, or similar AI video tools.

Turn product images, text prompts, and brand assets into engaging, high-converting video ads.

Create multiple hooks and ad variations for A/B testing.

Add captions, text overlays, trending audio, sound design, color grading, and seamless transitions.

Collaborate with the marketing, product, and creative teams to understand product features and selling points.

Iterate quickly based on feedback fro
dia buyers and performance data.

Maintain an organized workflow and deliver projects on time.

Stay updated with Amazon trends, eCommerce shopper behavior, social media trends, AI video tools, and best practices for digital advertising.

Be responsive to urgent messages and communication during work hours.

Work efficiently. Fast, high-quality output is rewarded.

Requirements

Proven experience as a Graphic Designer, Video Editor, or AI Video Creator, preferably for Amazon, eCommerce, or retail brands.

Strong portfolio showing Amazon product images, eCommerce graphics, video ads, and AI-generated video content.

Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro, Illustrator, Canva, and preferably After Effects.

Experience with AI video tools such as Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, VEO 3.1, Sora, Runway, or similar platforms.

Strong understanding of prompt engineering for AI video generation.

Ability to turn still images into dynamic video content using motion, camera simulation, and animation techniques.

Good understanding of social media ad pacing, hooks, retention, and eCommerce conversion-focused creatives.

Basic knowledge of product photography and photo retouching is a plus.

Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and understanding of visual hierarchy.

Ability to follow instructions accurately and adapt quickly to revisions.

Strong time management and organizational skills.

Good English communication skills.

Must be available for 30-40 hours per week.

Having your own repository of stock images/assets is a plus.

Mandatory Portfolio Requirement

You must provide a portfolio or demo reel that includes:



Amazon or eCommerce product images.

Video ads or product videos.

Examples of videos created from static images using camera movement, parallax, animation, or motion graphics.

AI-generated video samples using tools such as VEO 3.1, Kling, Seedance 2.0, Nano Banana Pro, Higgsfield, Runway, Sora, or similar.

Applications without a relevant portfolio will not be considered.



Salary & Payment

Monthly Salary: PHP 75,000 - PHP 80,000



Payment Schedule: Bi-weekly payments



Performance-based bonuses are available for:



Number of images, videos, or design outputs created.

Speed and turnaround time.

Quality of work and performance.

Accuracy, creativity, and understanding of instructions.

Strong brand guideline execution.

High-performing ad creatives.

What We Offer

Full-time, long-term position.

Work-from-home flexibility.

Bi-weekly payment schedule.

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling eCommerce and retail brand.

Creative freedom to test new design styles, video formats, and AI tools.

Performance-based rewards for fast and high-quality work.

How to Apply

Please send the following:



A brief introduction about your experience with graphic design, eCommerce visuals, video editing, and AI video generation.

Your portfolio or demo reel.

Specific examples of videos created from static product images.

Specific examples of AI-generated videos using VEO 3.1 or similar AI tools.

Your expected full-time monthly salary or hourly rate.

Include the word “Scale” in the first line of your application so we know you read the full job post.

Full system optimization

You’re not starting from zero. You’re completing and optimizing an existing, well-documented system.



The Project Scope



The Project Scope (3-5 Weeks)

WEEK 1: AUDIT & INTEGRATION 

Days 1-5: Complete System Assessment



Review technical handoff documents and systems



Audit GHL configuration pipelines, workflows, custom fields

Test all existing workflows end-to-end



Map all lead sources:

Referral partner list (identify all current partners)

Care In Homes integration points

Multiple websites with leads (map each source)

Paid account onboarding flow (Workers Comp, VA clients)

Identify missing API keys + integrations needed

Identify caregiver recruitment sources (Indeed, LinkedIn,
, etc.)



Deliver by Day 5:



Audit report — what's working, what's broken

Integration priority roadmap — which to build first

Lead source mapping document — all sources identified

 Caregiver recruitment strategy — sourcing channels + expected timeline



WEEK 2: RECRUITMENT + MARKETING AUTOMATION LAUNCH 

This is your PRIORITY week. Build the engines that will recruit caregivers + convert leads.



A. CAREGIVER RECRUITMENT ACCELERATION (Days 6-10)



Days 6-7: Setup Lead Sources



Indeed Integration



Connect Indeed API to GHL

Auto-create caregiver contact on application

Auto-assign to Ava screening call (24/7)

Track: Applications, Screening, Interviews

LinkedIn Job Posting



Week 3-5

Website rebranding and automation revisions



What You'll Deliver

 Complete caregiver recruitment system (Indeed, LinkedIn,
, job boards) 

 Marketing automation for all lead sources (referral, Care In Homes, websites)

 5 active
 sequences in Mailchimp with 20%+ open rates

 All 8 pending workflows live and tested

 Ava screening fully operational for all sources 

 Recruitment dashboard tracking real-time pipeline

Lead source performance dashboard with daily updates

IVR phone system fixed with 3-number architecture

Website fully rebranded with caregiver recruitment focus 

Complete SOP documentation with video training 

Admin manual for independent team management 

Team trained and running systems without contractor



How to Apply



Required Submission:



Cover Letter (one page)



1. Tell us about your best GHL automation project

2. Why you’re excited about healthcare/home care automation

3. Your experience with workflow building + integrations

4. Are you interested in potentially staying on as Operations Director if we scale?

Portfolio / Case Study (one completed project)





Quick Questions 



Tell us about a time you debugged a broken GHL workflow. What was the issue? How did you fix it?

Have you built workflows that integrate with external APIs (Indeed, Zapier, etc.)? Which ones?

What’s your experience with website rebuilds / rebranding? (Not required, but helpful)

Describe your approach to training a team on a new system.

title: Rental Operations Coordinator (Rental Car Company-Remote)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT FIT YOU



Apex Level is seeking a detail-oriented and assertive Rental Operations Coordinator to manage renter communications, payment tracking, lead follow-up, and account enforcement for our growing rental fleet.



This role is responsible for maintaining account compliance, following up with leads quickly, ensuring clear and professional communication so clients fully understand our rental process, sending payment reminders, applying late fees per contract, and coordinating intake screening for new renters.



We are looking for someone professional, firm, organized, and comfortable enforcing company policies consistently. You must be confident communicating boundaries, handling client conversations professionally, and following structured processes.



Responsibilities:



• Respond to ad leads & pre-qualify applicants

• Send intake forms & coordinate bookings

• Order background checks & MVR reports

• Verify driver’s licenses

• Send rental agreements for signature

• Track weekly payments

• Send payment reminders

• Apply late fee notices per policy

• Maintain renter ledger spreadsheet

• Escalate delinquent accounts to management



Training & Tools



You will be fully trained to use:



• RentCentric (rental management software)

• GoHighLevel (CRM & communication platform)

• Adobe Acrobat (document preparation & signatures)

• Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Drive)

• Additional SaaS tools used for fleet management and compliance



Previous experience is a plus but not required. You must be comfortable learning software quickly.



Compensation & Growth



Starting pay: $3–$5/hr (based on experience)



After 90 days of consistent performance and reliability, compensation will automatically increase by $1 per hour, contingent on meeting performance expectations and maintaining strong attendance and communication standards.



Additional raises and long-term growth opportunities are available as the company scales.



Requirements:



• Excellent written English

• Strong attention to detail

• Comfortable enforcing rules professionally

• Experience with Google Sheets

• Reliable internet

• Availability during U.S. business hours

• Ability to follow structured communication policies



Hours:



30–48 hours per week



How To Apply



To be considered, you must
 the following to:







Include:

• Your full legal name

• Your resume (PDF format preferred)

• A 1-minute (or less) video introducing yourself and explaining your work history and experience handling customer communication



Applications missing any of the above requirements will not be reviewed.

title: Web & UX Designer (Figma + WordPress)  / Contract
description:
Web & UX Designer (Figma + WordPress) –Contract

About Us



We are a performance-driven digital marketing agency focused on building high-converting websites for local businesses in home services and healthcare.



Our work is not just design. It is revenue-focused. Every website must be fast, structured, and built to generate leads.



The Role



We are looking for a Web & UX Designer who can own the entire website process from concept to launch.



This is not a “just design” role. You will be responsible for execution, coordination, and final output quality.



You must be comfortable:



Designing in Figma

Building in WordPress

Managing developers when needed

Ensuring the final product performs (UX, speed, SEO, conversion)

What You’ll Do

Design & Build

Create wireframes, mockups, and full prototypes in Figma

Build responsive WordPress websites based on your designs

Ensure mobile-first and conversion-focused layouts

Project Ownership

Manage full website lifecycle from start to launch

Coordinate with strategists, copywriters, and developers

Keep projects on timeline and within scope

Quality & Performance

Optimize websites for:

UX and clarity

Page speed

SEO structure

Conversion (calls, forms, CTAs)

Client Communication

Present designs and rationale clearly

Collect feedback and manage revisions

Push back when needed to protect quality

What We’re Looking For

Strong portfolio of modern, conversion-focused websites (Figma required)

3+ years building WordPress websites (not just themes, real builds)

Clear understanding of:

Layout hierarchy

User behavior

Conversion principles

Strong communication and project management skills

Ability to work independently and take ownership

Bonus Points

SEO knowledge (site structure, internal linking, schema basics)

CRO experience (landing pages, A/B thinking)

Basic HTML/CSS understanding

Experience working with page builders (Bricks, Elementor, etc.)

SOP & Execution Responsibility (Critical)



You will be responsible for creating and following a structured workflow.



Website Project SOP (Start to Finish)

1. Discovery & Planning

Review intake form and client goals

Define:

Target audience

Core services

Conversion goals

Create sitemap and page structure

2. Wireframing (Figma)

Create low-fidelity wireframes

Focus on structure, not visuals

Validate:

CTA placement

Content flow

User journey

3. High-Fidelity Design

Apply branding, colors, typography

Design full pages (desktop + mobile)

Ensure consistency across all pages

4. Development (WordPress)

Build pages based on approved designs

Use clean structure:

Reusable sections

Proper spacing system

Implement:

Forms

Tracking (basic readiness for GTM)

Speed optimization basics

5. Developer Management (if involved)

Provide clear Figma specs and instructions

Review builds against design (pixel-level check)

Validate:

Responsiveness

Speed

Functionality

Send structured feedback (not vague comments)

6. QA Checklist Before Launch

Mobile responsiveness (all breakpoints)

Page speed (Core Web Vitals baseline)

SEO basics:

Meta titles/descriptions

H1–H3 structure

Internal linking

Forms working and tested

Call tracking / analytics readiness

No broken links

7. Launch

Final review with team

Push live

Monitor first 48 hours for issues

8. Post-Launch Optimization

Identify UX issues (drop-offs, friction points)

Suggest improvements:

CTA placement

Content clarity

Layout adjustments

Iterate based on performance

Why Join Us

Small, focused team with high standards

Real ownership over projects

Opportunity to grow into a lead role

Flexible and remote-first

Work on projects that directly impact client revenue

How to Apply



Send:



Portfolio (must include Figma + live websites)

Resume

Short note explaining:

How you approach a website project from start to finish

Example of a project you owned completely

title: Experienced WordPress Designer
description:
About the Role

We're looking for an experienced WordPress designer to join our team for the long haul. This is an hourly contract position with the potential to become a consistent, ongoing role for the right person. We have steady work and want to build a relationship with a designer who can grow with us.

What You'll Be Doing



Designing, building, and maintaining WordPress websites

Customizing themes, layouts, and page designs to match brand standards

Collaborating directly with our team on active projects

Iterating quickly based on feedback

Ensuring sites are clean, responsive, and conversion-focused



What We're Looking For



Proven WordPress experience — you've built real sites, not just edited templates

Strong design eye — UX, layout, typography, and visual hierarchy

Quick, clear communication — we move fast and need someone who responds quickly during work hours

Intuitive problem-solver — able to take a vision and run with it without heavy hand-holding

Reliable availability between 9 AM – 5 PM PST (Monday through Friday)

Comfortable working hourly and tracking time honestly



Nice to Have



Experience with Elementor, Divi, or other major page builders

Knowledge of conversion-focused design (DTC / e-commerce)

WooCommerce experience

Basic familiarity with custom CSS / light development



How to Apply

Book a short interview call with me here: 
 

Please bring to the call:



A list of WordPress websites you've designed and built (live URLs preferred)

Be ready to walk me through 2–3 of your favorite projects and your role in them



Compensation

Hourly rate — competitive and based on experience. Discussed on the call.

title: Accounts Receivable / Collections Specialist
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a highly organized, persistent, and detail-oriented individual whose primary responsibility is to ensure all completed jobs are paid in full and on time. This role is critical to maintaining cash flow and requires strong communication skills, accountability, and a results-driven mindset.



Key Responsibilities:



- Proactively contact customers immediately after project completion to collect outstanding balances

- Monitor all completed jobs daily to identify unpaid invoices

- Communicate with customers via phone, text, and
 to secure payment

- Clearly explain invoices, payment options, and resolve any payment-related questions or objections

- Coordinate with sales and operations teams to confirm job completion status and customer satisfaction

- Follow up consistently on overdue accounts until payment is received

- Document all customer interactions and payment updates in CRM (ServiceTitan)

- Process payments and ensure accurate record-keeping

- Escalate disputes or collection challenges to management when necessary



Performance Expectations:



- Maintain a high collection rate on completed jobs

- Minimize days outstanding (reduce AR aging)

- Ensure fast turnaround from job completion to payment collection

- Consistent daily follow-up activity with zero missed accounts



Qualifications:



- Strong communication and negotiation skills

- Comfortable having direct, payment-focused conversations with customers

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Self-motivated and persistent—does not let accounts slip through the cracks

- Experience in collections, accounts receivable, or customer service is preferred

- Familiarity with CRM systems (especially ServiceTitan) is a plus

title: Construction Accountant
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



Construction Accountant



Job Type: Full Time

Work Hours: 10:00 AM - 06:30 PM Pacific Time.

Salary: $1200 per month



* Job Overview: 

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Construction Accountant to support our construction projects by managing documentation, ensuring subcontractor compliance, and maintaining accurate financial records. In this role, you will assist with monthly invoicing, track contract values and change orders, collect and verify compliance documents, and keep project management systems updated. You will work closely with project managers, field teams, subcontractors, and clients to ensure smooth project operations, timely communication, and accurate documentation throughout each phase of the project.



* Key Responsibilities:

Assist with monthly subcontractor invoicing, including document review and accuracy checks

Collect, verify, and track lien releases, certificates of insurance (COI), W-9s, and other compliance documents

Monitor contract values, change orders, and budget adjustments, and update internal logs accordingly

Maintain organized project documentation, digital filing systems, and project folders

Update project management platforms (Procore) and accounting systems (Sage 100 Contractor) with current project data

Coordinate document flow between office teams, field staff, subcontractors, and clients

Ensure subcontractor compliance with contractual requirements prior to payment processing

Generate project reports, cost logs, and status updates as requested by the Project Manager

Support project kickoff activities, closeout documentation, and ongoing communication across all stakeholders

Assist with scheduling, meeting coordination, and various administrative tasks related to project operations



* Qualifications:

Previous experience in construction administration, project coordination, or a similar role

Strong understanding of construction documentation, billing processes, and compliance requirements

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, Outlook)

Experience using Sage 100 Contractor and Procore project management software (required or highly preferred)

Exceptional organizational skills and strong attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple deadlines and follow up proactively

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Ability to work effectively with project managers, field teams, subcontractors, and clients

Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with shifting priorities





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Executive Operations & Accountability Partner (2 Positions Open)
description:
I am the Managing Partner of Cire Homes, a high-growth Property Management firm. We are currently scaling operations for the 2026 World Cup and need two (2) elite Executive Assistants to join our core team.



Your primary mission is to be the "Guardian of my Time." You will not just manage my calendar; you will manage me. I need a partner who ensures that my professional goals and my personal obligations (family coordination and household projects) are executed with zero friction.



Key Responsibilities

1. Strategic Accountability & Task Management



The "Today List" Ownership: You will own our task management system (Notion/Todoist). You will synthesize a "Today List" every morning and check in throughout the day to ensure focus remains on the Top 3 priorities.



The "No-Crack" Policy: You will proactively follow up on every outstanding item—vendor quotes, guest rebates, or personal errands—until marked "Complete."



Goal Tracking: We will set weekly and monthly "Rocks" (Goals). You will track progress and alert me immediately if we are falling behind.



2. Proactive Calendar & Productivity Guarding



Defensive Scheduling: You don't just book meetings; you protect my energy. This includes time-blocking for deep work and ensuring buffers between property visits.



Meeting Execution: Ensure I have full context/briefings before every call and capture/execute all "Action Items" immediately afterward.



3. Research, Coordination & Logistics



Project Management: Act as the PM for all contractors (Maintenance, Soft-washing, Networking). You handle "The Chase"—scheduling, follow-ups, and confirmation of completion.



Lifestyle Orchestration: Manage recovery support schedules for my father and coordinate with household help (Chefs, Assistants) to ensure my personal life runs on autopilot.



Recruitment Hub: Manage the hiring pipeline for other roles. You will screen portfolios and manage "paid test" tasks so I only see the top 1% of talent.



4. Organization & Digital Systems



Zero-Knowledge Security: Maintain our filing system within encrypted storage, ensuring all records are filed correctly and backup protocols are executed perfectly.



Inbox Zero: Filter communications into "Action Required," "Handled," and "Reference." Draft responses to routine inquiries so the inbox never becomes a bottleneck.



Requirements

The "Type A" Personality: You are naturally obsessed with order, lists, and completion.



Experience: 3+ years as an Executive VA or Ops Assistant. You must have experience managing the life and business of a high-level executive.



Tech Stack: High proficiency in Task Management software (Notion/ClickUp), AI Productivity tools (Lindy, Zapier), and Google Workspace.



Reliability: Rock-solid internet and a "can-do" attitude toward complex problem-solving.



Schedule: Minimum 4–5 hours daily overlap with US Eastern Standard Time (EST).



Compensation & Benefits

Salary: $900 – $1,400 USD per month (Negotiable based on experience).



13th Month Pay: Standard annual bonus included.



Growth: This is a long-term role with a stable company and potential for performance-based bonuses tied to World Cup project milestones.



How to Apply (The Attention Test)

I only hire people with extreme attention to detail. If you miss any of these steps, your application will be ignored.



Subject Line: Must be "Accountability Partner - [Your Full Name]"



Portfolio: Include a link to your portfolio or a detailed summary of how you have managed an executive's productivity in the past.



The Interview Questions: Please answer the following:



What is your preferred system for keeping a busy client accountable to their goals?



Give me an example of a time you caught something "falling through the cracks" and fixed it before the client noticed.



What is your specific availability to work in the EST timezone?

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat !
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: Looking for a Mortgage Underwriter
description:
We are still looking for a Mortgage Underwriter (Remote)



We are seeking an experienced Mortgage Underwriter to join our growing team. This role involves underwriting complex mortgage loans outside of traditional agency guidelines.



Responsibilities:

 • Underwrite Non-QM loans (DSCR, bank statement, asset depletion, jumbo, interest-only)

 • Analyze borrower credit, income, assets, and collateral

 • Review and apply investor guidelines and overlays

 • Issue loan decisions (approval, conditions, denial)

 • Clear conditions and re-underwrite files as needed

 • Ensure compliance with ATR and regulatory requirements

 • Maintain accurate documentation and underwriting notes

 • Collaborate with internal teams to structure loans effectively



Requirements:

 • 3+ years of mortgage underwriting experience

 • Proven Non-QM underwriting experience

 • Strong understanding of alternative income analysis

 • Experience working with multiple investor guidelines

 • Ability to independently underwrite full loan files

 • Familiar with LOS systems (e.g., Encompass)

 • Strong attention to detail and decision-making skills



Performance Expectations:

 • Turnaround time: 24–72 hours

 • Handle 3–6 loans per day depending on complexity

 • Maintain high accuracy and low error rate



How to Apply:



Please send your resume and a brief summary of your experience.



IMPORTANT: Include the word “YELLOW” in the subject line of your application.

Applications that do not follow this instruction will be automatically ignored.

title: Full-time Entry Virtual Associate (VA) Positions. Philippines time zone. 260430
description:
This is an entry-level role, where the majority of knowledge and skills will be acquired through on-the-job training, paving the way for advancement to senior positions.



Are you seeking a full-time, long-term career that offers exceptional growth potential through advancement opportunities, along with a stable income and bonus incentives? Join our team if you have a keen eye for detail, an unwavering drive for productivity, and a strong sense of responsibility. If you possess self-motivation, assertiveness, and a strong work ethic, coupled with a positive outlook and the ability to excel in a fast-paced work environment, we invite you to reach out to us.



You will receive training and support for your work. Candidates without experience but willing to learn and grow are welcome.

This is for candidates who are keen to develop a professional career that allows you to work remotely and independently. There are career paths with promising future opportunities that have traditionally been accessible only through conventional means. However, our embrace of technology, good jobs are no longer restricted to traditional ways.



About Us

The business has collaborated with a highly acclaimed loan brokerage and independent financial advisory firm, along with several other partners, all of which are fully licensed by government authorities. We offer a diversified suite of financial services and solutions with a personalized approach.



With these partners, we have one of the largest, most-respected, and fastest-growing networks of advisers in the country. We provide sound and comprehensive financial advice at both individual and corporate levels.



Requirement

• Strong verbal and written English skills with a neutral accent.

• Knowledge of Chinese/Mandarin, whether verbal or written, is a significant advantage.

• Exceptional talent for natural conversation.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

• Owns a competent Windows computer/laptop and android mobile phone for work

• A dependable and consistent internet connection

• Consistent and reliable power supply without frequent outages.

• A distraction-free and quiet workspace.

• Utilizing a headset equipped with Noise Cancellation technology.

• Takes initiative and works independently to address challenges, consistently seeking solutions.



Other Matters

We will be communicating via various communication tools. There will be a probation period for one to three months, depending on your qualifications and experience, which is negotiable. Upon the completion of your probation period, you will become eligible for a 13th-month bonus, paid time off, and a range of employee benefits, including PhilHealth and the Social Security System. The annual performance bonus is determined by your key performance indicators (KPIs). You will follow the time zone of the Philippines. Among colleagues, your working hours may be arranged in rotation, including weekdays and weekends. A total work week of 40 hours. Your further potential salary growth will be based on your performance, which may be increased during the quarterly review.



Loan Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Engage with incoming leads primarily through WhatsApp on our business phone.

• Create comprehensive reports that incorporate inputs and details provided by clients.

• Create concise summaries and propose options for clients, utilizing templates for efficiency.

• Collaborate with the designated bankers to facilitate the processing of loan applications

• Schedule meetings with clients and bankers.

• Reach out to current clients as they approach the end of their loan lock-in period.

• Oversee client relationships and enhance processes through multiple CRM platforms.



Insurance and Investment Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Prepare the required documentation for the client's application, available in various systems.

• Reach out to clients through WhatsApp using our business phone, primarily to provide reminders and follow-ups.

• Utilize WhatsApp (business phone) as the main channel to engage clients and schedule appointments effectively.

• Craft client proposals utilizing the provided templates.

• Helping clients with insurance claims

• Contact insurers to obtain quotes and provide recommendations to clients.

• Oversee client relationships and streamline processes through a range of CRM systems.



Candidates who have shown capability and knowledge may be groomed towards senior roles or management roles.



Application

To apply for the job:

Please log in and click the link below to apply, and please follow the instructions.



There will be an assessment and a Microsoft Teams interview video call required, if you are shortlisted.
