title: Head of AI Outbound & Appointment Setting
description:
?? READ THIS FULLY BEFORE APPLYING. The subject line instructions at the bottom are a test of attention to detail. Applications that don't follow them will not be considered.



---



WHO WE ARE



Apex Media Lab is a performance-focused agency running AI-powered outbound systems for client acquisition. We use a full-stack cold outreach engine — AI personalization, video prospecting, multi-channel sequencing, and automated lead routing — to book qualified sales calls for our clients.



We're not looking for someone to just "run tasks." We're looking for someone who will OWN the outbound system and be accountable for results.



---



THE ROLE



We're hiring a Head of AI Outbound & Appointment Setting to oversee, manage, and continuously improve our entire outreach operation. This is a senior, results-accountable role. Your primary KPI: 15–20 qualified booked calls per month, consistently.



You will not be doing everything yourself — you'll be managing the system, the tools, and potentially a small support team. But you need to understand every piece of it deeply enough to troubleshoot, optimize, and scale.



---



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



- Full oversight of our cold outbound pipeline from lead sourcing to booked call

- Managing and optimizing our AI tool stack (Clay, Instantly.ai, Sendspark, HeyGen, ElevenLabs)

- Domain and
 infrastructure health: SPF, DKIM, DMARC, inbox rotation, deliverability monitoring

- Lead list building and enrichment via Clay + Apollo

- Sequence strategy, A/B testing subject lines and CTAs, improving reply and booking rates

- Managing inbox responses, routing warm leads, and ensuring show rates stay high

- Weekly reporting on pipeline metrics: sent, open rate, reply rate, meetings booked, show rate

- Identifying and fixing bottlenecks before they become problems



---



YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE



- Proven experience running or managing a cold
 / outbound appointment setting system

- Direct hands-on experience with: Clay, Instantly.ai, Apollo, Zapier

- Familiarity with AI video/audio personalization tools (Sendspark, HeyGen, ElevenLabs is a big plus)

- Strong understanding of
 deliverability: SPF, DKIM, DMARC, domain warm-up, inbox placement

- A track record of hitting appointment-setting targets — tell us your numbers

- The ability to work independently, manage priorities, and escalate problems proactively

- Excellent written English for managing outreach copy and inbox responses



---



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience managing or coordinating a small remote team

- Background in agency or B2B lead generation environments

- Familiarity with CRM tools (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar)



---



COMPENSATION & HOURS



- Full-time (40 hours/week)

- Salary: $800–$1,200/month depending on experience and demonstrated results

- Performance bonuses available for consistently hitting or exceeding call booking targets

- Remote, async-friendly with overlap during US Pacific/Mountain time preferred



---



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, your subject line MUST be:

"Outbound Lead - Apex Media Lab - [Your Name]"



In your message, please include:

1. Your experience with the tools listed above (be specific — what did you build or manage?)

2. The best outbound result you've achieved (calls booked, reply rates, volume managed)

3. Why you're confident you can hit 15–20 qualified calls/month



Applications without the correct subject line or without answers to the above will not be reviewed.

title: Admin VA
description:
Join The Collaborative Co. - a fast-growing boutique Virtual Assistant agency supporting small businesses, solo entrepreneurs, and service providers across Australia.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Virtual Assistant to support a group of psychology and allied health clinics in Australia. The clinics range from boutique practices to a high-volume online psychology clinic with 42 psychologists. Our client's team includes onshore staff and offshore VAs, and the goal is to consolidate all clinic support under one trusted, dedicated VA through The Collaborative Co.



The business is in an active growth phase. SOPs, clinic manuals, and FAQs are documented and training will be provided by on-site Practice Managers.



A win in the first 30 days looks like this: no excuses, job just getting done, clients supported, inbox close to zero daily, and proactively asking to help when quiet.



You will be the primary point of contact for patients and referring clinicians across multiple clinics, managing a high volume of calls, emails, and appointment workflows. This is not a role where you are expected to make independent decisions. The right approach when unsure is always: "I'm not sure, let me find out and call you back."





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Reception & client support

·       Answer incoming phone calls across all clinics (10/day for smaller clinics; 50–70 every 2 days for the large online clinic)

·       Manage and action emails, maintaining inbox close to zero daily

·       Book, reschedule, and cancel appointments

·       Upload referrals and call referrals to offer available appointments

·       Provide warm, professional client support including to patients presenting with mental health concerns

·       Conduct general client check-ins as required



Policy & escalation

·       Enforce the 24-hour cancellation policy and communicate late cancellation fees via email (no AI-generated correspondence)

·       Escalate issues to the relevant Practice Manager using clinic manuals and FAQs as a first reference

·       Proactively support other team members when capacity allows





TOOLS & SYSTEMS

Phone system:  WebEx 

Communication:   Voxer & Outlook 

Practice management:   Clinico, Galaxy, Zanda 

Productivity & access:   Google Workspace, Spreadsheets, LastPass, Australian VPN 





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

·       Calm under pressure, reliable, and consistently honest and transparent

·       Warm, empathetic, and kind in client interactions — including with people in emotional distress

·       Able to maintain professional boundaries with callers and redirect conversations appropriately

·       Knows when to problem-solve independently and when to escalate to a Practice Manager

·       Proactively communicates — over-communicates rather than under-communicates

·       Exceptional written English: professional, error-free, capable of drafting client-facing emails independently (5/5)

·       Exceptional spoken English: confident and professional on calls (5/5)

·       Strong customer service background in any industry

·       Comfortable and emotionally mature working in a mental health environment

Healthcare or allied health experience is not required. Personality, maturity, and communication quality matter most.





TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

·       High-speed internet connection (non-negotiable)

·       Laptop or computer with headset for WebEx phone system

·       Australian VPN for all phone-based tasks





WORKING ARRANGEMENT

Mon - Fri, Full-Time Remote

9am - 6pm Philippine Time

Total hours: 160 hours per month

Term: Minimum 3 months 





FUTURE GROWTH POTENTIAL

This role has strong growth potential for the right person. Over time, there is opportunity to move into more proactive responsibilities including identifying process gaps and suggesting improvements. The ideal long-term candidate is someone who can grow with the business.





HOW TO APPLY

If you believe you are the right fit for this role, we would love to hear from you. Please complete our application form at the link below: https://airtable.com/appwu73agG5jc6YDH/pagFCnDhDBeh7Ft34/form

title: Amazon FBA Admin & Lead Analyst (C1/C2 English)
description:
Are you a detail-oriented Amazon FBA expert who loves solving puzzles and finding profitable opportunities? We are a growing Amazon business looking for a dedicated Operations & Lead Analysis VA to become the backbone of our daily workflow.



This is not a "simple" data entry role. We need someone who understands the nuances of Account Health, knows how to fight for reimbursements, and can analyze Keepa charts like a pro.



Key Responsibilities

1. Account Health & Operations



Case Management: Open and relentlessly follow up on cases with Seller Support regarding listing errors, Brand Registry, and shipping discrepancies.



Account Health Monitoring: Daily checks of the dashboard to catch policy violations or IP complaints before they become problems.



Reimbursements: Audit lost/damaged inventory and file claims to recover funds.



2. Inventory & Supply Chain



Stock Tracking: Monitor levels to prevent OOS (Out of Stock) scenarios or excessive long-term storage fees.



Updating COGs(Cost of goods sold) in Sellerboard to accurately reflect accurate profit calculations on a daily basis.



Supplier Relations: Coordinate with retailers and prep centers regarding missing shipments or damaged goods.



3. Lead Approval & Analysis (Critical)

You will act as the "Gatekeeper" for our sourcing team. You will review leads from our Sourcing VA and approve them based on our strict Buy Filters



Candidate Requirements

English Fluency: C1 or C2 level (Written and Verbal). You must be able to communicate clearly with Amazon Support and US-based retailers. 



Take the preply english test and share screenshot of result: 



Share screen shot of internet speed test: https://www.speedtest.net/https://www.speedtest.net/



Experience: At least 1-2 years of experience in Amazon OA (Online Arbitrage) or Wholesale. 



Entry level with minimal experience is still possible, but you must show proof of skills/ability to perform in this role. 



Technical Skills: Expert-level knowledge of Keepa, Seller Central, and Google Sheets.



Mindset: Analytical, proactive, and detail-oriented.



We value attention to detail above all else. To demonstrate that you have read this entire listing and can follow instructions perfectly:



Subject Line: Your application must start with the word cheesecake followed by your full name.



Submit your CV/Resume



Attach or link a video response answering the following questions: 

What is something not on your resume you are proud of?



Applications that do not follow the previous instructions will be automatically disqualified. 



Performance-Based Scalability: We are a fast-growing company. As you hit your KPIs (Key Performance Indicators) and help the business scale, your compensation will be reviewed to reflect your impact.



We look forward to meeting our next tea
mber!

title: Assistant Sales and Project Coordinator, Contractor
description:
American International Industries, a Beauty and Personal Care Products Company



Overview

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Assistant Sales and Project Coordinator to support our sales and marketing teams in managing initiatives for Specialty Beauty Retailer accounts. This role will serve as the central point of coordination for retailer-specific projects, ensuring seamless communication between internal teams and field sales, and supporting the timely execution of product launches, promotional programs, and account initiatives.



The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, excels at juggling multiple retailer projects simultaneously, and has strong organizational skills to keep timelines, budgets, and deliverables on track.



Key Responsibilities

Account & Project Coordination

• Support sales and marketing initiatives specific to Specialty Beauty Retailer accounts.

• Track and manage product launches, marketing campaigns, promotions, new item form set up and account-specific programs.

• Create and maintain detailed project timelines, monitoring key milestones, deliverables, and deadlines for retailer accounts.

• Coordinate execution of product launch timelines between accounts and marketing.

• Prioritize multiple retailer projects based on business needs and deadlines.



Sales & Marketing Support

• Facilitate communication between the marketing team and outside sales representatives dedicated to specialty retailers.

• Assist in the execution of sales strategies tailored to retailer needs.

• Ensure account-specific sales materials, promotional assets, and product details are accurate and delivered on time.

• Support retailer presentations, recaps, and reporting on sales-marketing initiatives.



Cross-Functional Collaboration

• Act as the liaison between sales, marketing, creative, supply chain, and regulatory teams for retailer-specific projects.

• Organize and lead cross-functional meetings to align on priorities, providing clear action items and deadlines. ( Track progress)

• Partner with supply chain to ensure smooth inventory transitions for specialty retail launches and minimize disruptions.



Budget & Reporting

• Assist in the development and tracking of sales budgets for Specialty Beauty Retailer accounts.

• Monitor spend against budget and report variances.

• Provide regular updates on project performance and outcomes for retailer initiatives.



Process Improvement

• Identify inefficiencies in retailer project workflows and recommend improvements.

• Develop tools and processes to streamline coordination across sales and marketing teams.

• Anticipate risks related to retailer timelines and deliverables, implementing mitigation strategies.



Preferred Skills & Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Project Management, or related field.

• 2–4 years of experience in project coordination, account support, or sales/marketing operations.

• Experience in beauty, personal care, or consumer packaged goods (CPG) industries strongly preferred.

• Strong understanding of Specialty Beauty Retailer dynamics (e.g., merchandising, launch calendars, promotional planning).

• Excellent organizational and time management skills, with ability to handle multiple retailer projects simultaneously.

• Strong communication and problem-solving skills, with a collaborative, solution-oriented mindset.

• Familiarity with retailer budget tracking, promotional planning, and reporting is a plus.



Working Hours

Working hours for this role are 10:00 am to 7:00 pm PST.

title: Real Estate Opportunity Investigator & Deal Specialist
description:
URGENT HIRING: Real Estate Opportunity Investigator & Deal Specialist | US Real Estate | Remote



We are looking for a sharp, resourceful, high-performing individual to work targeted real estate opportunities in active U.S. markets.



We identify high-priority opportunities where the owner is highly likely to sell. Your responsibility is to locate the true decision maker, build trust, and move the opportunity toward a signed agreement.





THE ROLE

You take ownership of a lead from initial contact through closing. This is a proactive, outbound role where you create opportunities and drive deals forward.

INVESTIGATE

Work through all available contacts and data tied to each property to identify and reach difficult-to-contact decision makers.

Navigate conversations with relatives, associates, and other connected parties

Use persistence, sound judgment, and creativity to reach hard-to-contact individuals 

Tracking down the right contact is a core part of the role. Without the right contact, no deal can move forward

CONNECT

Build trust with property owners across residential, land, and commercial assets

Understand their situation and motivations 

Have direct, natural conversations, not scripted interactions

Build relationships and maintain consistent, intentional follow-up

Communicate with professionalism, empathy, and persistence 

CLOSE

Guide sellers in understanding their options 

Clearly communicate our buying process

Move the opportunity toward signed agreements

Stay engaged through the entire closing process 

Take full ownership of the deal from start to finish 





WHAT WE NEED

Strong communicator

Persistent and resourceful problem solver

Someone who has high urgency and ownership mentality

Independent thinker, reliable and professional

Motivated by growth and income



COMPENSATION

This is a high performance, deal driven role.

Base pay is provided, along with performance-based compensation tied to closed deals.

Top performers can earn substantial income, including six figure potential, with no ceiling on earnings.





HOW TO APPLY

Complete all steps:



Step 1: Submit your resume in PDF format



Step 2: Submit a 60-90 second voice recording answering the following:

You are given a property with multiple phone numbers connected to relatives, associates, and possible contacts, not just the owner.

What exact steps would you take to:

• Identify the decision maker

• Navigate those conversations

• Obtain the best contact information and successfully reach them



Step 3: Provide a written answer. 

Question 1: How would you locate a hard to reach property owner if all phone numbers are wrong or disconnected?

Question 2: A homeowner says "I am not interested" and tries to end the call. What do you say next?



Step 4

Include this phrase in your subject line:

I Find the Decision Maker - [Your Name] - [Date Today]



Step 5: Submit all materials via
 to 



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

What You’ll Gain

What We’re Looking For

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

title: Construction Accountant
description:
About Us

Pivot Solutions is a consulting firm in Arizona. We provide practical support in accounting, tax, construction, HR, and business operations. We focus on accuracy, accountability, and real results.



About the Role

We are seeking a detail-oriented Construction Accountant to manage project-level financials, ensure accurate job costing, and handle construction-specific billing and compliance. The ideal candidate understands progress billings, retainage, and lien waivers.



This is a full-time position. We are not looking to hire self-employed consultants or freelance

e bookkeepers. This is a fully remote position. To be considered, your resume must be written in English.



What You’ll Do

 • Perform job costing for multiple active projects, tracking labor, materials, subcontractors, and equipment.

 • Prepare progress billings (AIA documents, schedule of values) and manage retainage receivables/payables.

 • Reconcile over/under billings and report work-in-progress (WIP) accurately.

 • Process subcontractor pay applications, collect lien waivers, and ensure compliance with notices of commencement.

 • Manage equipment & fleet accounting (depreciation, internal rentals, fuel, maintenance).

 • Assist with monthly bank reconciliations, accounts payable/receivable, and general ledger entries.

 • Support project managers with real-time cost-to-complete reports and variance analysis.



Qualifications:

 • 2+ years of accounting experience, preferably in construction, trades, or real estate development.

 • Proficiency with construction ERP & accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, BuildTrend, Sage 300 CRE, Foundation, Viewpoint, or Procore).

 • Solid understanding of job cost ledgers, WIP schedules, and percentage-of-completion (POC) accounting.

 • Familiarity with lien laws, retainage rules, and AIA billing documents.

 • Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, VLOOKUP).



Preferred:

 • Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

 • Experience with payroll, certified payroll reporting, or equipment fleet management.



Only applicants who meets the qualifications will be considered.



Work Setup: Fully Remote (Work From Home)

Schedule: US Arizona Time

Job Type: Independent Contractor | Full-Time

 • Send me an
:

title: GemPages & DTC Landing Page Expert
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a GemPages and DTC landing page specialist to join our team on an ongoing hourly basis. We run multiple consumer brands and are constantly building, testing, and optimizing landing pages for paid traffic (Meta, Google, TikTok). We need someone who lives and breathes high-converting DTC pages and can turn around polished work fast.

This is a long-term role for the right person — steady hours, steady work, and room to grow with us.

What You'll Be Doing



Building and designing landing pages in GemPages for Shopify

Creating high-converting DTC landers for cold paid traffic

Designing advertorials, listicles, quiz funnels, and product pages

Iterating on pages based on ad creative, copy, and CRO data

Mobile-first design (most of our traffic is mobile)

Implementing tweaks and A/B test variations quickly



What We're Looking For



Strong GemPages experience — you know the builder inside and out

Proven DTC landing page portfolio — pages built for Meta/Google/TikTok traffic, not just generic Shopify product pages

Conversion-focused design eye — you understand hierarchy, hooks, social proof placement, urgency, and how to design for cold traffic

Fast, clear communication — quick replies during work hours

Intuitive and self-directed — can take a brief, ad creative, or competitor reference and run with it

Available 9 AM – 5 PM PST (Monday through Friday)

Comfortable on hourly with honest time tracking



Nice to Have



Experience designing for supplements, beauty, or health/wellness brands

Familiarity with Shopify themes and basic Liquid edits

Knowledge of CRO best practices and split-testing tools

Experience with advertorial-style funnels (presell pages, listicles)



How to Apply

Send me a message with your portfolio! DTC brands only.



Compensation

Hourly — competitive and based on experience. Discussed on the call.

title: Administrative Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Administrative Assistant to join our team in the real estate space. 



This is a Direct Hire position, and we require candidates to have 

at least 1-2 years of experience in an executive administrative role, with a strong 

preference for those with a background in real estate.  



In this role, you will manage the company owner's calendar and communications, maintain and update records in our CRM systems (Pipedrive and REI Sift *training provided*), and coordinate with attorneys, title companies, and tea
mbers on active deals. You'll also research property records and owner information, draft outreach
s and letters, manage social media posting using a provided content calendar, and keep deal files and documents organized so nothing falls through the cracks etc.



While on-the-job training will be provided for the CRM system, familiarity with tools such 

as Pipedrive, REISift, Calendly,
/Instagram, Gmail, and Excel is preferred. 

 

We are looking for someone who is humble, a go-getter, smart, and reliable. If you are 

ambitious and can manage tasks with minimal supervision, this opportunity is for you. 

 

Please do not apply if you are new to the Administrative assistant role, as we are seeking 

candidates with prior relevant experience and strong organizational skills.  





IMPORTANT INSTRUCTION: 

Send your applications to 
 and use "AdminHire" as your subject line. 



Applications without the correct subject will NOT BE REVIEWED. Include the following: 

1. Resume  

2. DISC Test Result - Send us an updated one using this link below:  

(
)  

3. Video Introduction (1-2 Mins Long)  

Failure to follow instructions will result in your application being rejected!

title: Graphic Designer + AI Video Generator + Video Editor
description:
We are an aggressively growing eCommerce and retail brand looking for a talented, creative, and fast-moving Graphic Designer, AI Video Generator, and Video Editor to join our team full-time.



We need someone highly skilled in graphic design, Amazon/eCommerce product visuals, video editing, and AI video generation tools. The ideal candidate must be creative, detail-oriented, responsive, and able to produce high-quality visual content quickly.



This is a real, long-term job opening for someone who wants to grow with a fast-scaling brand.



About the Role

You will be responsible for creating high-converting visual content for Amazon listings, eCommerce platforms, TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, YouTube, TikTok Shop, Meta ads, and Amazon A+ Premium Content.



A major part of this role involves turning static product images into dynamic, engaging video content using motion graphics, AI video tools, camera movement effects, and professional video editing techniques.



You should be comfortable working with tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Canva, Illustrator, and AI video generation platforms such as Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, VEO 3.1, or similar tools.



Key Responsibilities

Design high-quality Amazon product images, including hero images, infographics, lifestyle images, and comparison charts.

Create Amazon A+ Content and Storefront graphics aligned with brand guidelines.

Ensure all Amazon visuals meet image requirements, including dimensions, white background, clarity, and quality standards.

Edit and retouch raw product photos to improve visual appeal.

Create packaging, labels, and other branding materials when needed.

Research competitor listings and design trends to improve listing performance.

Create video ads and product videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, YouTube, TikTok Shop, and Meta campaigns.

Transform static product images into dynamic videos using animation, parallax effects, simulated camera angles, 3D movement, motion graphics, and transitions.

Generate, edit, and refine AI video content using VEO 3.1, Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, or similar AI video tools.

Turn product images, text prompts, and brand assets into engaging, high-converting video ads.

Create multiple hooks and ad variations for A/B testing.

Add captions, text overlays, trending audio, sound design, color grading, and seamless transitions.

Collaborate with the marketing, product, and creative teams to understand product features and selling points.

Iterate quickly based on feedback fro
dia buyers and performance data.

Maintain an organized workflow and deliver projects on time.

Stay updated with Amazon trends, eCommerce shopper behavior, social media trends, AI video tools, and best practices for digital advertising.

Be responsive to urgent messages and communication during work hours.

Work efficiently. Fast, high-quality output is rewarded.

Requirements

Proven experience as a Graphic Designer, Video Editor, or AI Video Creator, preferably for Amazon, eCommerce, or retail brands.

Strong portfolio showing Amazon product images, eCommerce graphics, video ads, and AI-generated video content.

Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Premiere Pro, Illustrator, Canva, and preferably After Effects.

Experience with AI video tools such as Nano Banana Pro, Seedance 2.0, Kling, Higgsfield, VEO 3.1, Sora, Runway, or similar platforms.

Strong understanding of prompt engineering for AI video generation.

Ability to turn still images into dynamic video content using motion, camera simulation, and animation techniques.

Good understanding of social media ad pacing, hooks, retention, and eCommerce conversion-focused creatives.

Basic knowledge of product photography and photo retouching is a plus.

Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and understanding of visual hierarchy.

Ability to follow instructions accurately and adapt quickly to revisions.

Strong time management and organizational skills.

Good English communication skills.

Must be available for 30-40 hours per week.

Having your own repository of stock images/assets is a plus.

Mandatory Portfolio Requirement

You must provide a portfolio or demo reel that includes:



Amazon or eCommerce product images.

Video ads or product videos.

Examples of videos created from static images using camera movement, parallax, animation, or motion graphics.

AI-generated video samples using tools such as VEO 3.1, Kling, Seedance 2.0, Nano Banana Pro, Higgsfield, Runway, Sora, or similar.

Applications without a relevant portfolio will not be considered.



Salary & Payment

Monthly Salary: PHP 75,000 - PHP 80,000



Payment Schedule: Bi-weekly payments



Performance-based bonuses are available for:



Number of images, videos, or design outputs created.

Speed and turnaround time.

Quality of work and performance.

Accuracy, creativity, and understanding of instructions.

Strong brand guideline execution.

High-performing ad creatives.

What We Offer

Full-time, long-term position.

Work-from-home flexibility.

Bi-weekly payment schedule.

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling eCommerce and retail brand.

Creative freedom to test new design styles, video formats, and AI tools.

Performance-based rewards for fast and high-quality work.

How to Apply

Please send the following:



A brief introduction about your experience with graphic design, eCommerce visuals, video editing, and AI video generation.

Your portfolio or demo reel.

Specific examples of videos created from static product images.

Specific examples of AI-generated videos using VEO 3.1 or similar AI tools.

Your expected full-time monthly salary or hourly rate.

Include the word “Scale” in the first line of your application so we know you read the full job post.

title: Long-Term VA for US Medical Education Company — Kajabi/GHL Required, Path to Full-Time
description:
ABOUT SCIMPLE EDUCATION



Scimple Education is a fast-growing US-based medical education company changing how clinicians learn — through live conferences, on-demand courses, interactive content, and podcasts. We're expanding our operations team to keep up with our growth.





THE ROLE



We're hiring a detail-oriented, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to be the operational right hand for our team. This is a long-term remote position with a clear path to full-time employment and leadership for the right person. You won't be a task-taker — you'll be a collaborator we rely on.



• Hours: 20–30 hrs/week to start, with a clear path to full-time within 3–6 months for the right person.

• Compensation: $8–$11/hr depending on experience, plus performance bonuses and a 13th-month bonus after 12 months.

• Schedule: Largely autonomous; about a 4-hour overlap with US Eastern preferred for tea
etings — the rest of the work is async.

• Location: Fully remote.





WHAT YOU'LL DO



Phase 1 — Operations & Communications (first 60–90 days)



• Manage funnels,
 campaigns, and course content in Kajabi and/or GoHighLevel.

• Handle customer and faculty
 correspondence with professionalism and warmth.

• Maintain customer databases and monitor performance analytics.

• Support newsletter and promotional content production.



Phase 2 — Educational Events & Operations (after training)



• Support planning and logistics for our live and virtual educational events.

• Coordinate with speakers, attendees, and vendors.

• Oversee registration systems and assist with budget tracking.

• Help launch new courses, products, and programs.





MUST-HAVES



• Exceptional written and spoken English.

• Advanced Google Workspace skills (Docs, Sheets, Drive — non-negotiable).

• Hands-on experience with Kajabi or GoHighLevel (GHL). This is the single hardest filter — please do not apply without it.

• Ability to work independently, juggle priorities, and thrive remotely without micromanagement.





NICE-TO-HAVES (REAL BONUSES)



• Digital marketing strategy or campaign experience.

• Graphic design in Canva, Photoshop, or similar.

• AI image generation (Nano Banana, Midjourney, or similar).

• Video and audio editing for podcasts and promo clips.

• Familiarity with other LMS platforms.





WHY PEOPLE STAY WITH US



• You're heard. We work in a low-ego, friendly remote culture where ideas get tested on merit.

• Real flexibility. Autonomous schedule, generous time off, and respect for your life outside work.

• Real growth. Clear path to full-time, leadership, and performance bonuses — not vague promises.

• Meaningful work. Our team is based in Philadelphia, and the content you'll help ship is used by emergency physicians, nurses, and trainees making real clinical decisions.





HOW TO APPLY



Send the following to 



1. A short statement of interest (under 250 words). Begin it with the exact phrase: "I read every word."

2. In 2–3 sentences inside that statement, answer this: if we handed you a Kajabi account on day one with no instructions, what would you Google first? Be specific.

3. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link.

4. Internet speed test results from speedtest.net (screenshot is fine).

5. A portfolio or samples of relevant work — especially design, AI imagery, video, or any platforms (Kajabi/GHL/Canva/etc.) you've built in.

6. References if you have them.



Final candidates will be invited to a short video interview on Google Meet.



We read every application personally. Looking forward to meeting you.

title: Creator Outreach & Affiliate Growth VA ( Facebook +TikTok + Instagram) – Performance-Based Role
description:
We’re building a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the aesthetic lighting space (Lumena), and we’re looking for a high-execution Virtual Assistant to help us scale our creator/affiliate program.



This is a growth role focused on outreach, recruitment, and performance.



Daily tasks:

• Sending 50–80 outreach DMs/day on TikTok & Instagram

• Identifying and vetting creators (5K–150K followers)

• Introducing creators to our affiliate program

• Following up with interested creators

• Guiding creators to sign up and start promoting

• Tracking all outreach and results in Google Sheets



We already provide content creators can use—your job is to drive participation and results.

title: AMAZON PPC MANAGER
description:
We’re looking for an Amazon PPC Manager who thinks like a strategist, not just an operator.



This role is for someone who can own performance, not just manage campaigns. Someone who understands how keywords, bids, and listing optimization work together to drive profitable growth.



If you’re used to just “maintaining campaigns,” this is not for you.



What You’ll Own:

-Full ownership of Amazon PPC performance (Sponsored Products, Brands, Display)

-Keyword strategy development (launch, ranking, scaling, defense)

-Campaign structure optimization (not just tweaks—real restructuring when needed)

-Scaling winning products while controlling ACoS/TACoS

-Search term harvesting, negation strategy, and bid optimization

-Listing + PPC alignment (titles, backend keywords, indexing gaps)

-Competitor and market analysis to identify growth opportunities

-Weekly reporting with insights—not just numbers, but what to do next



What We’re Looking For (Non-Negotiables)

-3+ years hands-on Amazon PPC management (you’ve managed real budgets, not just assisted)

-Strong keyword research & ranking strategy experience

Deep understanding of:

-ACoS, TACoS, ROAS (and when each actually matters)

-Campaign structures (auto, manual, scaling frameworks)

-Search term isolation & scaling

-Experience using tools like Helium 10, DataDive, or similar

-Ability to explain your strategy clearly (to clients or team)



This Role Is NOT for You If:

-You only follow SOPs without understanding strategy

-You can’t explain why campaigns are performing the way they are

-You rely purely on automation tools without analysis

-You’ve never handled accounts end-to-end

-You can't follow instructions



Important Details

Schedule: 9 AM – 6 PM PST

Remote role (must have stable internet + headset)

Client-facing: You should be comfortable joining meetings and strategy calls



Include your CV and portfolio.

title: Medical Virtual Assistant
description: I am looking for a medical virtual assistant who can work for my outpatient psychiatry practice.  The job would entail answering phone calls, booking new patients, responding to messages from patients. Ideal candidate would be someone with medical experience working in mental health, especially if you have worked as a nurse.

title: Customer Service & Phone Rep – Party Rental (Remote)
description:
Friendly Party Rental is a local, family-owned party rental company based in Syracuse, NY (serving all of Central New York). We rent tents, tables, chairs, bounce houses, concessions, and more. We are hiring a remote Customer Service & Phone Representative to be the voice of our business.



THIS ROLE IS FOR SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY. Please read carefully before applying.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

- Answer inbound calls from customers inquiring about rentals, availability, and pricing

- Make outbound follow-up calls to leads and customers

- Help customers place orders through our online booking and backend system (Event Rental Systems / ERS)

- Answer customer questions accurately using our pricing guides and FAQ resources

- Take detailed notes and communicate clearly with our team



REQUIREMENTS (non-negotiable):

- Excellent spoken and written English — clear, confident, and professional phone voice is a MUST

- Strong internet connection and quiet work environment for phone calls

- Experience in customer service or phone sales

- Ability to learn our backend booking system (ERS) quickly — training provided

- Reliable, consistent, and on-time — we need someone who shows up every shift

- Must be available Monday through Friday, 9am–5pm Eastern Time (US)

- Must be comfortable talking to customers on the phone for most of the shift — this is NOT a chat or
-only role



NICE TO HAVE:

- Prior experience with event rentals, hospitality, or service businesses

- Experience with online booking or reservation systems



HOW TO APPLY:

Before we consider your application, you MUST complete our short phone skills and knowledge screening test at: friendlypartyrentalemployee.site



Applications without a completed screening test will not be reviewed.



We are a small, close-knit team and we take customer service very seriously. If you are reliable, professional, and love helping people, this is a great long-term role with room to grow.

title: Airtable Specialist & Workflow Automater
description:
Project Overview:

Hi there! I am looking for a talented Airtable Specialist to help me cross the finish line on a custom ERP for my luxury cabinetry business. The database structure is 90% built, the SKUs are imported, and the core logic is in place. I just need a "finisher" who is an expert in Interface Designer to make the user experience smooth and professional for my team.



What’s already done:

• Full relational database schema with 19 tables.

• 2,000+ SKU library with pricing.

• Basic Designer and Dealer portals.

• What I need your help with:

• UX Polishing: Fine-tuning a multi-step "Wizard" for creating quotes (Construction ?? Species ?? Finish).

• Conditional Filtering: Ensuring dropdown menus only show relevant options (e.g., Maple stains only showing up when Maple wood is selected).

• Shopping Cart Experience: Setting up a gallery where designers can click "Add to Quote" and see a running total update in real-time.

• Automations: Setting up lead-time calculations and a simple capacity warning system for our shop floor.



Technical Skills Needed:

• Airtable Interface Designer: This is the main focus. I need someone who knows how to build clean, intuitive portals.

• Logic & Formulas: Comfort with linked records, lookups, and basic IF/WORKDAY formulas.

• Automations: Ability to trigger notifications or record updates based on status changes.



Why join this project?

The hard work of building the architecture is done! I need a partner who can take my vision and make it "click" for the end-users. I’m easy to work with, the base is organized, and I’m looking for someone who takes pride in building great user experiences.



How to Apply:

• Please send a link to a Loom video (2-3 minutes) showing an Airtable Interface you have built. I’d love to see how you organize information for users!

• Include the word "CABINET" at the top of your message so I know you’ve read the details.

title: Assistant Property Manager
description:
Assistant Property Manager 

Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM Central Time, with a 30-minute break



Job Overview: 

We are seeking an experienced Assistant Property Manager to support day-to-day property management operations, serving as a key liaison between property managers, tenants, owners, and internal teams. This role is responsible for coordinating lease renewals, supporting rent collection and delinquency tracking, assisting with maintenance requests, and ensuring clear and professional communication across all stakeholders. The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and experienced in property management systems, particularly AppFolio, with the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, process-driven environment while maintaining accurate, audit-ready documentation and delivering excellent service to both owners and residents.



Key Responsibilities:

Coordinate lease renewals, including sending renewal offers, tracking responses, scheduling inspections, and ensuring accurate data entry in AppFolio

Support rent collection efforts, monitor delinquencies, send notices, and communicate updates to owners

Assist tenants with maintenance requests and coordinate with property managers and maintenance teams to ensure timely resolution

Communicate professionally with tenants and owners via phone,
, text, and portal

Support onboarding of new properties and assist with move-out processes

Maintain accurate, audit-ready documentation and detailed notes in AppFolio

Participate in weekly regional meetings and provide updates on leasing, delinquency, and service needs



Required Skills & Qualifications:

Prior property management experience required

Experience with AppFolio strongly preferred

Strong written and verbal communication skills

High attention to detail and organizational ability

Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment

Professional, solution-oriented mindset

title: Leasing Specialist
description:
Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, an 9-hour shift including a 1-hour break (8-hour working shift, time zone to be finalized)



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a confident and driven Leasing Specialist to manage inbound inquiries and proactively engage prospective residents through outbound calls. In this role, you will play a key part in converting leads into scheduled property tours by delivering a seamless and informative experience. 

The ideal candidate is highly comfortable on the phone, possesses strong communication skills, and can clearly explain the self-guided showing process while building rapport and a sense of urgency with prospects. This position requires a proactive approach, attention to detail, and the ability to effectively nurture leads throughout the leasing journey to support occupancy goals.

This role is ideal for a driven leasing professional who thrives in a fast-paced, performance-based environment and is motivated by turning leads into qualified applicants.



Key Responsibilities:

Serve as the primary point of contact for all inbound leasing inquiries (phone,
, and online leads)

Make outbound calls to new and existing leads to increase tour scheduling and application conversions

Respond promptly to new leads and follow up consistently to drive engagement

Qualify prospective residents based on rental criteria and property fit

Clearly explain the self-showing process and assist prospects with scheduling tours

Maintain accurate lead tracking and notes within company systems

Collaborate with Property Managers and Marketing to ensure alignment on availability and listing details

Follow up with prospects after tours to encourage applications



Performance Expectations:

Success in this role is measured by conversion metrics, specifically:

Leads converted to scheduled tours

Tours converted to completed applications



Required Skills & Qualifications:

Prior property management or leasing experience required

Experience with AppFolio (required)

Familiarity with Rently and Tenant Turner (preferred)

Comfortable handling both inbound and outbound calls

Strong phone presence with the ability to build rapport quickly

Clear, professional communication skills

Goal-oriented with a strong focus on conversion and results

Highly organized with strong follow-up discipline



Nice to Have

Experience in a lead-to-lease or leasing conversion-focused role

title: Chief Marketing Officer
description:
Overview



We are seeking a highly capable and results-driven Head of Marketing (Fractional CMO level) based in the Philippines to lead and execute our global marketing strategy.



This role is ideal for a senior marketing professional who can operate strategically while remaining hands-on. You will work directly with the CEO to build structured, scalable marketing systems that drive revenue — without the overhead of a large internal team.



This is a remote contractor position with performance-based upside.



Key Responsibilities

Marketing Strategy & Planning



Develop and implement a clear quarterly marketing roadmap aligned with revenue goals.



Define positioning, messaging, and key differentiators.



Identify cost-effective growth opportunities and prioritize high-ROI initiatives.



Demand Generation & Lead Growth



Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns (Meta, Google, LinkedIn, etc.).



Improve funnel conversion rates and landing page performance.



Oversee
 marketing and lead nurturing workflows.



Focus on measurable ROI and efficient spend.



Brand & Content Execution



Oversee website messaging and content strategy.



Coordinate social media,
 campaigns, and content publishing.



Work with designers and contractors to produce marketing assets.



Systems & Reporting



Implement dashboards to track KPIs and marketing performance.



Optimize CRM and automation workflows.



Provide weekly and monthly performance reporting to leadership.



Team & Vendor Coordination



Manage freelancers, media buyers, designers, and copywriters as needed.



Build simple, scalable SOPs to improve marketing operations.



Requirements



6–10+ years of marketing experience.



Proven experience driving measurable growth in a small or mid-sized business.



Strong knowledge of digital marketing and funnel optimization.



Experience working remotely with international teams.



Excellent English communication skills.



Data-driven and ROI-focused mindset.



Preferred:



Experience in SaaS, AI, healthcare, or technology industries.



Experience marketing to Australian, US, or UK markets.



Familiarity with tools like HubSpot, GoHighLevel, ClickUp, Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager, etc.



Compensation & Structure



Remote contractor position (Philippines-based).



Flexible structure: Full-time or fractional (30–40 hours per week).



Competitive salary aligned with Philippines market rates.



Performance bonus tied to revenue growth and KPIs.



KPIs



Qualified lead growth



Cost per acquisition (CPA)



Conversion rate improvements



Marketing-generated revenue



ROI on ad spend



Ideal Candidate



This role is suited for a strong marketing leader who:



Is comfortable wearing multiple hats



Thrives in lean, performance-driven environments



Can balance strategic thinking with execution



Wants long-term growth and stability with an international company

title: AI Sales Operations & SDR Manager
description:
Role Overview:

We are looking for a tech-savvy, high-performance AI Sales Operations Manager to lead our outbound growth engine. You will be responsible for building, managing, and optimizing a fully automated "AI-Loom" outreach system.



Instead of a manual team of 15 people, you will be the "Architect" and "Pilot" of an AI stack that sends 100+ personalized video audits per day. Your goal is simple: Generate qualified "Show-Ups" for our sales team.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Technical Systems & Infrastructure

- Domain Management: Purchase and set up 10–20+ secondary domains (Google Workspace/Microsoft 365) for cold outreach.

- Deliverability: Configure SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records and manage the "warm-up" process using tools like Instantly.ai or Smartlead.

- AI Tool Integration: Learn, set up, and maintain our AI stack (Clay, Sendspark/Pitchlane, HeyGen, and ElevenLabs).



2. Lead Generation & Data Enrichment

- Scraping: Use Apollo, Clay, or similar tools to find high-intent leads in the CBD, Cannabis, and Psilocybin niches.

- Data Verification: Ensure 99?liverability by running "waterfall" verification (NeverBounce/MillionVerifier).

- Personalization: Use Clay to find "triggers" (e.g., specific website flaws) to feed into the AI video script.



3. Outreach & Inbox Management

- Campaign Launch: Build and A/B test
 scripts and AI video templates.

- Appointment Setting: Manage all incoming replies. You will handle objections, answer questions, and push qualified leads to book a call on our Calendly.

- Show-up Optimization: Follow up with booked leads to ensure they actually show up to the meeting.



Requirements:

- Technical Aptitude: You must be comfortable learning new AI software quickly. If you’ve used Clay, Zapier, or 
, that is a huge plus.

- Cold
 Expertise: You understand how to avoid the spam folder and what a high-converting subject line looks like.

- Excellent English: Your written communication must be top-tier for handling professional objections from business owners.

- Self-Starter: You don't need a manual for everything; you can watch a YouTube tutorial on a new tool and have it implemented by the next day.



Compensation & Perks:

- Base Salary: $[Insert Amount, e.g., $700–$900 USD] per month.

- Performance Bonus: $[Insert Amount, e.g., $25] per "Qualified Show-Up." (Our goal is 20+ show-ups per month).

- Growth: You will be at the forefront of AI marketing, learning the most valuable skills in the agency world today.

- Flexible Autonomy: As long as the "machine" is running and the calendar is full, we don't micromanage.



How to Apply - READ CAREFULLY:

- To prove you have the attention to detail required for this role, please:

- Change the subject line of your application to: "AI Architect for Apex Media Lab - [Your Name]"

- Briefly describe a time you automated a task using a tool or software.

- Confirm you have experience (or are willing to learn) the technical side of setting up
 domains and DNS records.

title: Amazon Vendor Central Catalog Specialist
description:
Vendor Central Catalog Specialist

Up to $1,600 Monthly + Benefits



We are looking for a Vendor Central Catalog Specialist to help manage catalogs on 
. We are looking for someone who understands the importance of optimized product detail pages and how to help us win the digital shelf through best-in-class product content. The successful candidate will spend most of their time within the 
 Seller Central or Vendor Central portal, ensuring digital merchandising strategy is best in class. We are looking for someone with strong attention to detail and firm knowledge of how to create new product listings and variation families, upload digital content, and audit detail pages for accuracy. If you are excited about working in a fast-moving space with an opportunity to expand skills on Amazon as well as across other ecommerce platforms, this is the perfect job for you.



Responsibilities

*Work with client success managers (CSMs) and account directors (ADs) to implement the product detail page changes for clients on Amazon.

*Communicate directly with the team on tasks related to catalog optimization efforts.

*Monitor product sales and trends using the proprietary sales and reporting dashboard.

*Collect product data and organize it into the product management software.

*Create, optimize, and upload listing content—titles, bullet points, and descriptions.

*Upload enhanced digital assets created by the internal creative team—A+ content, videos, images, and brand stores.

*Run product page diagnostics on existing products on Amazon to determine the accuracy of the content.

*Conduct product and competitor research to aid in executing an effective listing strategy.

*Monitor both account and listing health closely to limit listing and account downtime.

*Report product pages that fraudulently use the clients' trademarks or copyrighted material.

*Respond to buyer messages in a timely manner while providing excellent customer service.

*Maintain current knowledge of Amazon's policies and best practices for product listings.

*Other responsibilities that come when working with a growing agency.



Successful Candidates

*2–5+ years’ experience working with and on 
 (Vendor Central and Seller Central).

*Proficient in both Seller Central and Vendor Central, with a primary focus on the Vendor Central catalog.

*Bonus points for experience working on international catalogs in Vendor Central.

*Knowledge of the Amazon back-end and the ability to load new products, create variations, fix suppressed listings, upload creative content, and do other similar work within the Amazon portal.

*An extreme eye for detail with impeccable organization skills.

*Proficient multitasker with the ability to manage many tasks at once.

*Ability to work in a collaborative environment.

*A problem solver who can work with the many challenges and inconsistencies the Amazon platform provides.

*English speaking—an effective and timely communicator.

*Proficient in Microsoft Excel.

*Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, or a related field is preferred.



Benefits

*3 weeks of PTO

*10 holidays

*2 personal days



Please send your application to 
 using the answer to '1,782/54x720+14.98+22' as the subject line.

title: Video Editor & Performance Analyst
description:
Video Editor & Performance Analyst

About the Role

We’re looking for a creative and data-driven Video Editor & Performance Analyst to support a growing digital product brand. You’ll edit content across multiple platforms, track daily performance, test hooks, and help drive traffic to our done-for-you digital product store built on Go High Level.

What You’ll Do

Editing

 • Edit short and long-form video content for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram Reels, and

 • Use Descript for transcript-based editing, captions, and quick turnaround cuts

 • Create multiple hook variations per video for A/B testing

 • Add captions, graphics, transitions, and audio to match each platform’s style

Performance Tracking

 • Monitor daily analytics across all platforms (views, watch time, retention rate, CTR, shares, saves)

 • Maintain a performance tracker to document what’s working and what isn’t

 • Identify trends in top-performing content and flag underperforming videos quickly

 • Deliver weekly performance reports with clear takeaways and recommendations

Hook Testing & Optimization

 • Write and test multiple hooks (first 1–3 seconds) to improve retention and stop-the-scroll rate

 • Analyze retention curves to pinpoint drop-off points

 • Use data to continuously refine editing style and content structure

Platform & Tool Knowledge

 • Pull analytics from YouTube Studio, TikTok Analytics, Meta Insights, and Go High Level

 • Understand how content drives traffic into funnels and digital product offers

 • Bonus: familiarity with Go High Level workflows, funnels, or CRM

What We’re Looking For

 • 2–4 years of video editing experience, preferably for a personal brand or digital business

 • Proficient in Descript and Adobe Premiere Pro or CapCut

 • Comfortable reading and interpreting platform analytics

 • Understands content strategy for selling digital products to coaches and entrepreneurs

 • Self-starter who tracks and reports data without needing to be reminded

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor – UGC-Style Digital Product Videos

Position: Freelance Video Editor

Type: Part-Time / Project-Based

Location: Remote

About the Role

Hourly work 

Part Time 

20 hours weekly

6$ an hour USD and commission

We are looking for a creative, conversion-focused video editor who specializes in UGC (User Generated Content) style videos. You will be editing short-form videos designed to stop the scroll, build trust, and drive sales for digital health and wellness products. This is not a corporate polish role — we want raw, real, and relatable content that converts.

What You’ll Be Doing

 • Edit raw footage into engaging UGC-style videos (15 sec – 90 sec) optimized for Instagram Reels,
, and TikTok

 • Add captions, text overlays, hooks, and call-to-action graphics that drive action

 • Select and sync trending or appropriate background music

 • Create scroll-stopping hooks in the first 1–3 seconds of every video

 • Edit for pacing and emotion — you understand that the first 3 seconds make or break a video

 • Produce multiple versions of the same video for A/B ad testing

 • Deliver videos formatted and sized correctly for each platform

 • Incorporate brand colors, fonts, and tone consistently

What We’re Looking For

 • Proven experience editing UGC-style or direct response video content

 • Strong portfolio showing videos that have driven engagement or sales (not just pretty edits)

 • Understanding of what makes content convert — hooks, pacing, storytelling, CTAs

 • Proficiency in CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

 • Ability to take direction from scripts and bring them to life visually

 • Fast turnaround — able to deliver edited videos within 24-48 hours

 • Strong communication and ability to take feedback professionally

 • Experience with digital products, coaching, or service-based businesses is a plus

title: Direct Response Copywriter
description:
If you’re an ambitious copywriter who cares about your craft and wants your work to have a real impact on people’s lives, we’d love to hear from you.



**Why Join us**



- Work with purpose: Every ad supports our mission to inspire creativity.

- Fast-paced growth: Learn quickly and see results in real time.

- Long-term mindset: We hire for the long haul (no hire-and-fire culture).

- Salary: $1,500–$1,800 / month, based on experience and skills.

- Mentorship: Hands-on guidance from our CMO.

- Tools: Access to AI-powered design tools, templates, and internal systems.



**About the role**

This is a full-time remote position available to applicants across the Philippines. You’ll produce high-quality copy across three core formats and a few supporting channels. You’ll balance creativity with structure, move quickly without sacrificing quality, and write for both people and performance.



- Ads: Lead with angles and hooks. Collaborate with designers to ship final creatives.

-
: Write and build campaigns and flows.

- Landing pages: Structure pages, sharpen offers, and write concise copy.



**What We’re Looking For**



- 2–5 years of professional copywriting experience in a marketing environment (in-house or agency)

- Strong writing and editing skills; you can adapt voice, tone, and messaging to fit the brand and channel

- Excellent attention to detail and strong time-management skills—you hit deadlines

- Exceptional command of English (native-level proficiency); clean, error-free copy

- Clear communicator with a collaborative, feedback-friendly working style



**You’d be a good fit if**



- You dig into customer research and turn insights into clear, persuasive copy.

- You learn by doing and believe reps build skill.

- You take your craft seriously—voice, structure, clarity, clean copy—and you welcome feedback.

- You’re comfortable in a fast-moving, high-output environment.

- You love reading, writing, and telling honest stories.

- You have sharp attention to detail—no typos, consistent style.



**How we work**



- Customer-first. Reviews and conversations with customers shape our
s, ads, product updates, and new launches. Relationships are what we value most.

- Experiment, learn, repeat. We test ideas, move fast, and improve as we go. Ship > perfect.

- Serious about the work, humble about ourselves. We care about results and leave ego at the door.



**Work environment**



- Fully remote

- Full-time

- Collaborative, feedback-friendly team

- Meaningful projects with visible impact



**About LOCHBY** (
)



We make tools that help people create—from notebooks to organizers. In a noisy digital world, we focus on building useful products that help you do more and consume less. Our motto: Keep Creating.



**Growth opportunity**



We’ve grown 5x over the past two years. As you go deeper into the work??
s, ads, and landing pages—you’ll have room to take on more ownership, from a senior copywriter role to broader marketing leadership as the team scales.



**How to Apply**



 your application to 
 with subject: Copywriter Application – [Your Name]. Include:



- Resume (PDF)

- Link to public profile (e.g., OnlineJobs.ph or Upwork)

- Answers to the four questions below (in the body of the
 is fine)

    1. Do you have at least 3 years of full-time professional experience post-graduation?

    2. Do you have at least 2 years of professional copywriting experience?

    3. Do you have experience working with North American companies?

    4. Who is your favorite copywriter or marketer, and why?

    5. Which work environment do you thrive in most?

        - Focus-first: I do my best work with long, uninterrupted focus and mostly async collaboration. I loop others in when needed.

        - Collaboration-first: I do my best work with frequent live collaboration—brainstorms, quick check-ins, and lots of back-and-forth.

- Referrer’s name if applicable

title: SEO Expert
description:
With our recent expansion, we're excited to be hiring lively, hard-working SEO professionals to our team! Before we get into the specifics, let us tell you about our company:



Why Join BIG Marketing:



- Work in the US market with a talented team on an exciting mission!

- 14 days paid personal time off.

- Paid time off for US Non-Working Holidays.

- Year-End Bonus.

- Company-sponsored learning.

- Comprehensive pay: $800 - $1,200/mo based on experience and knowledge.

- Opportunity for promotion and pay increases based on yearly performance review.



About BIG Marketing:



BIG Marketing is a digital marketing agency with extensive experience in helping companies grow their profits through SEO and digital marketing. We pride ourselves in delivering the most effective SEO strategies that produce measurable results!



Our company's mission is:



A better world through better marketing.



Some of our core values include:



- Always strive to be better.

- Find your discipline (make yourself a self-starter).

- Lift each other up, professionally and in life.

- Treat others with respect and kindness.

- Be reliable.



We're not just looking for a full-time SEO specialist, we're looking for that perfect person who will be a team player, meet our core values, and win with us.



DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES:



Below is a list of some of the various tasks you'll be required to do to perform well on the job. We've marked certain areas with an asterisk (*) to indicate that we will be providing training in these areas if you find that you aren't already trained:



- Writing Schema Markup.

- Basic on-page SEO - Page Titles, URLs, Descriptions and H Tags.

- Using POP (Page Optimizer Pro) for further optimization.

- Utilizing our AI platform for content writing. 

- Fact checking content. 

- Internal linking pages.

- Assigning image alt tags.

- Attending company meetings on Zoom.



REQUIREMENTS



- Proven SEO experience: A minimum of 4 years.

- In-depth experience with tools like Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, etc.

- Excellent English speaking skills.

- An expert understanding of technical terms related to SEO and the web.

- Experience with technical SEO.

- A fast learner.

- Experience with WordPress.



- A backup or dual internet connection must be set up.

- At least a quad-core CPU for the computer/laptop you're using (the faster the better!)



BONUS QUALIFICATIONS (Not Required)



If you have any of the following skills, please let us know!



- Web development and coding (mostly for increased website speed and debugging).

- Debugging hacked sites.

- Case studies of your work.

- Website migration.



IMPORTANT: Our management team feels every person should have a good work-life balance and we try to create a very comfortable remote work environment. That said, it's also important to us that we can see what work is being done, and track work progress with Time Doctor. 



If you've made it this far, please introduce yourself in a 3-minute video and share it when you apply! Please also add why you believe you'd be a good fit for our team by filling out our application form below:



Application Form: 



Website: 



NOTE: We get a lot of applicants on this platform. The applicants we are most serious about considering are those who are willing to introduce themselves in a video and also fill out our application form. We're excited to meet you and look forward to flourishing together!

title: Digital Ads Coordinator
description:
To Apply

To be considered for this role, please complete the application form:





The Opportunity

This could be one of the best jobs you’ll ever have.

We’re looking for an experienced Digital Ads Coordinator to join our remote team full-time.



About LickYourPhone

LickYourPhone Media is a leading restaurant marketing agency in Australia. We partner with restaurants, bars, hotels, and venues to amplify their brand presence through creative, data-driven digital advertising. You'll work alongside an amazing team that is passionate about hospitality, marketing, and great food.



The Role

We're looking for an experienced Digital Ads Coordinator who blends creative instinct with analytical precision. You'll manage a diverse portfolio of hospitality clients, running paid advertising campaigns across Meta 
 & Instagram), TikTok, and Google. From strategy development to performance reporting, you'll own the full campaign lifecycle and serve as each client's go-to advertising partner.



What You'll Do

Campaign Strategy & Execution

• Develop and launch paid advertising campaigns aligned with each client's goals and budget.

• Set up, manage, and 
 campaigns across
, Instagram, TikTok, and Google Ads.

• Create compelling ad creatives, copy, and visuals that resonate with target audiences.

• Monitor campaigns in real time, adjusting targeting, bidding, and creative elements as needed.



Audience Targeting & Optimisation

• Utilise audience targeting tools and retargeting strategies to maximise reach and engagement.

• Continuously refine segmentation based on performance data and emerging trends.

• Implement optimisation tactics including bid adjustments, ad scheduling, and audience exclusions.



Analytics & Reporting

• Monitor KPIs such as CTR, CPA, CPC, CPM, ROAS, and conversion rates.

• Prepare comprehensive performance reports with actionable insights and strategic recommendations.

• Deliver at least 8 monthly strategic recommendations per client.



Client Relationship Management

• Serve as the primary point of contact for your portfolio of clients.

• Provide regular campaign updates and proactively communicate optimisation opportunities.

• Build strong, long-term partnerships through transparency and exceptional service.



Compliance & Best Practices

• Ensure all campaigns comply with platform advertising policies and brand guidelines.

• Stay current with industry trends, platform updates, and emerging best practices.

• Address ad disapprovals and policy issues promptly and proactively.



What We're Looking For

Required

• Proven experience managing paid advertising campaigns on Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, and/or TikTok Ads.

• Proficiency in Canva and other creative tools for ad design.

• Strong copywriting skills with the ability to craft engaging, platform-specific ad copy.

• Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret campaign data and translate it into actionable strategy.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for confident client interactions.

• Proficiency in English

• Detail-oriented, organised, and able to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Self-motivated and able to work independently while collaborating with a team.

•Excellent and reliable internet connection.



Preferred

• Prior agency experience, particularly within the hospitality or food & beverage industry.

• Familiarity with A/B testing methodologies and conversion funnel optimisation.

• Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Digital Media, or a related field.



The Personality We're After

•Creative and innovative: you bring fresh ideas to every campaign.

•Resilient and composed under pressure: you thrive in a fast-paced agency environment.

•Proactive and self-driven: you take ownership and don't wait to be told what to do.

•A true team player: you collaborate openly and communicate with honesty and respect.

•Confident yet approachable: you handle client interactions with professionalism and warmth.



To Apply



To be considered for this role, please complete the application form:

title: Senior SEO Manager
description:
We are a private equity-backed company operating 27 businesses across construction, medical, real estate, and consulting.

We have built a strong internal team in the Philippines, including 25+ highly skilled tea
mbers across SEO, development, and content. We are now looking to add a Senior SEO Portfolio Manager who can take ownership of a group of websites and help drive the next level of growth.

This is not a basic SEO role.

You will be responsible for driving traffic, rankings, and conversions across multiple websites—thinking strategically and executing at a high level.

What This Role Is

A strategic operator role (thinking + execution)

High ownership over a portfolio of websites

Supported by an experienced in-house SEO, content, and development team

Focused on real outcomes, not theory

A path to becoming a vertical lead within the organization



What This Role Is Not

Not a junior or intermediate position

Not a “strategy-only” role

Not checklist-based SEO



Ownership Model

You will be assigned a group of websites or a vertical (e.g., construction, medical, real estate).

You are responsible for:

Developing strategy within your assigned portfolio

Executing and improving performance

Driving measurable growth in traffic and conversions

You are expected to think, act, and execute like an owner.

???? Key Responsibilities

Take ownership of 5–10 websites (100–500+ pages each)

Identify why sites are underperforming and fix them

Build and execute SEO strategies within your portfolio

Optimize:

Meta titles and descriptions (CTR-focused)

Page structure and internal linking

Use Google Search Console data to:

Increase click-through rates

Improve rankings on existing pages

Identify and resolve:

Content gaps

Cannibalization

Indexing and technical issues

Work with writers and developers to improve or replace low-quality content

Use AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude to scale content intelligently

Continuously test new ideas and strategies to win in competitive markets

Collaborate with internal team (strategy, SEO specialists, developers)



Strategic Expectations

You are expected to:

Identify opportunities the team has missed

Propose and test new ideas based on real data

Improve performance continuously—not just execute instructions

You will not wait for direction on everything—you will drive results.



Success in This Role Looks Like

Significant increase in traffic across your assigned portfolio

Higher CTR from search results

Improved rankings on priority pages

Clear, measurable SEO wins within 60–90 days



Requirements

4–8+ years of SEO experience (agency experience preferred)

Proven track record of growing traffic on large websites

Strong understanding of:

Technical SEO (indexing, structure, performance)

Content strategy (planning and scaling)

CRO (titles, descriptions, user behavior)

Excellent English communication skills

Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

Ability to think independently and challenge ideas when needed

Stable work history (we value long-term tea
mbers)

Not a Fit If You

Only follow instructions without thinking

Rely heavily on tools without understanding strategy

Have not personally improved website performance

Prefer managing instead of executing



Compensation & Details

$1,500/month

Full-time (40 hours/week)

100% remote

Long-term role with growth opportunities



Growth Opportunity

This role can evolve into:

Vertical Lead (owning a full business category within the portfolio)





Application Requirement (Mandatory)

To be considered, submit a short case study (max 2 pages):

A website you worked on

What was wrong

What you changed

The results you achieved

description:
