title: Senior QA/QC Architect
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



Senior QA/QC Architect 



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a Senior QA/QC Architect based in the Philippines to provide quality assurance and quality control oversight for architectural drawings produced by our drafting team. This role will focus on reviewing drawings, identifying coordination issues, and ensuring that all documentation meets technical and constructability standards before project delivery.

The ideal candidate is a licensed architect with strong experience working in reputable architectural firms on complex projects, with deep expertise in technical detailing, multidisciplinary coordination, and drawing review.



* Key Responsibilities:

Perform QA/QC reviews of architectural drawings produced by the drafting and production teams.

Identify nonconformance issues, coordination conflicts, and detailing errors within project drawings.

Review coordination between Architectural, Structural, and MEP consultant drawings.

Ensure drawings meet constructability requirements and professional architectural standards.

Provide clear feedback and correction notes to the drafting team to improve drawing accuracy and consistency.

Help maintain quality standards across projects and reduce repetitive corrections.

Ensure lessons learned from previous projects are applied to future projects to improve overall drawing quality.

Review and validate technical details and construction documentation before final submission.

Support internal teams by ensuring drawings follow company standards and project documentation requirements.



* Training & Standards

The selected candidate will be trained on the company’s storage system detailing standards and internal documentation processes to ensure alignment with project requirements.



* Qualifications:

Licensed Architect (Philippines) required

Minimum 6+ years of architectural experience in a reputable architectural firm

Experience working on complex architectural projects

Strong expertise in architectural detailing and construction documentation

Strong understanding of coordination between Architectural, Structural, and MEP disciplines

Ability to identify constructability and coordination issues within drawings



* Technical Skills:

Strong experience reviewing drawings in Revit

Working knowledge of AutoCAD

Ability to review and coordinate multi-disciplinary drawing sets



* Additional Requirements

Candidates must be able to provide examples of previous projects they have worked on

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving ability

Excellent ability to review and critique drawing packages for technical accuracy



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED AS AN APPLICANT, PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR MOST UP-TO-DATE RESUME AND A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TAILORED TO THIS JOB POSTING!******



Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Sunday to Thursday, 2:00 PM-10:30 PM PST (30-minute unpaid break) - Subject to client requirements

Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler to join our team. This role focuses on designing and detailing multi-level storage buildings, which require a unique structural approach due to their heavy load-bearing systems and specialized construction methods.

The ideal candidate is not only a strong structural engineer but also a super expert in Revit modeling, capable of creating precise, complex models with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and model heavy, multi-level storage buildings using Revit.

Perform structural analysis and detailing specific to high-load industrial and storage facilities.

Develop accurate construction documents and shop drawings.

Collaborate with the engineering and design team to ensure models meet structural and architectural requirements.

Identify and solve design challenges with a focus on constructability and safety.

Maintain accuracy and consistency across all Revit models and related documentation.

Coordinate with project managers and other disciplines to ensure seamless project delivery.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, or related field.

Industrial and commercial engineering experience preferred, particularly with heavy load-bearing structures.

Proven expertise as a Revit Modeler, with advanced knowledge of large-scale modeling.

Strong understanding of structural systems, especially for multi-level and heavy storage buildings.

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and collaboration abilities in a remote team environment.



Preferred Skills:

Experience with Steel Structures, Concrete Structures, Masonry Construction, Light and Gauge Steel Structures

Familiarity with BIM coordination and clash detection.

Knowledge of U.S. building codes and standards is a plus.

Knowledge of ETABS and SAFE is a plus.



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Leasing Specialist
description:

We are seeking a confident and driven Lead to Lease Specialist to manage inbound inquiries and proactively engage prospective residents through outbound calls. In this role, you will play a key part in converting leads into scheduled property tours by delivering a seamless and informative experience. 

The ideal candidate is highly comfortable on the phone, possesses strong communication skills, and can clearly explain the self-guided showing process while building rapport and a sense of urgency with prospects. This position requires a proactive approach, attention to detail, and the ability to effectively nurture leads throughout the leasing journey to support occupancy goals.

This role is ideal for a driven leasing professional who thrives in a fast-paced, performance-based environment and is motivated by turning leads into qualified applicants.

, and online leads)

Collaborate with Property Managers and Marketing to ensure alignment on availability and listing details

Follow up with prospects after tours to encourage applications



* Performance Expectations:

Leads converted to scheduled tours

Tours converted to completed applications



* Required Skills & Qualifications:

Prior property management or leasing experience required

Experience with AppFolio (required)

Familiarity with Rently and Tenant Turner (preferred)

Comfortable handling both inbound and outbound calls

Strong phone presence with the ability to build rapport quickly

Clear, professional communication skills

Highly organized with strong follow-up discipline

Experience in a lead-to-lease or leasing conversion-focused role



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING DAILY

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We want someone who already understands what a production environment looks like.

Hot Prospector experience

Home Improvement appointment setting / outbound call center experience

Strong English communication

Excellent objection handling and closing ability

Thick skin, urgency, and self-discipline



This role is numbers-driven. If you are not comfortable being held accountable to daily KPIs, this is not for you.



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS



This is a true KPI environment.



Minimum expectations:



500+ dials per day

4 qualified appointments daily

High contact rate

Strong show rate

Consistent CRM reporting

Fast lead response time



KPIs begin on Day 4

Full production expected by Day 14



This is a performance-based position. We move fast, and we keep top performers.



OUR TEAM STANDARDS



We hire people who operate with:



Radical Transparency – communicate clearly and professionally

Speed is King – fast response, fast follow up, fast execution

Better Every Day – coachable and improving daily

Hunger – competitive, driven, and money motivated



No excuses. Results matter.



TO APPLY



Submit the following:



Resume

A 45–60 second Loom video introducing yourself and showcasing your communication skills

If you are money motivated, competitive, and know how to produce, apply now.

title: Left Brain to Creative Founder: Strategic Support Partner
description:
I'm seeking an exceptional organization-minded partner to complement my creative vision as founder of a growing capital-as-a-service company. This role is perfect for someone who thrives on creating order from chaos, implementing systems that scale, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks while I focus on big-picture strategy.



You'll operate with significant autonomy (levels 3-6 on the delegation framework), making recommendations and decisions independently while keeping our ambitious goals moving forward.



## Core Responsibilities:



* **Strategic Planning & Implementation**: Proactively identify organizational bottlenecks, develop solutions, and implement improvements without direct oversight



* **Internal Relationship Management**: Clarify project scope, stakeholders, and next actions, ensuring key projects are completed on time and goals are moving forward



* **Process Development**: Design and implement scalable workflows and systems that increase organizational efficiency leveraging AI



* **High Level Executive Support**: Learn my voice and communication style, and reduce my administrative workload by 80%



* **Meeting Optimization**: Independently prepare for, facilitate, and extract key action items fro
etings, identifying both first and second-order implications



## What Makes You Perfect for This Role:



* You're naturally organized and find satisfaction in creating systems that work

* You can translate visionary ideas into practical action steps

* You're comfortable with ambiguity and can make progress with incomplete information

* You have excellent judgment about when to act independently and when to consult

* You're tech-savvy with strong Notion skills and genuine curiosity about AI applications

* You communicate with clarity and polish in excellent English, both written and verbal



## Why This Role Matters:



You'll be the essential counterbalance to my creative energy, ensuring our ideas transform into reality. This position offers direct involvement in shaping a growing company, exposure to capital markets, and the opportunity to build systems that will scale with us.



This will start part time and evolve into full time for the right person.



## Application Process:



To ensure alignment, please include the following with your application:



1. A 90-second personalized video telling us about yourself and why you're the perfect organizational complement to a visionary founder.



2. In your cover letter, please include a paragraph on "What is your ikigai?" (Your reason for being - the intersection of what you love, what you're good at, what the world needs, and what you can be paid for).



This role is ideal for someone who finds joy and purpose in creating order, enabling others' success, and building systems that last. If that sounds like you, I'm excited to connect.

title: Paralegal
description:
Litigation & Bankruptcy Paralegal (US-Based Firm)



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday – Friday | 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (11:00 PM – 8:00 AM PHT)

Compensation: Competitive; Based on Experience



About the Firm

We are a tech-forward California law firm specializing in complex civil litigation, real estate disputes, and bankruptcy matters. We operate with a highly integrated, engaged team in the Philippines and believe in leveraging technology (Zoho, ProLaw, Westlaw) to deliver elite results. We aren’t looking for a passive assistant; we are looking for a sharp, proactive legal professional to take true ownership of their caseload.



The Role

As a Litigation Paralegal with a heavy emphasis on Bankruptcy, you will go beyond "filling out templates." You will be responsible for drafting substantive legal content, managing federal and state court filings, and ensuring our attorneys are prepared for every deadline.



Key Responsibilities:

•	Substantive Drafting: Draft complaints, answers, demurrers, discovery motions, meet-and-confer letters, and oppositions from scratch.

•	Bankruptcy Support: Prepare and file pleadings for Chapter 7, 11, and 13 bankruptcy cases via CM/ECF.

•	Case Management: Oversee the litigation lifecycle, including calendaring deadlines, coordinating process service, and gathering documents for subpoena responses.

•	High-Stakes Communication: Act as a primary point of contact for clients and opposing counsel, with a commitment to a 30-minute response time during shift hours.

•	Legal Research: Utilize Westlaw to conduct targeted research and summarize procedural histories.

•	Judgment Enforcement: Assist with post-judgment work, including writs of execution, bank levies, and abstracts of judgment.



What We Are Looking For

•	Education: A Law degree (JD/LLB) is required. Passing the Philippine Bar is a significant plus.

•	Experience: Proven experience in US Litigation (State and Federal). Specific experience in US Bankruptcy law is strongly preferred.

•	Tech-Savvy: You must be proficient in Word, Excel, and Outlook. Experience with Zoho, ProLaw, and CM/ECF is a major advantage.

•	The "Night Owl" Edge: You must have prior experience working US hours and a reliable, high-speed internet connection.

•	Ownership Mindset: You are observant, punctual, and proactive—anticipating issues before they become bottlenecks.



IT Requirements:

•	Own a laptop with at least Windows 10, Processor I5 Core-1235U 1.30 GHz, 16GB RAM (REQUIRED SPECIFICATIONS)

•	Must complete a speed test, meet system specification requirements, and meet laptop specification requirements. 

•	Additional
 with more instructions will be sent as part of the application process.

________________________________________



How to Apply



To be considered for this opportunity, please complete our application form in full using the link below:







Please follow the application instructions above carefully. Messages sent through Online Jobs will not be answered. 



We look forward to reviewing your application!

title: B2B Tech Consulting Inside Sales AE (emails, lead nurture, research)
description:
ABOUT SIDEBENCH HEALTH

Sidebench is an award-winning digital innovation studio in Los Angeles that partners with VC-backed founders and Fortune 500 companies and high-growth startups to bring groundbreaking ideas to life. As a Business Development Associate at Sidebench, you'll play a crucial role in driving our growth initiatives, crafting personalized outreach strategies, and creating impactful marketing materials. Our collaborative environment encourages creativity and professional growth, allowing you to work directly with our leadership team. We pride ourselves on fostering a culture of innovation, where your research skills, strategic thinking, and communication expertise will be valued and implemented in meaningful ways.



ROLE SUMMARY

Seeking an experienced & skilled Associate with B2B lead gen, deal nurture, and
 copywriting experience. We are seeking expertise in building relationships, crafting highly personalized
 content, and creating compelling BD enablement materials. This role will play an important role in our sales & business development initiatives and will work closely with our senior leaders.



Lots of learning potential, if you are hungry, humble, and smart!



Key Responsibilities:

- Write compelling, personalized
 drafts for various executives at client and prospect companies.

- Conduct in-depth online research to gather relevant information about prospects and industry trends.

- Synthesize research to draft
s & messages to leads & prospects

- Develop and maintain a database of
 templates for different scenarios and industries

- Analyze
 campaign performance and refine content strategies accordingly

- Assist in arranging & sharing other marketing materials as needed (e.g., presentations, case studies, landing page copy, social media posts)

- Collaborate with the sales team to understand client needs and refine messaging



Requirements:

- Proven experience in copywriting, particularly for
 campaigns (3+ years preferred)

- Experience with HubSpot CRM, Slack, Gmail, Google Docs, Google Sheets

- Strong research skills with the ability to quickly find and synthesize relevant information

- Ability to craft personalized content for tech-forward executives

- Understanding of sales processes and business development strategies

- Proficiency in using online research tools and databases + AI Tools

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously



This is a project-based position with the potential for full-time ongoing work. The ideal candidate should be able to conduct thorough research efficiently, deliver high-quality, personalized
 drafts to engage prospects and client stakeholders. If you have a talent for crafting persuasive, personalized
s and enjoy diving deep into research, we want to hear from you.



TRIAL PROJECT: Shortlisted applicants will be given a paid trial project, providing a chance to showcase your skills and potentially secure an exciting role in our dynamic team.



Deliverables:

- Lead Contacts Research & synthesis -->
 draft ideas

- Prospect Company research & synthesis (25-50 per week)

-
 Draft Writing (30+ per week)

- LinkedIn research

- Proactive deal nurturing

- Past conversation synthesis (HubSpot CRM)



Please answer the following questions when submitting a proposal:

(3) Are there any non-obvious reasons why working with Sidebench in this role is particularly exciting for you personally? (optional)

title: Part-Time Tech & Funnel Ops VA — Online Coaching Business
description:
Hours: 20 hours/week to start (4 hrs/day, Mon–Fri) — potential to grow to full time after 1 month 

Rate: $4–6 USD/hour with significant growth opportunities

Looking for: Long-term partnership

Start date: Immediately

Reports to: Meghan (business owner) directly



About the Business

I run a coaching and mentorship business helping women transform their relationship with food, their bodies, and themselves. I need a reliable tech/funnel operator who can help me build and run the back-end of the business — and who’s hungry to learn and grow alongside me.

This is a long-term role, not a one-off project. I’m looking for someone I can build a real working relationship with.



ROLE:

This role is the technical and operational backbone of the business. You’ll be the person who makes things work behind the scenes so I can focus on serving clients and creating content.





Primary responsibilities (in priority order):

 1. GoHighLevel (GHL) builds and management

 • Build and maintain landing pages, sales pages, and funnels

 • Set up courses, payments, and product delivery

 • Build and troubleshoot
 automations and workflows

 • Integrate GHL with WordPress, payment processors, and other tools

 2. WordPress maintenance

 • Page builds, updates, and troubleshooting

 • Plugin and integration management

 3.
 sequences & automations

 • Build out
 campaigns and nurture sequences

 • Manage list segmentation and tagging

 • Test and QA all automations before going live

 4. Content distribution & scheduling

 • Schedule social posts (training provided on whichever tool we use)

 • Distribute weekly podcast episodes across all platforms

 • Coordinate content waterfall workflow

 5. Design & content support (as time allows)

 • Build workbooks and PDF lead magnets in Canva (all design work lives in Canva — no other design software required)

 • Generate branded images using AI tools

 • Light video and audio editing using Descript (this is our primary editing tool)

Not required but a bonus:

 • Meta Ads pixel and Conversions API setup experience

 • Familiarity with VSL (video sales letter) funnels

 • Experience with low-ticket offer funnels





Required Skills

You must have hands-on experience with:

 • GoHighLevel (this is non-negotiable — please don’t apply if you haven’t built funnels in GHL)

 •
 marketing platforms (any combination of GHL
, ConvertKit, ActiveCampaign, Mailchimp)

 • Canva for all design work (workbooks, lead magnets, social graphics, branded images)

 • Strong written English for clear communication

You must be willing to learn:

 • Descript for video and audio editing — this is our primary editing tool. If you already know Descript, great. If not, you must be willing to take trainings and get up to speed quickly.

 • AI tools, especially Claude — I use AI heavily in this business and you will too. Existing experience is a plus; willingness to learn is essential.

 • New scheduling tools, project management platforms, and integrations as needed

Most important: You learn quickly, take initiative on your own training, and treat new tools as exciting rather than intimidating.

Bonus skills (please mention if you have them):

 • WordPress — helpful but not required. If you don’t have it, willingness to learn is essential.

 • AI image generation (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Leonardo, etc.) — would be great but not necessary

 • Descript experience already in place

 • Video editing in other platforms

 • Podcast distribution across platforms

 • Notion / project management tools

 • Zapier / 
 for integrations

 • Meta Ads pixel and Conversions API setup

 • VSL (video sales letter) funnel experience

 • Low-ticket offer funnel experience





Who You Are

 • Reliable communicator. You check in daily, flag blockers early, and don’t disappear on me. If something happens (illness, internet, family emergency), you communicate within 24 hours — even just a quick message. This is the most important quality I’m looking for.

 • Fast learner. New tools, new platforms, new workflows don’t intimidate you — they excite you. You’ll watch tutorials on your own time, ask smart questions, and get up to speed fast. This is non-negotiable for this role.

 • Self-starter. You take a task and run with it. You ask smart clarifying questions up front, then execute without needing constant check-ins.

 • Detail-oriented. You test what you build before you tell me it’s done. Broken automations and dead links cost me money.

 • Calm under pressure. When something breaks, you troubleshoot first, then bring me solutions, not problems.

 • Growth mindset. You’re willing to learn new tools, take on new types of work, and grow with the business.

 • Backup infrastructure. You have a stable internet connection AND a backup option (mobile data hotspot, co-working space access, or similar). If your home power/internet goes out, you have a plan to keep working or to communicate immediately. Please tell me your specific backup plan in your application.





How We’ll Work Together

 • Communication: Daily check-ins via Slack. Daily or weekly 30-minute video call.

 • Project management: Tasks in Notion

 • Hours: between 9 am and 6 pm CT M-F

 • Pay: Bi-weekly via 

 • Trial period: First 30 days is a paid trial. If we both feel it’s a fit, we continue and discuss expanding hours and rate.



How to Apply

Please send me a message that includes:

 1. Your name, location, and current availability (hours/week available, any other clients)

 2. Your experience with GoHighLevel — specifically: how long have you used it, and what’s the most complex funnel you’ve built? Include a screenshot or link if possible.

 3. Tell me about a tool or skill you taught yourself in the last 6 months. What did you learn, why, and how did you go about it? (This is the most important question — answer it thoughtfully.)

 4. Have you used Descript? Have you used Claude or other AI tools? If yes, tell me how. If no, tell me how you’d approach learning them.

 5. Your backup infrastructure plan — what’s your setup if your power or internet goes out for a day or more?

 6. A short voice or video introduction (2 minutes max) —Absolutely NO reading from AI written scripts. I can tell. I want to hear how you authentically communicate. 



I’ll respond to applications within 3 business days. Please don’t follow up sooner than that.

Looking forward to hearing from you.



Warmly,

Meghan

title: TikTok & Instagram Video Editor (Lingerie Brand)
description:

I run a European lingerie brand focused on colorful, elegant, cute, and feminine sets. I’ll provide all raw footage — your job is to turn it into engaging, viral-style videos. So only editing. The footage is also only of the lingerie sets in a cute pretty and elegant way.. so not on models.

!!! Only apply if you are a woman, due to the content of lingerie edits I just feel it works better as it's very cute and girly.

title: Paid Media Specialist
description:
Overview

MADE Digital is hiring a Paid Media Specialist to create, manage and scale lead generation campaigns for clients. This role is focused on driving qualified leads, improving CPL, and delivering measurable business results. Looking for someone who can take ownership and consistently drive real, measurable results through paid media, not deliver simple vanity metrics.



What You’ll Do

title: AU Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer – Exhibitions, Events and Brand Activations



About the Role

We are looking for a talented and highly detail-oriented Graphic Designer to support the creative development and

delivery of exhibitions, events and brand activation projects.



This role is ideal for someone who can take a concept or creative direction and turn it into polished, on-brand design

outcomes, while also preparing accurate production-ready artwork based on dimensions, technical drawings, mark-ups

and artwork schedules.



The role requires a strong eye for design, excellent technical artwork skills, and a practical understanding of how

graphics are applied across physical environments and live experiences.

Experience in exhibitions, events, signage, environmental graphics or brand activations is highly preferred.



Key Responsibilities

• Create graphic design concepts and visual layouts based on client briefs, references and creative direction

• Roll out approved concepts across multipole assets and formats including graphics, signage, counters, walls,

plinths, digital screens, print collateral and branded materials

• Prepare accurate production-ready artwork files for print, signage and digital outputs

• Put together artwork schedules including dimensions, mark-ups working from technical details and production

specifications

• Apply brand guidelines consistency across a wide range of touchpoints

• Adapt master creative across multiple sizes and formats while maintaining design quality and consistency

• Ensure all files are accurate and ready for issue, including checking spelling, alignment, image quality, scale,

bleed, colour settings and layout consistency

• Maintain organised file structures, version control and clear naming conventions

• Communicate clearly and professionally with internal tea
mbers via Outlook, Teams and project updates

• Work collaborative with creative and production teams to meet deadlines and project needs

• Respond to feedback and revisions efficiently and accurately



Skills and Capabilities

• Strong graphic design fundamentals including typography, layout, composition, hierarchy and brand application

• Ability to translate concepts and creative direction into strong visual design outcomes

• Excellent art working skills and technical file setup

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Ability to read and interpret artwork schedules, dimensions, technical drawings and production requirements

• Strong understanding of print production requirements including beleed, trim, safe zones, resolution and colour

modes

• Ability to design for both print and digital outputs

• Strong time management and ability to handle multiples tasks and deadlines

• Strong written English communications kills

• Ability to work independently while staying connected to a remote team

• Proactive approach to asking questions and flagging issues early



Software and tools

Essential

• Adobe illustrator

• Adobe InDesign

• Adobe Photoshop

• Adobe Acrobat

• Microsoft Outlook

• Microsoft Teams

• Microsoft Word

• Microsoft Excel

• Microsoft PowerPoint



Preferred / nice to have

• Adobe After Effects

• Adobe Premier Pro

• Figma

• Basic understanding of spatial or 3D design tools such as SketchUp

• Experience using shared devices, cloud-based file systems and structure folder management



Experience Required

• Minimum 3 years’ experience in graphic design, artwork production or a similar role

• Strong portfolio demonstrating both creative design and technical artwork capability

• Experience preparing files for print and production

• Experience working in a fast-paced studio, agency or project-based environment

• Experience in exhibitions, events, signage, retail environments, environmental graphics or brand activations is

highly preferred

• Experience working remotely with international teams is an advantage



Personal attributes

• Detail-orientated and organised

• Reliable and responsive

• Calm under pressure and able to manage deadlines

• Collaborative and easy to work with

• Positive attitude and willingness to learn

• Accountable for quality and accuracy

• Able to balance creativity with practical execution



What success looks like in a role

• Creative work is on-brand, well considered and visually strong

• Artwork files are accurate, organised and production-ready

• Deadlines are met and communication is clear

• Technical details are followed carefully reducing production issues and rework

• Design quality remains high across multiple formats and rollout

title: Short-Term Ops & Quality Management
description:
**Part-Time Night Shift Operations & Quality Control SpecialistP | Remote**



**About Us**

We are a a fast-growing short-term rental property management company operating vacation properties across the Orlando/Disney corridor. We run a tight, high-performing team and hold ourselves to a high standard — for our guests, our owners, and each other. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us, not just clock in and out.



**Role Overview**

This is not a passive monitoring role. You will own a critical slice of our operations — from the quality of every clean to the outcome of every guest issue that comes in during your shift. You'll exercise real judgment, represent our brand, and take initiative without being told. If you're looking for something to do on the side while working another job, this is not the right fit. We need your full attention and commitment.



**Hours:** Monday–Friday, 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST



---



**What You'll Own**



*Quality Control & Cleaner Management*



- Review post-clean photo submissions via Turno and make expert judgment calls on approval or rejection before every guest check-in

- Review, enforce, and continuously improve our cleaner checklists — you will own these documents

- Monitor cleaner ratings and deliver regular, specific feedback based on photos, guest reviews, and claims

- Place supply and maintenance orders as needed to keep properties guest-ready

- Identify patterns and proactively flag recurring issues before they escalate



*Claims & Owner Communication*



- File and manage guest damage claims from submission to resolution

- Track claim outcomes and notify property owners of successful results

- Share video walkthroughs and property updates with owners

- Request Google reviews from guests at the right 
nt

- Support ad-hoc projects as the business grows



*Night Shift Guest Operations*



- Own all guest communication during your shift — questions, emergencies, and last-minute issues

- Coordinate guard gate access and resolve entry issues in real time

- Escalate and document i
 appropriately



---



**Who You Are**



- **Already working in short-term rentals** — you know the platforms, the pace, and the problems that come up

- Extremely detail-oriented — you notice what others miss and you care about getting it right

- Strong sense of ownership — you don't wait to be told and you don't let things slip

- Curious and self-motivated — you actively look for ways to improve your work and the systems around you

- A clear, professional communicator in writing

- You want to grow within a company, not just fill a seat



**This Role Is Not For You If:**



- You don't have hands-on STR experience

- You are working or plan to work another job simultaneously

- You need someone to check on you to stay focused

- You're looking for something low-effort during quiet hours



---



**Requirements**



- Prior short-term rental experience (Airbnb, VRBO, 
, or property management company) — **required**

- Dual-monitor setup + laptop *(photo required with application)*

- Fast, reliable internet *(speed test screenshot required)*

- Typing test completed at 
 *(screenshot required)*

- Willingness to work under screen monitoring software during shift hours



---



**Schedule & Compensation**



- Part-time | Monday–Friday, 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST

- Fully remote

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- **Growth opportunity:** For the right person, there is real room to grow over time. Tea
mbers who demonstrate ownership, consistency, and curiosity will have the opportunity to expand into other areas of the business they're interested in.



---



**To Apply**

Please submit the following:



1. Resume or summary of relevant STR experience

2. Photo of your dual-monitor + laptop setup

3. Internet speed test screenshot from

title: AI Video Editor. Grow to Marketing Manager. AI experience needed. Free AI training provided.
description:
We're a European DTC brand scaling fast on Meta and TikTok across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Germany. Our creative output is the engine of our growth, and we need a sharp video editor to plug in and ride the wave with us.



================================================================



THE OPPORTUNITY:



This isn't a typical editing gig. It's a long-term play with real upside.



We're hiring someone who'll start as our video editor (10-20 hrs/week) and step into a full-time Marketing Manager seat within 6-12 months. If you've got drive, curiosity, and a real interest in performance marketing — keep reading.



THE TRAJECTORY:



- Months 1-3: Video Editor (10-20 hrs/week) — execute briefs, sharpen your AI workflow

- Months 3-6: Senior Editor + Creative Strategist — pitch concepts, shape hooks, influence direction

- Months 6-12: Marketing Manager (full-time) — run campaigns, lead the creative pipeline, report on results



THE PAY:



- Base: $4 USD/hour

- Performance bonuses: When your ads deliver strong ROAS, you earn extra. The better your work, the bigger your check. Simple as that.

- Free AI training during the trial: Day one, you get full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram content (
/frankyshaw/) — arguably the sharpest AI video training out there. Whether or not we end up long-term, those skills are yours to keep.



If you want to be paid for output, not for clocking hours, this works. Strong editors earn well above the base.



================================================================



THE WORK:



- Short-form video ads (15-60s) for Meta and TikTok

- AI-driven ad creative using Higgsfield, Runway, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen

- Multiple hook variations per video — we test relentlessly

- Localization: ads run in English, Dutch, and German. Translations come with the brief — you handle voice-over, subtitles, and clean delivery using AI tools.

- Quick turnarounds and rapid iteration based on live performance data



================================================================



WHY THIS ROLE STANDS OUT:



- Real growth path: editor today, Marketing Manager in under a year

- Performance bonuses tied directly to your output

- Free Franky Shaw training during the trial — yours regardless of outcome

- Briefs come fully prepped with translations

- Quick feedback loops and live data on what works

- Your edits run on real ad spend — you see exactly what they do



================================================================



YOU'RE A FIT IF:



- You already work with AI video tools (Higgsfield, Runway, Sora, Kling, ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.)

- You've cut short-form content for social

- You can find sharp B-roll, stock, and reference material

- Your English is solid

- You can turn a video around in 24-48 hours

- You're okay with $4/hour base + bonuses (this isn't the role if you need a high upfront rate)

- You want to grow, not just clock in



If you're reading this and you're NOT an AI type: Pina Colada (in google forms)



================================================================



HOW TO APPLY — TASK FIRST, RESUME NEVER:



We don't read resumes. We judge work. Complete the task below if you want a shot.



STEP 1 — Watch and download our winning founder video:

???? f.io/h6H4GIUE



STEP 2 — The Task: 3 Dutch Hook Variations



Build 3 fresh Dutch (Netherlands) hook variations for the opening 3 seconds. Text overlays, B-roll cutaways, AI-generated clips, AI voice-over swaps — use whatever stops the scroll.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING AT:



- Creativity — Did you bring something genuinely new, or just rewrite the text?

- Sourcing — Where did the visuals come from? Stock? AI? Custom? Quality is the bar.

- Localization — We run ads in English, Dutch, AND German. Show you can handle translations cleanly with AI tools (ElevenLabs, HeyGen, etc.). Translations come with every brief — your job is execution.



STEP 3 — Submit here:


/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdyPLEt8zPfE46ebAm3R4IV_c7W1QS_Z7aw_qu6t5Wr-PBxIA/viewform



The form is the only way in. Five minutes to fill out once the task is done. You'll upload your 3 hooks and answer quick questions on experience, availability, and goals.



================================================================



WHAT'S NEXT:



If your task lands, you're in for a paid 2-week trial. From day one of the trial:



- Full access to Franky Shaw's paid Instagram training

- Real ad projects on your plate

- Direct feedback and mentorship

- A clear track toward the Marketing Manager seat



================================================================



DEADLINE: 3 days from today.



No task = no reply. If you skipped the task, you didn't read the post.



Let's go.

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!!!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Real estate listing coordinator and database manager
description:
Real Estate Listing Coordinator & Database Manager



Location: Western PA (remote US eastern time zone 10 AM-5 PM)

Reports To: Director of Operations / Team Leader



Position Overview



We are a fast-growing, high-producing real estate team seeking a detail-oriented, organized, and proactive Listing Coordinator & Database Manager to help drive efficiency and client experience.



This role is the backbone of our listing operations and database flow—ensuring listings go live smoothly, leads are responded to quickly, and agents stay focused on closing deals.



If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, love organization, and take pride in executing at a high level, this is a critical role with strong growth potential.



Key Responsibilities

Listing Coordination

Manage all listing files from pre-listing through going live on MLS

Input accurate property data into MLS

Coordinate with photographers, videographers, and vendors via in-house Transaction coordinator or director of operations

Prepare and review listing documents for compliance

Ensure all listings are launched on time and error-free

Create and manage listing timelines/checklists

Showing & Listing Setup

Set up and manage showings through ShowingTime

Coordinate showing instructions and access details

Communicate with agents and sellers regarding showing activity

Database & CRM Management

Maintain and organize database within Follow Up Boss (our team CRM)

Input, update, and tag leads accurately

Ensure proper lead routing and follow-up systems are maintained

Monitor database health and cleanliness

Lead Management & Communication

Respond to inbound leads via text in a timely, professional manner

Qualify and route leads to appropriate agents

Assist with initial engagement and handoff to agents

Ensure no lead goes untouched

Administrative & Support

Assist agents with listing-related needs

Track listing performance and status updates

Help maintain systems and processes for scalability

Support team initiatives and marketing coordination when needed

Qualifications

Real estate experience preferred (transaction coordination, listing management, or admin role)

Experience with matrix MLS systems

Familiarity with ShowingTime and CRM platforms (especially Follow Up Boss), & SISU software

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Excellent written communication (especially texting/email)

Ability to multitask and prioritize in a high-volume environment

Tech-savvy and quick to learn new systems



What Success Looks Like

Listings go live smoothly, accurately, and on time

Leads are responded to quickly and routed effectively

Database is clean, organized, and actionable

Agents are supported and able to focus on revenue-generating activities

Systems run efficiently with minimal oversight

Compensation & Growth

Competitive pay (salary  + performance incentives)

Opportunity for advancement as the team continues to scale

Work alongside a top-producing real estate team in Western Pennsylvania





Why Join Us

We are building something big—and this role is a key part of that growth. You won’t just be “filling a position”—you’ll be helping drive the systems behind a high-performance real estate operation.

title: Test Analyst - Remote
description:
We are seeking a detail-focused Test Analyst to support the quality and reliability of our core business systems. In this role, you will help ensure that enterprise applications function as expected by applying structured testing approaches across multiple stages of the development lifecycle.



The ideal candidate brings a solid IT foundation, strong knowledge of both the software development lifecycle (SDLC) and software testing lifecycle (STLC), and the ability to analyze systems thoroughly to identify potential issues before release.



Key Responsibilities:

- Test Planning and Preparation

- Collaborate with business analysts and developers to define testing strategies

- Develop detailed test plans and test cases for new implementations and system enhancements

- Test Execution and Defect Management

- Perform testing across multiple phases including system, integration, regression, and UAT

- Record and track defects, ensuring issues are resolved before release

- Provide regular updates on testing progress and results

- Enterprise System Validation

- Perform thorough testing of ERP systems and related business workflows

- Integration and Data Testing

- Verify data exchanges and message accuracy when testing EDI transactions and API endpoints

- Database Validation

- Use SQL queries to validate backend data and confirm database accuracy

- Continuous Improvement

- Recommend improvements to testing practices, coverage, and overall efficiency



Required Qualifications:

- Minimum 3 years of experience in software testing

- ISTQB Foundation Level certification or higher

- Strong knowledge of system, integration, and regression testing approaches

- Experience testing ERP platforms and EDI integrations/message formats

- Practical experience performing API testing

- Ability to write and execute SQL queries for backend validation

- Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills



Preferred Experience:

- Experience conducting performance testing, including load, stress, or volume testing

- Experience creating and maintaining test automation scripts using Java



Work Schedule :

6:30 AM - 3:00 PM Philippines Time

title: Operations Associate - Revenue
description:
We are seeking a sharp, organized, and finance-savvy Revenue Operations Associate to support our growing business. This Philippines-based role will work directly with US-based leaders to keep our revenue engine running smoothly — owning day-to-day billing, AR, and finance operations work, running revenue operations QA, building and maintaining automations, and flexing into executive administrative support and broader operational initiatives as needed.



The ideal candidate has prior hands-on experience in billing, finance, or accounting, is methodical about catching errors before they ship, enjoys building lightweight automations to eliminate manual work, communicates clearly and professionally in writing and on calls, and is comfortable representing the company directly to finance and billing contacts at customer and vendor organizations.



- Start Date: Ideally immediately (or within 2 weeks)

- Rate: Competitive, commensurate with experience

- Hours: 40 hours per week

- Timezone: Monday to Friday, aligned with US business hours (PST/EST overlap required)



Key Responsibilities

- Revenue Operations (Primary Responsibility)

- Own day-to-day billing operations: invoice generation, delivery, follow-up, and reconciliation.

- Manage accounts receivable workflows — track outstanding balances, send dunning communications, and proactively follow up on overdue invoices.

- Partner with finance leadership on revenue reporting, customer billing data hygiene, and month-end close support.

- Maintain accurate customer billing records across our CRM, billing platform, and accounting tools.

- Assist with revenue recognition, contract-to-billing handoffs, and ensuring billing terms match signed agreements.

- Support light bookkeeping tasks, expense categorization, and finance system upkeep as needed.



External Finance & Billing Communication

- Serve as a professional point of contact for customer and vendor finance/billing teams.

- Hop on calls with external AP/AR contacts to resolve billing disputes, payment questions, vendor onboarding requirements, or tax/W-9 documentation.

- Send polished, executive-grade written communications on behalf of the Vooma Finance team.

- Manage customer billing inquiries with care and professionalism, escalating complex issues appropriately.



Executive Administrative Support

- Draft and send executive notes, internal updates, and external correspondence on behalf of the CEO.

- Manage inbox triage, calendar coordination, and meeting prep as needed, primarily related to billing but may include additional tasks.

- Organize documents, contracts, and signed agreements in our internal systems.

- Coordinate logistics for executive priorities — from vendor signups to expense workflows.

- May also be tasked with assisting on associated tasks such as commissions QA.



Revenue Operations QA

- Run QA on billing, invoicing, and revenue workflows — catch discrepancies between contracts, CRM data, and what gets invoiced before they reach the customer.

- Audit customer accounts for data integrity issues (mismatched billing terms, missing PO numbers, incorrect contract dates, stale contacts, etc.).

- Spot-check automated billing runs and reconcile outputs against expected results.

- Maintain QA checklists and test cases for recurring revenue processes.

- Surface patterns in errors or near-misses and recommend process or system fixes.



Automations & Systems Work

- Build and maintain automations across our revenue stack — primarily HubSpot, Stripe, and Zapier, plus LedgerUp for billing automation — to reduce manual data entry and handoffs.

- Help maintain and improve our internal revenue and finance systems (HubSpot CRM, Stripe billing, LedgerUp, and supporting accounting tools).

- Identify repetitive workflows that are good candidates for automation and propose solutions.

- Document standard operating procedures (SOPs) for billing, AR, QA, and automation processes.

- Identify recurring issues or bottlenecks and surface them to leadership with proposed solutions.

- Support ad hoc operational projects across the business as priorities shift.



Requirements

- 2+ years of prior experience in billing, finance, accounting, or AR/AP operations is required. This is non-negotiable.

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills — comfortable drafting executive-quality
s and notes.

- Confidence and professionalism on live calls with finance and billing contacts at other companies.

- Demonstrated attention to detail, especially with numbers, dates, contract terms, and reconciliation.

- Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities with minimal supervision.

- Strong judgment about when to act independently vs. when to escalate.

- Comfort with US business hours and direct collaboration with US-based personnel.

- Hands-on experience with our core revenue stack — HubSpot, Stripe, and Zapier — is strongly preferred.





Preferred Skills

- Background supporting a US-based startup or high-growth company.

- Experience working directly with founders, CEOs, or other senior executives.

- Familiarity with revenue operations workflows (lead-to-cash, contracts, renewals).

- Comfort with AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) for drafting and productivity.

- Light spreadsheet modeling skills (formulas, pivot tables, basic financial analysis).

- Exposure to QA testing, process automation, or systems integration work.





Training and Expectations

- Training and playbooks will be provided for our tools and systems.

- We expect fast learners who can quickly adapt, work efficiently with minimal supervision, communicate clearly, and know when to escalate.

- Strong emphasis on accuracy, discretion, and professionalism — this role handles sensitive financial and executive information.





Application Instructions

- To confirm you've read the entire job description, please respond with the subject line "Ready For Vooma RevOps".



Be sure to include the following in your application:

- Resume

- A short note (3–5 sentences) describing your prior billing, finance, or accounting experience

- Photo of your work area

title: E-commerce Virtual Assistant
description:
E-commerce Virtual Assistant (Etsy, Shopify, Amazon) – Faith-Based Brand for Moms | Part-Time ? Full-Time



**Company:** GloFusion Creations LLC

**Industry:** Faith-Based Apparel & Gifts for Christian Moms

**Location:** Remote

**Position Type:** Part-Time (20 hrs/week) ? Full-Time Opportunity



About Us



GloFusion Creations is a growing Christian lifestyle brand focused on uplifting, faith-filled products for moms. We sell across Etsy, Shopify, and Amazon, and we’re building a scalable brand that combines creativity, systems, and purpose.



We are looking for a **detail-oriented, proactive Virtual Assistant** who can help manage and grow our stores while maintaining a high standard of quality and consistency.



Your Role

You will be responsible for **day-to-day store operations, listing optimization, and backend management** across our platforms.



This is not just a task-based role — we are looking for someone who can **think, improve systems, and grow with the business.**



Responsibilities



**Store Management**

* Manage Etsy, Shopify, and Amazon listings

* Upload and optimize new products (titles, descriptions, tags, images)

* Ensure all listings follow SEO best practices

* Maintain consistency across all platforms



Product Listings & SEO

* Use provided templates to create high-converting listings

* Conduct keyword research (Etsy + Amazon)

* Update underperforming listings



Order & Customer Support

* Monitor orders and ensure smooth fulfillment (Printify)

* Respond to customer messages in a professional, warm tone

* Handle basic customer issues (tracking, delays, etc.)



Design & Content Support

* Use Canva to create simple mockups, size charts, and info cards

* Upload and organize product images

* Assist with Pinterest or basic social media posting (optional bonus)



Operations & Organization

* Keep spreadsheets updated (product tracking, uploads, performance)

* Help maintain organized workflows

* Suggest improvements to systems and processes



Requirements



Experience

* Proven experience with Etsy (REQUIRED)

* Shopify and/or Amazon experience (HIGHLY preferred)

* Familiarity with Printify or Print-on-Demand



Skills

* Strong understanding of SEO for product listings

* Excellent written English (clear, professional communication)

* High attention to detail (VERY important)

* Organized and able to follow systems



Tools (Preferred but not required)

* Canva

* ChatGPT or AI tools

* Google Sheets / Excel



 Ideal Candidate

* Proactive (doesn’t wait to be told everything)

* Reliable and consistent

* Has a growth mindset

* Can follow instructions but also improve systems

* Comfortable working with a faith-based brand



Compensation

* Starting: $4/hour (based on experience)

* Performance-based increases

* Opportunity to move into a full-time role



Growth Opportunity

This role can grow into a **Store Manager position** where you help oversee operations, manage systems, and scale the business.



How to Apply

To apply, include the following:

1. Your experience with Etsy, Shopify, or Amazon

2. Examples of listings you have created or managed

3. What SEO strategies you use for product listings

4. Your favorite productivity tool and why

5. Include the word **“GLOW”** in your application so we know you read everything



Important



We are looking for someone long-term. If you are only looking for short-term work, this may not be a good fit.



We’re excited to find someone who wants to grow with us and be part of building something meaningful.

title: WordPress Website Rebuild — Project-Based (Champion Gym)
description:
Champion Gym is a martial arts, fitness, and leadership development facility in Grande Prairie, Alberta, Canada. We are rebuilding our WordPress website to improve local search visibility and create a better experience for new visitors.



The strategy, content, and page briefs are already fully prepared. We are not looking for someone to design or strategize — we need a skilled WordPress implementer who can take our content and build it into a clean, fast, well-structured site.



WHAT THE PROJECT INVOLVES:



Phase 1 — Existing Page Fixes

- Update page titles and meta descriptions on all 28 existing pages using RankMath or Yoast SEO

- Add location keywords to specified pages

- Convert the /programs/ page from a content page to a navigation hub

- Noindex WooCommerce pages (/cart/, /checkout/, /my-account/, /shop/, product pages)

- Fix broken or mismatched meta descriptions



Phase 2 — New Landing Pages (30+ pages)

- Build 30+ new program landing pages using provided content briefs

- Each page follows a consistent template provided by us

- Internal linking between related pages as specified

- All pages optimized using RankMath or Yoast per our guidelines



Phase 3 — Blog Setup

- Set up blog section in WordPress

- Upload and format the first 4 blog articles with correct headings, internal links, and SEO settings



Phase 4 — Final Checks

- Verify all pages are indexable in Google Search Console

- Check mobile responsiveness on all new pages

- Submit updated sitemap to Google Search Console



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

- Complete written content for every page — you do not need to write anything

- Page-by-page briefs specifying title, meta description, H1, and structure

- Internal linking map

- WordPress dashboard access

- 24-hour response time throughout the project



REQUIRED SKILLS:

- Minimum 2 years WordPress experience

- Proficient with RankMath or Yoast SEO

- Comfortable with Elementor or Gutenberg

- Experience with WooCommerce (basic)

- Google Search Console experience

- Reliable communicator with daily or every-other-day updates

- Fluent written English



TO APPLY — please include:

1. Links to 2–3 WordPress sites you have built or worked on

2. Brief description of your RankMath or Yoast experience

3. Confirmation you are comfortable implementing content from provided briefs

4. Your available hours per week and earliest start date

5. Your preferred rate (hourly or fixed project price)



Applications without portfolio examples will not be reviewed.

title: Basketball Video Analyst I — Stat Tracking (Paid Trial)
description:
(READ TO THE END — APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS ARE AT THE BOTTOM. APPLICATIONS THAT DO NOT FOLLOW THEM WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.)



I need a careful, focused person to watch basketball game footage and record what happens on the court — accurately, in a fixed format, on a deadline. This can grow into a substantial ongoing role for the right person — up to 30-40 hours per week. I am building a team of 10-15 analysts.



THE WORK

- I send you a YouTube link of a basketball game (NBA, college, or international).

- You watch the video at 2x speed.

- You record points scored, by player, for both teams, in a Google Sheet I provide.

- You return the completed sheet within 2-6 hours of receiving the link.



WHY THIS IS NOT TYPICAL DATA ENTRY

Basketball moves fast. Players are in motion. Jersey numbers are the only reliable way to identify who scored. If you guess, the data is useless to me. The job is to watch carefully and record exactly what happened — not to summarize, not to interpret, not to fill in gaps with assumptions. If you miss a play, rewind. If you can't tell who scored, mark it unknown. Honest reporting is more important than a clean-looking sheet.



PAY

- Trial task: flat $2.50 USD, paid via your preferred method (PayPal / GCash / Wise) within 48 hours of submission, regardless of whether I hire you for ongoing work. Trial is the first half of one game — about 25 minutes of video. With 2x playback and rewinds, expect roughly 15-20 minutes of your time.

- Ongoing rate after a successful trial: $4/hour, paid hourly. The trial fee is a flat completion payment for a screening task, separate from the ongoing rate — don't extrapolate one from the other. Ongoing work expects you to move efficiently once you're familiar with the format.

- Workload scales with your availability — anywhere from 5 hours/week up to 30-40 hours/week if you can sustain quality output and we have games to track.



WHAT I AM SCREENING FOR

- Attention to detail under boredom

- Following written instructions exactly

- Honest reporting (saying "I'm not sure" when the footage is unclear)

- Returning work on time



YOU ARE NOT A FIT IF

- You have not watched a basketball game in the last year

- You plan to multitask while doing this work



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (REQUIRED — applications missing any of these will not be reviewed)

1. Begin your reply with the word REBOUND as the first word of your message. This is how I confirm you read the post.

2. Briefly describe one piece of detail-heavy work you've done where accuracy mattered more than speed (data entry, transcription, sports stats, audits — anything qualifies). One paragraph.

3. On a scale of 1-10, how familiar are you with basketball? It's fine to say 1. I would rather have a careful 4 than a confident 8.

4. Tell me your internet speed in Mbps (check at 
) and whether your connection drops during YouTube playback.

5. State your time zone and tell me how many hours per week you would realistically be available for this work.

6. Confirm you can return a 30-minute trial task within 24 hours of receiving it.

7. Confirm one currency you'd like to be paid in: PayPal USD / GCash PHP / Wise USD. Currency only — no account info.



Do not include WhatsApp,
, or any external contact info in your reply. Apply through OnlineJobs.ph only. Replies with external links will be ignored.

title: Business Development Representative (BDR) | DISRUPTORS MEDIA  LLC
description:
About Disruptors Media



We are an AI-first marketing agency based in Utah, serving contractors, trades, medical, legal, and professional service businesses doing $300K or more in annual revenue. We operate as the fractional CMO and Chief AI Officer for our clients, combining strategy, content, and AI systems that produce measurable outcomes.



Inbound is strong and growing. Now we are building out the outbound engine to match. This role owns that engine.



The Role



As our BDR, you generate new pipeline from scratch. You will research ideal-fit service businesses, run targeted outbound across LinkedIn,
, and phone, and build a network of referral partners (CPAs, attorneys, business consultants, and franchise operators) who can send deals our way.



This is a craft role. Volume matters, but so does the quality of every touch. If you can write outbound that sounds like a human wrote it, research an account before you reach out, and stay disciplined over weeks of follow-up, you will win here.



What You Will Own



- Build and maintain targeted prospect lists of service businesses matching our ICP using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, Clay, and similar tools.



- Run multi-channel outbound sequences across LinkedIn (messages, voice notes, connection requests), cold
, and cold calling.



- Research accounts before outreach: who runs the business, what they sell, what they have publicly shared about their goals or challenges.



- Book qualified discovery calls on founder and CSM calendars. Our target is quality over quantity; a booked call from the right account is worth more than five from the wrong ones.



- Develop a referral partner network: identify and open relationships with professionals who serve the same audience (CPAs, attorneys, consultants, industry associations, franchisors).



- Own your CRM hygiene in GoHighLevel: accurate notes, clear stages, and next actions on every opportunity.



- Test and iterate on outbound copy, subject lines, opening lines, and sequences. Share what works.



- Report weekly on activity, reply rate, booked call rate, show rate, and pipeline created.



What You Bring



Required



- Two or more years in an outbound sales role, ideally at an agency, SaaS company, or B2B services firm.

- A track record of booking qualified meetings from cold outbound, not just inbound follow-up.

- Strong copywriting instincts. You can write a cold
 that does not sound like a cold
.

- Comfort on the phone. Cold calling is part of this role and we want someone who does not flinch.

- Excellent research skills and the patience to personalize at scale.

- Strong CRM discipline and the ability to self-manage a pipeline over long sales cycles.

- Reliable internet, a quiet workspace, and availability during US business hours (Mountain Time overlap preferred).



Nice to Have



- Experience with Apollo, Clay, Smartlead, Instantly, LinkedHelper, or Sales Navigator.

- Experience selling into service businesses (contractors, trades, medical, legal, home services).

-  Experience building referral or partnership networks.

- Fluency with AI tools for research, data enrichment, and outbound personalization (Claude, ChatGPT, Clay AI, etc.).

- Light familiarity with marketing concepts: paid ads, SEO, content, lead gen, AI automation.



Compensation and Perks



- Competitive base salary with uncapped commission tied to booked calls, sourced revenue, and partnership deals.

- Clear promotion path into Account Executive, Partnerships Lead, or Sales Manager for strong performers.

- Remote-first role with flexible structure inside a US Mountain Time working window.

- Paid access to the sales, research, and AI stack we use internally (Sales Navigator, Apollo, Clay, Claude, etc.).

- Direct collaboration with founders on strategy, targeting, and positioning. Your input will shape the playbook.



How to Apply

Send the following to our hiring inbox: 

-  Your resume or LinkedIn profile.

-  A sample cold outreach sequence (three messages) you would send to a commercial roofing company owner to book a discovery call with us. Pretend you have already done account research.



-  A short Loom (under three minutes) walking us through your outbound process: how you build lists, how you personalize, how you follow up.



-  Your expected base salary and commission structure.

-  Applications without the outreach sample and Loom will not be reviewed.

-  We move quickly on hires. Top candidates will hear back within a week. If outbound is your craft and you want to build  pipeline inside a fast-growing AI-first agency, apply today.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) | DISRUPTORS MEDIA LLC
description:
About Disruptors Media



We are an AI-first marketing agency based in Utah, serving contractors, trades, medical, legal, and professional service businesses doing $300K or more in annual revenue. We operate as the fractional CMO and Chief AI Officer for our clients, combining strategy, content, and AI systems that produce measurable outcomes.



Our founders show up on content every day. That content drives inbound interest, and inbound interest needs a human who can move fast, ask the right questions, and put the right people on calls. That human is you.



The Role



As our SDR, you are the first human touchpoint for inbound leads coming from content on Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, podcast appearances, referrals, and events. Your job is to qualify quickly, nurture with care, and book high-intent discovery calls for our founders and client success managers.



This is not a seat for someone who waits for a lead list to be handed over. You will build playbooks, own your pipeline, and improve the conversion of every message we send. If you love the craft of sales conversation, you will like what we have built.



What You Will Own



- Respond to inbound leads across DMs,
, website forms, and ad campaigns, typically within 15 minutes during business hours.



-  Qualify prospects against our ICP: service businesses doing $300K or more in revenue in contracting, trades, medical, legal, or professional services.



-  Book discovery calls on founder and CSM calendars with qualified, high-intent prospects.



-  Nurture warm leads that are not yet ready to buy with thoughtful, value-first follow-up over weeks and months.



-  Maintain a clean CRM in GoHighLevel, with accurate notes, stages, and next actions on every opportunity.



-  Run inbound follow-up sequences: call, text,
, LinkedIn voice note, whatever wins the response.



- Report weekly on speed-to-lead, qualification rate, booked call rate, show rate, and pipeline velocity.



-  Feed insights back to marketing: what content triggers calls, what objections keep coming up, what patterns we need to know.



What You Bring



Required



-  One or more years in an SDR, BDR, or inside sales role, ideally at an agency, SaaS company, or professional services firm.

-  A track record of hitting or beating booked-meeting quotas.

-  Phone presence that reads as confident, curious, and human, not scripted.

-  Excellent written communication. You can write a DM, a follow-up
, or a text that earns a reply.

-  Strong organizational skills and comfort living inside a CRM.

-  Reliable internet, a quiet workspace, and availability during US business hours (Mountain Time overlap preferred).



Nice to Have

-  Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Close, or similar CRMs.

-  Familiarity with service business owners (contractors, trades, medical, legal).

-  Experience selling marketing, agency, or AI services.

-  Fluency with AI tools for research, note-taking, and message drafting (Claude, ChatGPT, Clay, Apollo, etc.).

-  Light familiarity with marketing concepts: paid ads, SEO, content, lead gen.



Compensation and Perks



-  Competitive base salary with uncapped commission tied to booked calls and closed revenue.

-  Clear promotion path into Account Executive or Client Success Manager for strong performers.

-  Remote-first role with flexible structure inside a US Mountain Time working window.

-  Paid access to sales tools, CRM, and AI software we use internally.

-  Direct mentorship from the founders. You will be in the room when strategy is built, not after.



How to Apply



-  Send the following to our hiring inbox:



-  Your resume or LinkedIn profile.



-  A short Loom (under three minutes) pretending you are following up with a contractor who filled out a form but did not answer your call. Show us how you handle it.



-  A brief note on your best sales month ever: what you sold, how much, and why it worked.



-  Your expected base salary and commission structure.



-  Applications without the Loom will not be reviewed.



We move quickly on hires. Top candidates will hear back within a week. If you love the front end of sales and want to build a career inside a fast-moving AI-first agency, apply today.

title: Shopify Website Builder Needed — Theme Rebuild + Long-Term Potential
description:
We're Viral Slice Co, and we need a skilled Shopify developer to port our existing live store to a new premium theme we've already purchased. The content, products, collections, and brand assets all stay the same — we just need everything rebuilt cleanly inside the new theme without losing functionality, SEO, or design polish.



This is a one-time project with a hard 1-week deadline. If you crush it, there's a strong chance of ongoing Shopify work down the road.



==========================================================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Migrate our existing Shopify store onto the new theme (we'll provide the theme file and admin access)

- Rebuild all key pages: home, collection pages, product pages, cart, checkout, about, contact, policies

- Reconfigure and reinstall all existing Shopify apps in the new theme

- Match (and where possible, improve) the current site's visual design — spacing, typography, brand consistency

- Customize Liquid templates where the theme's drag-and-drop falls short

- Preserve all SEO: URLs, meta titles/descriptions, alt text, 301 redirects where needed

- Test thoroughly across desktop and mobile before handoff

- Provide a brief Loom walkthrough of what was changed at the end



==========================================================



MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS



- 2+ years of hands-on Shopify development — please share live store URLs you've built or migrated

- Strong Liquid skills — you can edit templates, sections, and snippets (not just theme editor work)

- Shopify apps experience — comfortable reinstalling, reconfiguring, and troubleshooting third-party apps

- SEO awareness — you understand how to preserve URLs, meta data, and avoid traffic loss during migrations

- Strong design eye — clean layouts, consistent spacing, attention to typography and brand details

- Reliable internet and full availability for the 7-day project window

- Strong written English for clear daily updates

- Available to start within 2-3 days of being hired



NICE-TO-HAVE



- Experience with Shopify 2.0 themes and JSON templates

- Basic understanding of Core Web Vitals / page speed optimization

- Familiarity with Klaviyo, 
, or other common Shopify apps



==========================================================



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, your application MUST include all of the following (applications missing any item will be ignored):



1. The word "PIXEL" at the very top of your message (this confirms you read the listing)

2. Links to 2-3 live Shopify stores you've built or migrated, with a one-line note on what you did for each

3. Your fixed-price quote to complete this project in 7 days

4. Your earliest available start date

5. A brief answer: "What's the trickiest part of a theme migration, and how do you handle it?"



Applications that paste a generic cover letter or skip these steps won't get a reply.



We move fast and pay fast. Looking forward to hearing from you.
